Name: PT HM Sampoerna Tbk.
Description:
Established in 1913, PT Hanjaya Mandala Sampoerna Tbk. (Sampoerna) has been playing a significant part in the tobacco industry for more than a century. As a subsidiary of PT Philip Morris Indonesia (PMID) and an affiliate to Philip Morris International Inc. (PMI) since 2005, we have the vision to be regarded as the most respected company in Indonesia. We place our "Three Hands Philosophy" mission at heart, which represents our key stakeholders including adult consumers, employees & business partners, and society at large, to embrace in synergy and continuously innovate to reach new milestones. 

To deliver high-quality products for our adult consumers, we focused on our employees by formulating an inclusive and vibrant working environment. Our diverse and global teams offer a wide range of perspectives for anyone keen to learn something new every day. That is why Sampoerna has been certified as a “Top Employer” in Indonesia by the Top Employers Institute for the past years in a row. This certification is further recognition of Sampoerna's transformation progress and firmly establishes Sampoerna among the ranks of employers of choice that are focused on meeting the needs of a globally diverse workforce. Here, we strive to #MakeHistory by creating a positive impact for society at large.

The initiatives towards sustainability are encapsulated in “Sampoerna for Indonesia” (“Sampoerna Untuk Indonesia”) which represents our commitment to continuously contribute to Indonesia’s development. To help the growth of our business partners and society at large, we are continuously committed to improving the MSME’s (UMKM) skills with various integrated and comprehensive training through the Sampoerna Entrepreneurship Training Center (SETC) and the Sampoerna Retail Community (SRC). 

With our current mission to lead the transformation of the tobacco industry, we believe that we are preparing the business for the future and create wider societal value for all stakeholders.

Name: PT DJARUM
Description: At Djarum, we view our people as the foundation of our success. We look for people who have a passion for progress, combined with key qualities of humility, dedication and sincerity. These are the values have enabled us to work harmoniously yet dynamically over the past six decades, generating real progress and products.

Name: JTI
Description:
We’re JTI, Japan Tobacco International and we believe in freedom. We think that the possibilities are limitless when you’re free to choose. In fact, we’ve spent over 20 years innovating, creating new and better products for our consumers to choose from. It’s how we’ve grown to be present in 130 countries.

But our business isn’t just business. Our business is our people. Their talent. Their potential. We believe when they’re free to be themselves, grow, travel and develop, amazing things can happen for our business. 

That’s why our employees, from around the world, choose to be a part of JTI. 83% of employees feel happy working at JTI. And that's why we’ve been awarded Global Top Employer status, 10 years running. 

So when you’re ready to choose a career you’ll love, in a company you’ll love, feel free to #JoinTheIdea. 

A 'follow' confirms you are 18+

Name: PT. Gudang Garam Tbk
Description:
PT Gudang Garam Tbk is one of the leading cigarette producers that has been established since 1958 in the town of Kediri, East Java. 
Measured by assets controlled, product sales, duties and taxes paid to the Indonesian Government and by total number of employees, PT Gudang Garam, Tbk. is the biggest company involved in the Indonesian kretek cigarette industry. 'Tbk' denotes that the company lists part of its shares in the Stock Exchange.
The Company has a 21.4 per cent of the domestic cigarette market at the end of 2017 based on Nielsen market research.

Until now, Gudang Garam has widely known both domestically and abroad as a producer of high quality kretek clove cigarettes. Gudang Garam products can be found in many varieties, ranging from SKL (Sigaret Kretek Klobot) or corn husk-wrapped clove cigarettes, SKT (Sigaret Kretek Linting Tangan) or hand-rolled clove cigarettes, up to SKM (Sigaret Kretek Linting Mesin) or machine-rolled clove cigarettes. For the true clove cigarettes lovers, we are committed to provide an outstanding experience in enjoying kretek clove cigarettes made from high-quality materials.

Gudang Garam provides lifehoods for a workforce of 35,272 at the end of 2017, engaged in  cigarette manufacturing, marketing, & distribution. 
In addition to its production facilities, the Company is represented by a total of 67 area offices with 281 points of distribution located throughout Indonesia and services its markets with a sales fleet of over 7,000 vehicles.    
Employee walfare is a priority, from paper safety practices and health facilities to training in leadership, management, clerical and technical skills through a mixture of internal and external courses.

Gudang Garam contributes indirectly to the lives of about 4 million people comprising tobacco and clove farmers, retailers and hawkers across the archipelago. The cigarette industry, in which Gudang Garam is a leading player, is a major source of revenue for the Government in excise duty.

Name: Japan Tobacco Inc. (JT)
Description:
Japan Tobacco Inc. is a global company with products available in over 130 markets. We operate mainly in the tobacco and processed food businesses with approximately 54,000 employees and 61 factories worldwide as of 2024 yearend. Under the 4S model, we strive to fulfill our responsibilities to our valued consumers, shareholders, employees and the wider society. By pursuing the 4S model, we aim to achieve sustainable profit growth over the medium and long term. To realize the JT Group Purpose of “Fulfilling Moments, Enriching Life”, we will work to maximize the value of the company. D-LAB, our corporate R&D organization, is further supporting the realization of the JT Group Purpose, by exploring long-term growth opportunities.
Our tobacco business manufactures and sells renowned brands in combustibles including Winston, Camel, MEVIUS and LD. As a leading and responsible company, we are committed to investing in reduced-risk products (RRP) that have the potential to reduce the risks associated with smoking. These products are sold under dedicated brands, such as Ploom (heated tobacco products), Logic (E-vapor), Nordic Spirit (nicotine pouches), and WITH (infused tobacco products).
Our processed food business focuses on frozen and ambient food, mainly frozen noodles, frozen okonomiyaki (Japanese savory pancakes) and packaged cooked rice, as well as seasonings, including yeast extracts. 
Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan Tobacco Inc. is listed on the primary section of the Tokyo Stock Exchange (ticker: 2914.T) and is the recipient of several global awards and recognitions, including CDP, S&P/JPX Carbon Efficient Index, FTSE Blossom Japan Indices.

Name: PT. SURYA MADISTRINDO
Description:
Didirikan pada tahun 2002, PT Surya Madistrindo (SM) adalah perusahaan yang dimiliki oleh PT Gudang Garam Tbk untuk menjalankan distribusi produk-produk sigaret Gudang Garam bersama dengan 3 perusahaan distribusi lainnya. Di tahun 2009, SM ditunjuk sebagai distributor tunggal yang memegang kendali strategi distribusi dan field marketing untuk seluruh wilayah Indonesia.

SM telah tumbuh dan bertransformasi menjadi perusahaan distribusi rokok yang profesional dan modern. Berawal dari beberapa ribu karyawan, kini SM telah didukung oleh sumber daya manusia mencapai lebih dari 14 ribu orang yang tersebar pada 12 kantor perwakilan regional dan lebih dari 180 kantor perwakilan area di Indonesia.

Filosofi : CATUR DHARMA
1. Kehidupan yang bermakna dan berfaedah bagi masyarakat luas merupakan suatu kebahagiaan
2. Kerja keras, ulet, jujur, sehat, dan beriman adalah prasyarat kesuksesan
3. Kesuksesan tidak dapat terlepas dari peranan dan kerja sama dengan orang lain
4. Karyawan adalah mitra yang utama

Visi :
Mengembangkan sumber daya manusia yang baik agar bermanfaat bagi masyarakat

Misi :
Kami adalah organisasi pembelajaran
Kami organisasi modern dan professional yang menjunjung tinggi norma-norma sosial

Name: Papastratos S.A.
Description:
Welcome to Papastratos, an affiliate of Philip Morris International Inc (PMI).

We are the leading Greek tobacco company since 1931. We are a group of talented people, working with top international and local brands (such as Marlboro, IQOS and the historic Greek brand ASSOS), sharing a unique corporate culture & state-of-the-art know-how.  The attribution of the international experience of PMI as well as our long and proud history complete the exceptional environment of Papastratos.

Since 2003, we have invested more than €700 million in infrastructure at our factory in Aspropyrgos following a new investment in our factory transformation, of €300 million during 2017, our people and brands, important social contributions, and the fight against the illicit trade in cigarettes. These investments have ensured our dynamic business growth, boosted our competitiveness, and provided our employees with opportunities for further career development. We are contributing to the Greek society and the country. Our corporate social responsibility program, representing an expenditure of more than €2 million through the period 2009-2016, aims to provide vulnerable social groups with relief from the economic crisis. Papastratos has implemented programs in collaboration with various NGOs.

Name: PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk
Description:
WISMILAK is an Indonesian cigarette company rooted in Surabaya since 1962. Our journey began with PT Gelora Djaja, founded in 1962 in Petemon, Surabaya, as a hand-rolled kretek manufacturer by Wismilak’s founders: Lie Koen Lie, Tjio Ing Hien, Tjioe Ing Hwa, and Oei Bian Hok.

PT Gelora Djaja started its first factory in a house on Jl. Petemon Barat, Surabaya, with 10 employees. The dining room of Lie Koen Lie’s residence on Jl. Ngaglik, Surabaya, served as an early space to refine a distinctive kretek formula.

Our first product was the GALAN brand of kretek, followed by Wismilak Kretek Special in 1963.

- In 1983, Wismilak established PT Gawih Jaya to strengthen distribution.
- In 1988, Wismilak expanded into machine-rolled cigarettes and launched Wismilak Diplomat in 1989.
- In 1994, Wismilak established PT Wismilak Inti Makmur as the holding company.
- In 1998, we moved our head office to Jl. Dr. Soetomo 27, Surabaya, later known as GRHA Wismilak.
- In 1999, Wismilak entered the cigar segment with Wismilak Premium Cigar Robusto.
- In 2006, PT Wismilak Inti Makmur began producing cigarette filters for commercial use.

In 2012, we entered a new phase by completing an initial public offering on the Indonesia Stock Exchange.

As of the end of 2025, PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk continues to grow as the parent company of PT Gelora Djaja (manufacturer) and PT Gawih Jaya (distributor). Our network includes 4 production facilities, 4 regional logistics centers, 23 distribution areas, 2 stock points, and 26 agents across Indonesia’s major islands.

Name: Al Fakher
Description:
Founded in the United Arab Emirates, Al Fakher has been passionate about shisha since 1999. 

Our molasses are made from the finest tobaccos and are infused with exquisite European flavor infusions to create a rich, unrivaled, full smoking experience for our shisha enthusiasts 

We are proud of our Middle Eastern heritage and our place in the growing shisha community around the globe. For us, smoking shisha is about taking the time to slow down and appreciate life. It is a time where cultures meet and when people from all walks of life come together. Pausing for thought and contemplation, taking the opportunity to reveal the deeper connections in life - links between problems and solutions, ties between friends and strangers, bridges between generations.

Name: PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk
Description:
Wismilak is an Indonesian cigarette company which was established in Surabaya in 1962. In 2012, Wismilak successfully executed an Initial Public Offering of its shares which changed its status intoa Public Company and its name into PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk.

PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk is the parent company of PT Gelora Djaja (producer) and PT Gawih Jaya (distributor), which, at the end of 2017, has 5 Production Facilities, 4 Regional Logistic Centers, 19 Distribution Area, 2 Stock Points and 30 agents spread all across Indonesia.

Name: PT Korea Tomorrow & Global TSPM
Description:
KT&G's history in Korea dates back to 1899, when the Imperial Household formed a monopoly bureau to control sources of tax revenues. In December 1948, a bereau was established by the Korean government to monopolize all tobacco and ginseng products.
 
In 1988, KT&G was perfomed to a government-run public corporation. In 2002, following the abolishment of the tobacco monopoly law, KT&G was transformed into a public corporation in an effort to liberalize tobacco importing, selling and manufacturing.
 
Since market liberalization, KT&G has been competing with domestic and foreign tobacco manufacturers, and today KT&G holds more than 60% of the total domestic market. This in turn provides a strong basis for other businesses.
 
KT&G is also obtaining remrkable results in the overseas market. Since first exportiing ESSE to Middle Eastern countries in 1996, both the volume and number of brands, along with number of target markets have steadily grown. KT&G mainly exports its products to  the Middle East and CIS countries, including Russia, and is currently widening its markets in Southeast Asia, America and Eastern Europe.
 
Direct investment for building manufacturing facilities has alaso been made in countries such as Turkey, Russia (to be established in 2010) and Iran. Main brand ESSE is becoming popular in Middle East and East European markets, while other brands including PINE and Zest are also gaining popularity.

Name: PT Nojorono Tobacco International
Description:
PT Nojorono Tobacco International merupakan salah satu perusahaan pelopor rokok kretek di Indonesia yang diinisiasi oleh Bapak Tjoa Kang Hay yang menunjuk kedua menantunya yakni Bapak Ko Djee Siong dan Bapak Tan Djing Thay. Seiring dengan perkembangan bisnis yang maju, kemudian perusahaan dikukuhkan pada 14 Oktober 1932 dan berpusat di Kota Kudus, Jawa Tengah. Saat ini, Nojorono Kudus menduduki posisi kelima dalam kategori industri sigaret terbesar di Indonesia.

PT Nojorono Tobacco International dikenal sebagai pemilik merek dagang Minak Djinggo yang diluncurkan tahun 1932. Minak Djinggo merupakan pelopor inovasi Sigaret Kretek Tangan (SKT). Minak Djinggo bertahan di industri SKT hingga saat ini, cukup dikenal di kalangan petani dan nelayan. Terobosan berikut dari perusahaan adalah diluncurkannya Clas Mild, produk LTLN (Low Tar Low Nicotine) di tahun 2003. Dalam kurun waktu dua setengah tahun, Clas Mild mengukuhkan diri sebagai produk kretek filter rendah tar dan nikorin (Low Tar Low Nicotine – LTLN) yang disukai konsumen hingga berhasil menjadi produk kretek filter terbaik di Indonesia.

Memiliki visi untuk menjadi salah satu perusahaan yang "Best Managed" di industri yang bertanggung jawab sosial dan kesadaran pada lingkungan, Nojorono Kudus terus konsisten menciptakan nilai bagi seluruh pemangku kepentingan (stakeholders) melalui pertumbuhan dan profitabilitas yang berkelanjutan dalam ikatan kekeluargaan yang erat dan bermartabat.

Name: YSQ International
Description:
YSQ International Pte Ltd was incorporated in 2009 and commenced operations in Singapore with a core business focused in:

•	Technological Investment
•	Financial Services
•	Merger & Acquisition
•	Asset Management
•	Intellectual Property
•	Wholesale & Distribution of Tobacco-related products

Since then, we have been committed to evolving into a multi-million, multinational company, creating more than ripples in the industry pond, by focusing on continual growth. Our obsession with delivering only the best stems from the demands of modern society, and through the years, we have evolved from a humble, self-run company to a multinational corporation with more than 1,500 global employees in our offices located around the world, as we continue to evolve and exceed expectations.

YSQ International is committed to continually providing the highest standards in quality and innovation in all it does. We are always looking for partnerships to expand on our products & services, so should you be interested in building a business partnership with us, we’d love to hear from you.


Join Our Team

YSQ International is a company which firmly believes we’re only as strong as our people. As such, we’re always open to developing and retaining talented candidates with potential to bring us to newer heights, whilst giving them the opportunity to grow as professionals with us.

We welcome like-minded individuals to join our diverse team, and offer career advancements along with an attractive remuneration package to ideal candidates.

We are always on the lookout, so feel free to contact us with your resume and we’ll be in contact!

Name: Trans Business For Trading & Distribution
Description:
Trans Business for Trading and Distribution was established in 2014 under the umbrella of Rashideen International; headquartered in the UAE.

TBTD is currently the sole distributor for PMI's tobacco products in the Arab Republic of Egypt.

With 700+ employees across 20 locations, we are looking at end-to-end manufacturing, trading and distribution operations and their support functions for the leading brand's operations nationwide. 

We are constantly on the lookout to attract and onboard high-potential talents to become part of our success story!

Name: Scandinavian Tobacco Group
Description:
For 275 years, Scandinavian Tobacco Group has been maker of rituals. We have honed our craft to make premium tobacco products and experiences to our consumers embedded by textures, flavours and aromas. With our portfolio of industry leading brands, we deliver consumer experiences that really make a difference.

With a portfolio of around 200 leading brands that are being sold across the globe, we believe we have what it takes to become the undisputed and sustainable global leader in cigars. 

The Group, headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, has a total of around 10,000 employees worldwide and are represented in Europe, North America, Central America and Asia. Scandinavian Tobacco Group is listed on NASDAQ OMX and in 2024 posted net sales of DKK 9.2 billion.

Building a growing business in a highly regulated industry takes people who have courage and dare to light the forward and raise the standards for everything we do. Passion is what sets us apart - we believe in holding ourselves accountable to high expectations, because we know we can achieve them.

When we combine our perspectives and work together to deliver results, strive for simplicity, and beat our competition, we become part of something bigger than ourselves – a winning team that has what it takes to go the distance. We want to attract the most talented people, who will take pride in our unique history, strong brands and the craftsmanship behind our products.

We're always on the lookout for great people, so if you think you have what it takes to work for Scandinavian Tobacco Group we'd like to hear from you.

Name: AIR (Advanced Inhalation Rituals)
Description:
Launched in 1999 and headquartered in Dubai, AIR is the global innovation leader in Social Inhalation with a multinational presence in over 90 markets across the world. 

Its portfolio of companies includes Al Fakher, the world’s leading shisha brand; Hookah.com, the world’s number one e-commerce platform for hookahs and shisha; and OOKA, the world’s first charcoal-free shisha device, among others. 

AIR’s science program, conducted in partnership with independent accredited laboratories, enables the development of innovative products that combine centuries of tradition with cutting-edge technology to minimize harm and maximize enjoyment for millions around the world.

Name: Adam International FZCO
Description:
Established in 2000 in Dubai, Adam General Trading LLC is a trading company that continuously provides distribution excellence in the Tobacco Industry through outstanding quality and exclusive products.
Backed by a team of hard-working professionals with international experience in the industry, we set out to develop and distribute cigarette products while maintaining the highest quality and evolving along with the times. With a wide spectrum of international brands featured in our collection, we strive to maintain healthy professional relationships with our partners and associates on a domestic and international scale through sound investments and a transparent policy.
Originally launched in the Middle East, Adam General Trading LLC has already expanded its reach towards Africa, the Far East and Oceania. Today, we continue to gear our resources and knowledge towards providing excellent service to our clients and achieving complete customer satisfaction.
Manchester Cigarettes is a brand focused on creating quality products that our customers around the world can enjoy. As one of the top cigarette companies in the world, we produce international quality tobacco products that offer a soothing taste and a smooth experience and is unique to each product in our brand.

Name: Swedish Match
Description:
Swedish Match develops, manufactures, and sells quality products with market leading brands in the product segments Smoke-free, Cigars, and Lights. We are dedicated to the improvement of public health by actively delivering a smoke-free future.

We have over 7,500 employees, of whom 40 percent are women, with the largest number of employees in the Dominican Republic, the U.S., and Sweden followed by Brazil, the Philippines, and the Netherlands.

Some of Swedish Match’s brands include: ZYN (nicotine pouches), General (snus), Longhorn (moist snuff), Onico (pouch products with neither tobacco nor nicotine), Thunder (chew bags), Oliver Twist (tobacco bits), Fiat Lux (matches), and Cricket (lighters).

Production is located in seven countries, with sales concentrated in the Nordics and the U.S. The Swedish Match head office is located in Stockholm, Sweden. 

For career-related information, please visit the Careers section on http://www.swedishmatch.com/en/Career/. 

For commercial roles within the Nordic region, please visit our international career portal: https://www.pmi.com/careers/overview

This account serves our Swedish Match parent company with the purpose of also describing activities in our Nordic markets. For information related to the U.S. affiliate, please see their page at https://www.linkedin.com/company/swedishmatchnorthamerica/

For more information, please visit us at www.swedishmatch.com.

Name: Afrah Tobacco and Cigarettes Factory
Description:
We are Afrah Tobacco & Cigarettes Co, based in Ras Al Khaimah - UAE, and our main business is Cigarettes and  Shisha Tobacco (Mua’asil) Manufacturing and Trade. 

We produce highly quality brands of Shisha Tobacco under several brand names that are famous in some African and USA markets.
Location: Ras Al Khaimah, Ras Al Khaimah

Name: Universal Leaf Tobacco Company
Description: Universal is headquartered in Richmond, Virginia, and is the leading global leaf tobacco supplier. Tobacco sourcing and processing has been the Company’s principal focus since its founding in 1918. The largest portion of the Company’s business involves procuring and processing flue-cured, burley, and dark air-cured leaf tobacco for manufacturers of consumer tobacco products. Today, we are a global business-to-business agri-products supplier to consumer product manufacturers, that sources and processes leaf tobacco and plant-based ingredients. Through our plant-based ingredients platform, we provide a variety of value-added manufacturing processes to produce high-quality, specialty vegetable- and fruit-based ingredients as well as botanical extracts and flavorings for human and pet food end markets. Universal conducts business in more than 30 countries on five continents and employs over 25,000 permanent and seasonal workers. Domestically, Universal employs over 1,000 permanent and seasonal workers, and its revenues ending March 31, 2022, were slightly over $2.1 billion.

Name: Karelia Tobacco Company, Inc.
Description:
Greece's largest cigarette manufacturer and exporter. Established in 1888. Listed in the Athens Stock Exchange. 

Meets the challenges of world markets with more than a century of exerience and a reputation of fine quality of tobacco products.

Karelia brands are present in 65 international markets and most prestigious Duty Free outlets.

Brands : George Karelias and Sons • Karelia Slims  • Ome • Karelia Royal • Karelia • American Legend • Leader • Karelia Filter • Rex •

Name: PT. Alcotraindo Batam
Description:
PT. Alcotraindo Batam located in Citra Buana Industrial Park Phase III Lot 12A-12C Batam Centre, Batam, Riau Island - Indonesia.
We are Tobacco Manufacturing especially in White Cigarettes with market share of more than 10 countries worldwide. we produce cigarettes starting form raw material till the finished good (Cigarettes)
We work with the lates technology in form of  machine for primary process, Cigarettes maker and packer machine.
Our mission to become a leading Tobacco player in International. In order to achieve this goal, the company is committed and has the same view for all employees in the organization:
•	Passion for Winning 
•	Innovation through learning and entrepreneurship 
•	Winning trust internally and externally 
•	Global mindset 
•	Socially responsible corporate citizen 
The company realizes that product quality and management are the main keys in the company's long-term sustainability, so the company establishes a quality policy as follows:
•	Timely Delivery of Quality Products at a Competitive Price.
•	Producing High Quality Products / Services to Meet Customer Requirements Consistently. 
•	Total Employee Engagement with Trust in Each Other in Realizing a Good and Healthy Internal Business Process, and 
•	Continuous Improvement to Improve the Effectiveness of the Quality Management System and the Organizations Competitiveness. 
The company is always moving forward, making continuous improvements in all its processes, effectiveness and efficiency, dynamic and open organization, involving all parties in every activity and improvement, equality and equal opportunity based on work professionalism, complying with the code of ethics that has been set by the company and agreed upon by all employees and the company is subject to global or local regulations where the company is located

Name: Tabaqueira
Description: Construir um futuro livre de fumo. Este é o nosso propósito e o desafio que abraçamos desde 2016. Estamos, para isso, a transformar a nossa própria atividade, no sentido de disponibilizar melhores alternativas e produtos, sem fumo, baseadas em evidência científica e de potencial menor nocividade que o consumo de cigarros, exclusivamente para fumadores adultos que, de outra forma, continuariam a fumar. Sendo pioneiros e líderes desta mudança de paradigma da indústria, na Tabaqueira, subsidiária da Philip Morris International (PMI) desde 1997, investimos em tecnologia, ciência e inovação, com foco no consumidor, para garantirmos a necessária transformação. Isto a par de um profundo compromisso com o bem-estar das nossas pessoas, a proteção do clima e a preservação da natureza, colocando a sustentabilidade no centro do nosso negócio. Fundada em 1927, a Tabaqueira é hoje a maior empresa do setor no País e, atualmente, um dos principais centros de produção do Grupo, além de sede de Centros de Excelência da PMI, como o Leaf, que apoia as boas práticas agrícolas na Europa, Médio-Oriente e África, ou o Platform Engineering Hub. Localizada em Sintra, emprega cerca de 1.500 trabalhadores. O Grupo Tabaqueira/PMI exporta 87% da sua produção, afirmando-se como um dos maiores exportadores nacionais. Nesta página de LinkedIn, comunicamos os nossos valores, não promovemos produtos. Estamos em transformação, rumo a um futuro melhor, sem fumo.

Name: PanAfrican Tobacco Group
Description: PTG is an African company committed to creating a more prosperous Africa. That is why the core of our business is there: we market our products in more than half of Africa’s 54 nations — almost all of sub-Saharan Africa — and employ thousands of hard-working individuals across our continent. We are working toward a better future for Africa.

Name: KT&G
Description:
- Manufacturing and distribution of tobacco products.
- Manufacturing and distribution of red ginseng, red ginseng products, and other health foods.
- Manufacturing and distribution of food and beverage products.
- Development, manufacturing and distribution of drugs, bio tech drugs,non pharmaceutical health complements, medical goods, medical equipment, and other related products. 
- Manufacturing and distribution of tobacco products related materials.
- Trading
- Real Estate, rental, and housing development business
- Tobacco crop cultivation support
- business related to governmental-commissioned testing, inspection, verification, and standardization. 
- Development, production and selling of tobacco and ginseng plant seeds
- Business related to intellectual property management and licensing o brands,trademarks, and production technologies.
- Research activities related to those mentioned above.

Name: Altadis
Description:
Altadis forma parte del grupo Imperial Brands PLC, una multinacional del sector tabaco presente en 160 países con más de 32.000 empleados incluida en el FTSE 100 y que está integrada por cuatro entidades distintas: Imperial Tobacco, ITG Brands, Fontem Ventures y Logista.

El principal activo de Altadis y el grupo al que pertenece, son las personas que forman sus equipos, y por eso está firmemente comprometida con su desarrollo personal y profesional. Ese compromiso, su dimensión internacional y la forma en que incentiva y premia la iniciativa personal, convierten a Altadis en una compañía única en que desarrollar una carrera profesional. Precisamente por su capacidad de atraer y retener talento, tanto Altadis como Imperial Brands, han sido reconocidas en sucesivas ediciones como empresas Top Employer.

Name: Cigars International
Description:
Cigars International is an online- and catalogue based retailer of cigars owned by Scandinavian Tobacco Group A/S. We have a portfolio of more than 90 brands, and sell an extensive range of handmade cigars directly to 885,000 US consumers.
Established in 1996, Cigars International has become the fastest growing retailer, and today we are an industry leader in online and direct marketing of premium to value segmented handmade cigars and tobacco accessories.
Headquartered in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, we are comprised of over 450 cigar enthusiasts and we are growing each day. We have a leading position in the US, and we own and operate retail stores in Pennsylvania, Texas and Florida. We distribute 19 million catalogs on an annual basis and have more than 90 leading brands in our portfolio. 

We have a genuine passion for cigars and every employee is dedicated to deliver the very best in quality, price, variety, service and overall experience to our valued consumers. With job opportunities in our popular retail stores, Call Center, Distribution Center and Headquarters we offer a wide range of interesting career paths. Working for us, you will be part of a rewarding, challenging, creative and fast-paced work environment. 
We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.
We are always on the lookout for talented people who know how to sell a good cigar, so if you think you have what it takes to work for Cigars International we’d like to hear from you.

Name: Paris Tobacco Company
Description:
Paris Tobacco is a new, fast growing European Company with commercial centre in Warsaw, Poland, and the modern factory in Skrzyńsko, next to Radom, where production and R&D are located. We are a part of  the YSQ International, a Singapore Group with a diverse portfolio. 

We are an international Group with a comprehensive range of quality brands catering to diverse consumer segments.

We aim to bring our technology proficiency to new heights, with strengthened business insights and tobacco experience in the industry.

We work on a win-win philosophy and aim to maximize benefits & returns to our Business Partners and Stakeholders.

Name: Imperial Tobacco La Romana
Description:
Somos una subsidiaria de la multinacional Imperial Brands PLC, que tiene sus oficinas centrales en Bristol, Inglaterra. 

Nuestra fábrica, con una herencia de 53 años de existencia, está ubicada en la provincia de La Romana, en donde nuestros cerca de 3,000 colaboradores se centran ahora en fabricar exclusivamente cigarros hechos a máquina para exportar a los mercados internacionales, principalmente a Estados Unidos.

Six generations and 170 years on, the enjoyment of fine things continues to drive our family business, as we seek to turn an age-old natural product into consummate moments of pleasure for our 21st century customers.

Both patience and innovation have carried us through the better part of two centuries and helped turn Landewyck into a successful family business. While still firmly rooted in the Grand-Duchy, at the very heart of Europe, our brands are now sold in over 40 markets internationally with the help of our six European subsidiaries.

What used to be Jean-Pierre and Joséphine running a small shop has grown into a company of over a thousand employees – but remains, first and foremost, a family business. As a non-listed company, we live not for our next quarterly report, but for our brands, our customers, and our employees.

Name: TABACALERA USA Inc.
Description:
Deep Roots:
In 1636, the company that would become Tabacalera Company, and from which today’s Tabacalera USA gets its name, was launched in Spain. From these almost 400 year old  roots, Tabacalera USA unites the essence of history, farming, manufacturing and marketing excellence --  reflecting the very best of tradition and expertise as the oldest tobacco company in the world.

Manufacturing Milestone:
1758 - A major milestone for the Tabacalera Company. During this year, the company opened doors to its first factory: The Royal Factory of Sevilla. At the time, the factory was the second largest building in Spain, only surpassed in size by a royal residence.

Tobacco Monopolies
1887- Before Tabacalera S.A. was formed, the company was crowned Compañía Arrendataria de Tabacos, a publicly traded Spanish tobacco monopoly.

The Future :
1945 - Compañía Arrendataria de Tabacos controlled the tobacco monopoly in Spain for years, through the Spanish Civil War, and through to the early 1940s. In 1945, in response to new laws, the limited company, Tabacalera Sociedad Anonima, was formed. Tabacalera S.A. paved the way for the future structure and success of the company.

Altadis Is Born:
2000 - Tabacalera S.A. and French tobacco company, Seita, merged to form a new company: Altadis. Altadis was set to be the biggest tobacco company in Europe. The merger created a new tobacco firm, big enough to compete with the industry's toughest rivals of the day.

Premium Cigar Market 2013:
Imperial Tobacco Group, after acquiring Altadis in 2008, restored the name Tabacalera to its Premium Cigar Division, maintaining Tabacalera a  top leader in the premium cigar market and staying true to its roots.

Tabacalera Today :
In 2015, Tabacalera USA was formed. The company oversees the premium cigar businesses in the United States, which is the world's largest premium cigar market.  Tabacalera USA’s business units include Altadis U.S.A.,  JR Cigar,  and Casa de Montecristo.

Name: The Vapeorium
Description:
The Vapeorium is a boutique e-cigarette and vapor store in Jakarta, Indonesia. Created with the simple aim of helping people to Quit Smoking and start vaping.

An e-cigarette is a device that was created as an alternative to traditional tobacco smoking. It’s alternatively known by several names including an electronic cigarette, a smokeless cigarette, an e-smoke, e-cigarette and an e-cig. It’s a device that delivers nicotine to the user, without the use of tobacco, or open flames.

Through the use of a vaporizer (a battery and atomizer), the liquid flavoring is vaporization into a water based vapor that feels like smoking but without the unpleasant smell of tobacco smoke. This is why smoking an e-cig is often referred to as “vaping”. The vapor is nearly odorless and does not linger in the air or on clothes. Today, savvy consumers understand the benefits of vaping, especially those who have spent years smoking traditional cigarettes.

E-liquids generally only have 4 main chemical compounds: Propylene glycol, Vegetable Glycerin, liquid nicotine & various flavorings. compared to the average 7000+ identifiable compounds in cigarettes.

Name: Real Tabacalera de Santiago
Description:
REAL TABACALERA de Santiago es una empresa emergente con sede en La Banda, en la provincia de Santiago del Estero, Argentina. Con una visión clara y un compromiso firme, esta compañía se ha propuesto transformar y revitalizar la industria tabacalera en la región. Santiago del Estero, conocida por sus vastas tierras y condiciones climáticas ideales para el cultivo de tabaco, encuentra en REAL TABACALERA de Santiago un aliado estratégico para potenciar su economía local.

La misión de REAL TABACALERA de Santiago es simple pero ambiciosa: diseñar, desarrollar y producir productos de alta calidad relacionados con el tabaco. Aunque la empresa no se dedica al cultivo del tabaco, selecciona cuidadosamente las mejores hojas de tabaco de proveedores de confianza para crear productos innovadores y atractivos para el mercado. Cada etapa del proceso de producción es supervisada con rigor para garantizar que los productos cumplan con los más altos estándares de calidad.

Además de su enfoque en la calidad, REAL TABACALERA de Santiago se compromete a impulsar el desarrollo económico de la provincia. La empresa no solo genera empleo directo a través de sus operaciones, sino que también fomenta la creación de empleo indirecto al trabajar en colaboración con agricultores locales, proveedores y otros actores de la cadena productiva. Esta sinergia contribuye a la prosperidad de la comunidad, mejorando las condiciones de vida de muchas familias en la región.

REAL TABACALERA de Santiago no solo se centra en la producción, sino que también invierte en investigación y desarrollo para innovar en el mercado tabacalero. Con un equipo de expertos en agronomía, tecnología y marketing, la empresa está preparada para enfrentar los desafíos de un mercado en constante evolución y satisfacer las demandas de los consumidores más exigentes.

Description:
Tổng công ty Khánh Việt (Khatoco) là doanh nghiệp nhà nước thuộc tỉnh Khánh Hòa, thành lập ngày 04/10/1983. Từ xuất phát điểm là một công ty kinh doanh thuốc lá, qua 37 năm xây dựng và phát triển, đến nay Khatoco trở thành doanh nghiệp trong Top 200 doanh nghiệp lớn nhất Việt Nam. Khatoco hoạt động theo mô hình Công ty mẹ - công ty con với 22 đơn vị thành viên, hoạt động trên các lĩnh vực: Công nghiệp thuốc lá, dịch vụ du lịch, công nghiệp may - thời trang, công nghiệp in - bao bì, công nghiệp chăn nuôi - thuộc da, kinh doanh hạ tầng cụm công nghiệp và bất động sản.
Bên cạnh nhiệm vụ sản xuất kinh doanh, giải quyết việc làm và đảm bảo đời sống cho trên 4 ngàn lao động, Khatoco thể hiện trách nhiệm xã hội của mình không chỉ bằng các hoạt động từ thiện, đền ơn đáp nghĩa, xóa đói giảm nghèo tại địa phương và trên phạm vi cả nước, mà còn thể hiện ở các hoạt động khuyến học, khuyến tài như chương trình trao học bổng, xây nhà trẻ, xây trường học…Khatoco coi những đóng góp, sẻ chia cho lợi ích chung của cộng đồng là sự hưng thịnh và phát triển bền vững cho chính mình.

Name: Menendez Amerino
Description:
Empresa nacional, familiar, que reúne qualidade e tradição na confecção de charutos e cigarrilhas. Os charutos são confeccionados manualmente com o padrão que reúne duas  grandes tradições: a tradição baiana e a tradição  cubana  cuja manufatura e conhecimento  secular encanta e dá qualidade aos processos  de fermentação das folhas de fumo, bem como no controle de temperatura e umidade, aspectos essenciais para a qualidade dos produtos.
 
A empresa controla todos os estágios da produção, do plantio à fabricação das caixas de madeira que acondiciona a preciosidade dos seus produtos. O fumo exclusivamente brasileiro, está no nível dos melhores charutos do mundo. A empresa detém a liderança do mercado nacional e exporta para diversos países, como: Argentina, Chile, Aruba, Canadá, Austrália, Japão, Alemanha, Suécia, Dubai e Rússia. 
 
Em 4 décadas de existência dedicados ao aprimoramento da matéria-prima e à excelência na produção de charutos e cigarrilhas, conquistamos o título de maior e mais importante fabricante de charutos premiums da América do Sul. Os lançamentos apresentados nas edições do Festival Origens reflete a expertise, a tradição  e qualidade sensorial dos nosso produtos  no Brasil e no mundo.

Name: The Kind Pen
Description:
The Kind Pen Is a stylish, portable electronic dry-herb vaporizer pen. This pen is convenient and sleek, it also includes the oil/wax atomizer that can be use to vaporize thick wax and essential oils. 

Designed by The Kind Group LLC. The Kind Pen is the ideal vaporizer for those who like to enjoy dry-herb, oil or wax. Simply remove the filter attachment to unveil the upright ceramic heating core element. Fill the dry hearb chamber with your favorite dry-herbs and vaporize. Or for oil or wax, use the included fill tool to fill the oil/wax atomizer and vaporize. The Kind Pen charges with-in two hours with the included USB charging kit. For added safety, The Kind Pen has a built in shut-off feature. By simply pressing the power button simultaneously 5 times, the unit shuts-off. Reverse the process to power back on.

Your Kind Pen Purchase Includes:

    1 – Lithium Ion Battery (650 mah)
    1 – Dry Herb Vaporizer Chamber
    1 – Oil/Wax Atomizer
    1 – Oil/Wax Fill Tool
    1 – Dry Herb Filter
    2 – Mouth Pieces
    1 – USB Charging Cable
    1 – Wall Adapter for USB Charger
    1 – Cleaning Kit / Packing Tool
    1 – User Manual
    30 Day Manufactures Warranty from The Kind Group LLC.

Name: TRL | Tütün Referans Laboratuvarı
Description:
TRL| Tütün Referans Laboratuvarı, verdiği tüm analiz hizmetlerini, bilim ve teknolojinin sunduğu imkanlardan faydalanarak ve bünyesindeki nitelikli uzmanların kontrolü altında arz etmektedir. Uluslararası geçerliliği olan analitik metotlar ile laboratuvarın kendi geliştirdiği ve valide ettiği “Kurum İçi” metotların kullanıldığı laboratuvarımızda; tarafsızlık, bağımsızlık, gizlilik ve güvenirlik ilkeleri verilen hizmetlerin ayrılmaz bir parçasıdır. “ISO/IEC 17025 Deney ve Kalibrasyon Laboratuvarlarının Yeterliliği için Genel Şartlar” standardı esas alınarak oluşturulan kalite yönetim sistemi ile sahip olunan tüm değerler korunmakta ve bu değerlerin sürdürülebilirliği sağlanmaktadır. Sektörün ihtiyacı olan tüm kalite kontrol analizlerinin uygulanması, analiz yöntemlerinin geliştirilmesi, bu alana özel uzmanların sektöre kazandırılması ve CORESTA (Cooperation Centre for Scientific Research Relative to Tobacco) ile iş birliği içinde olunması ana faaliyet konumuzun ayrılmaz bir parçasıdır. 

TRL| Tobacco Reference Laboratory offers all its analysis services by taking advantage of the opportunities provided by science and technology and under the control of its qualified experts. In our laboratory, internationally valid analytical methods and "In-house" methods developed and validated by the laboratory itself are used; The principles of impartiality, independence, confidentiality, and reliability are an integral part of the services provided. With the quality management system created based on the "ISO/IEC 17025 General Requirements for the Competence of Testing and Calibration Laboratories" standard, all values are protected and the sustainability of these values is ensured. Implementing all quality control analyses needed by the sector, developing analysis methods, recruiting experts in this field to the industry, and cooperating with CORESTA (Cooperation Center for Scientific Research Relative to Tobacco) is an integral part of our main field of activity.

Name: Laudisi Enterprises
Description:
Founded in 2000, Laudisi has grown from a small, online pipe retailer into a dynamic family of premium tobacco brands, driven by our unwavering commitment to excellence and authenticity. What began with Smokingpipes.com has evolved into a comprehensive enterprise encompassing manufacturing, distribution, and retail across the premium tobacco industry.

Today, our portfolio includes industry leaders Smokingpipes.com, Laudisi Distribution Group, Kapp & Peterson Pipes, Cornell & Diehl Pipe Tobacco Company, and our newest additions, Caldwell Cigar Company and Lost & Found Cigars. Each division maintains its distinct identity while sharing our core values of Passion, Intrepidity, Creativity, Idealism, and Wisdom.

What sets us apart is our vertically integrated approach—we handle everything in-house, from web development to photography, from customer service to warehousing. This dedication to creating and maintaining exceptional standards has established us as an industry leader in the premium tobacco space.

While we've grown significantly since our early days in South Carolina, we preserve the innovative spirit of a startup, constantly pushing boundaries and seeking new ways to improve. Our team combines deep industry expertise with a commitment to creating an environment where passion meets professionalism and tradition meets technology.

Join us as we continue to shape the future of the premium tobacco industry while honoring its rich heritage.

Name: Don Emmanuel
Description:
Don Emmanuel é empresário, músico, digital influencer e Master Cigar Sommelier formado pela IACS (International Association of Cigar Sommelier), título este que poucas pessoas possuem no mundo.

Antes de se tornar Master, Don Emmanuel se formou como International Cigar Sommelier pela IACS com a maior nota do mundo.

Em 2017 iniciou o blog “Don Emmanuel” no instagram, este blog, com tempo, também virou um site, DonEmmanuel.com, que acabou por se tornar um dos maiores sites de charutos em língua portuguesa, o conteúdo é muito vasto, como reviews, cobertura de eventos, matérias com novidades e muitas dicas sobre tudo que envolve o mundo dos charutos.

Colabora em publicações impressas como “Caruso Journal” e escreve mensalmente para a maior revista em espanhol do ramo, a mexicana “Latino Aficionado”.

Don Emmanuel também ministra eventos de charutos em todo o Brasil, onde aplica master classes e cria harmonizações extremamente interessantes. Nos dias atuais, percorre o país com o projeto Cigar.

Don Emmanuel é o embaixador oficial da IACS no Brasil, a maior associação de ensino sobre tabaco do mundo.

Também faz trabalho de assessoria e consultoria para novas marcas, lounges, tabacarias.

Curiosidade : Foi três vezes campeão do torneio de cinzas organizado pela “Caruso Lounge”.

Outra curiosidade, é que sua avó, foi torcedora da lendária fábrica de charutos “Suerdick”.

A História continua…

Name: CV Cempaka
Description:
CV Cempaka merupakan perusahaan swasta yang berdiri sejak tahun 1982 di Indonesia. Yang mana core bisnisnya adalah bisnis rokok. Dengan core bisnis pada bisnis rokok, CV Cempaka memiliki berbagai produk terkait dengan bisnis yang mereka geluti sekarang ini. CV Cempaka dan afiliasinya memproduksi, memasarkan dan mendistribusikan rokok di Indonesia, yang meliputi cempaka super long size, cempaka super, cempaka filter light, cempaka arum, dll.

Pada tanggal 1 April 1982 yaitu sejak dikeluarkan surat ijin usaha dengan dengan nomor : B 79/B2/HO/KDH/AA oleh pemerintahan Daerah Tingkat II Tulungagung, serta ijin produksi dari Bea Cukai nomor : 00481/F maka berdirilah perusahaan rokok dengan nama “PR Cempaka” di tulungagung dengan bentuk CV.
Seiring makin berkembangnya perusahaan, maka cempaka berusaha mendapatkan ijin usaha lain yaitu ijin tempat usaha berdasarkan undang-undang gangguan (HO) nomor 530.08/08/445.14/1985 yang disahkan oleh Bupati KDH Tingkat II Tulungagung. Sehingga berdirilah perusahaan rokok baru “Cempaka” pada tahun 1982.

Name: Swiss Tobacco Leaf
Description:
Nuestra empresa Swiss Tobacco Leaf, es un referente destacado en la venta de hojas de tabaco de alta calidad. Con sede en Republica Dominicana, nos enorgullece contar con una asociación estratégica con inversionistas suizos, quienes aportan su experiencia y respaldo financiero para nuestro crecimiento y éxito en la industria.
Nuestra dedicación al suministro de hojas de tabaco de primer nivel nos ha convertido en un proveedor confiable para fabricantes de cigarros y puros en todo el mundo. Trabajamos directamente con productores de tabaco en distintas regiones, seleccionando minuciosamente las variedades de tabaco y asegurándonos de que se cultivan bajo las condiciones ideales para lograr características excepcionales.
La calidad es nuestro sello distintivo. Nuestras hojas de tabaco son cultivadas en nuestras propias fincas donde son cuidadosamente cosechadas, secadas y fermentadas siguiendo rigurosos estándares de calidad, lo que garantiza la consistencia en sabor, aroma y combustión. Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con nuestros proveedores y clientes para adaptarnos a sus requisitos específicos y cumplir con los productos que superen sus expectativas.
Nuestro objetivo es llegar a ser lideres el mercado de hojas de tabaco, brindando a nuestros clientes productos de calidad excepcional y un servicio profesional y confiable. Nos enorgullece ser un referente en la industria y estamos comprometidos con la innovación continua y la búsqueda de nuevas oportunidades para crecer y expandir nuestro alcance global.
Nuestra pasión por el tabaco se combina con la excelencia en los negocios, estamos comprometidos con el éxito a largo plazo y la satisfacción de nuestros clientes, brindando hojas de tabaco excepcionales que cumplen con los más altos estándares de calidad en la industria

Name: eCig
Description:
eCig is the flagship brand of the Electronic Cigarette International Group (E.C.I.G), a global distributor of electronic cigarettes. We offer a full line of high-margin, value-priced electronic cigarettes and accessories.  We were established to provide the evolving market of smokeless tobacco products with a definitive and recognizable brand name. Our mission is to provide existing smokers with a cleaner, sustainable and more affordable alternative to smoking. By 2013, our goal is to have our line of eCigs sold alongside tobacco cigarettes in every retail location in the US. eCig has set the bar for safety, compliance and accountability.

Understanding the positive impact our product has on consumer’s lives is what drives us everyday. Maintaining an unprecedented standard of quality control by being fully engaged in the manufacturing process ensures that we remain the most reliable product on the market. By continually researching and developing new innovations keeps on the forefront of smokeless tobacco industry. 

Our founders have over 10 years of collective experience in the industry and have served hundreds-of-thousands of customers. Our core values are centered around service, reputation, passion and growth. As the eCig increases in popularity and the market continues to grow, eCig will remain the choice brand of electronic cigarettes.

Name: Tobacco Trading International
Description:
Member of PÖSCHL TOBACCO GROUP

The PÖSCHL TOBACCO GROUP is one of the leading manufacturers and distributors of tobacco products in Europe. Tradition, quality and a vision for the future has been our practice for over 112 years. We are a corporate group that thinks and acts globally with 15 subsidiaries and associated companies numbering about 800 employees worldwide, and export activities in 100 countries.

We are able to run the international tobacco trade effectively by means of joint strategic decisions and the right flair for new markets. In addition to the traditional export countries, such as France, Austria, the UK, Italy, Spain and Switzerland, Pöschl Tabak also has customers in countries such as the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Poland, Hungary, Romania, Bulgaria, Belgium, Luxembourg, as well as the Far East and the US. Branches of the company were established in export countries for direct sales support. Pöschl Tabak can avail itself of a global sales network today.

Name: Landewyck Tabacos España
Description:
El gusto por los placeres de la vida es lo que impulsó a Jean-Pierre Heintz a abrir su primera fábrica en 1847, junto con su esposa, Joséphine van Landewyck. Seis generaciones y casi 175 años después, el placer de hacer las cosas bien sigue siendo el motor de nuestra empresa familiar, ya que tratamos de convertir un producto natural ancestral en momentos de placer para nuestros clientes.

Tanto la paciencia como la innovación han dado lugar a lo largo de casi dos siglos a convertir a Landewyck en una empresa familiar de éxito. Nuestras marcas se venden ahora en más de 40 mercados internacionales con la ayuda de nuestras seis filiales europeas.

Este año cumplimos 13 años en España, donde contamos con un equipo completamente dedicado en todos nuestros campos. La innovación y la excelente atención al cliente nos han llevado a ser la empresa de tabacos con el crecimiento más rápido en los últimos 5 años.

Name: Tobacco Technology, Inc.
Description:
More than 150 years ago, we began our tobacco journey as tobacco farmers, eventually becoming a premier exporter of leaf tobacco in the USA. And for the last 50 years, we’ve been perfecting tobacco taste with a focus on flavor innovation. Today, we remain a family-owned and operated business. It’s in our DNA.

The TTI Difference -100% DEVOTED TO THE TOBACCO INDUSTRY

As a business partner, we focus on agility, innovation, and superior customer service. No other provider understands the industry the way we do, or has a perspective built on long heritage: reliable knowledge of the tobacco markets, customer preferences, competitive landscapes, changing regulations, and product evolution.

While other companies have diversified by experimenting with food and beverage flavoring, or dreaming up a new luxury perfume, TTI focuses on creating the next unique signature flavor for leading-edge tobacco providers, like you.

Name: Godioli & Bellanti S.p.A. - Industrial Processing Lines
Description:
Godioli & Bellanti has been the first Italian Manufacturer of processing lines for Tobacco. On the latest years we also offer our solutions for Food Processing, Medicinal Herbs, Hemp Processing and processing line as customised solutions.
Since 1923, we have been designing and manufacturing Tobacco Machines Worldwide.
We started mechanizing the Tobacco sector here, in our area, which is one of Italy's main FCV "Bright" tobacco-producing districts.
We manufacture all the machines for Leaf Processing and for Primary Dpt. suppling "turn-key" tobacco plants&machines.
We became very popular in the Tobacco World for our AutoPress complete with Packaging Line.
In any Country there is, at least, one of our Press.
And the in the 60' we became worldwide known for our Redryers and Threshing Lines.
In the 70', we began to manufacture Primary Machines and now we produce most of the machines and equipments for Primary Dpt and Mini Primary Dpt.
We have a Worldwide Execellent reputation.
We have supplied our Tobacco Machines in Europe, EAST Europe, MIDDLE EAST, AFRICA, NORTH, SOUTH, CENTRAL AMERICA, FAR EAST.
Since 20 year, we are one of the World leader Company for Re-conditioned Tobacco Machines & Plants.
We have the Best Reputation in the transfer of Complete Processing Line from a site to another, from a Country to another Country by bearing the complete responsibility of the project.
Godioli & Bellanti is improving his technology in Food, Medicinal Herbs, Hemp, Tea and Coffee Processing, Pharma, Sawdust and Wood chip Drying, Industry Scrap Drying, Biomass Drying, Renewable Resources R&D.

Name: YTOO | E-liquid Manufacturer
Description:
Founded in 2021, SHENZHEN YTOO BIOLOGY CO., LTD is a rapidly growing OEM/ODM leader in the e-liquid industry, specializing in research, development, production, and after-sales service of high-tech e-liquids. Our expert team—comprising PhDs and Masters in organic chemistry and pharmacy, senior perfumers, and dedicated professionals—delivers innovative, customized solutions to partners worldwide.

Our Expertise
R&D Innovation: Our highly qualified team crafts over 30,000 unique flavor formulations, tailored to market trends.
Production Excellence: Based in a 13,000㎡ Shenzhen facility, we operate a 2,800㎡ GMP-standard dust-free workshop with automated bottling lines, supported by CNAS-accredited labs and an eco-friendly sewage treatment system. Monthly capacity exceeds 500 tons of bulk and 10 million bottled units.

Global Reach
YTOO e-liquids are trusted and promoted in 30+ countries, including the UK, Vietnam, Europe, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Korea. As a preferred partner for global vape brands, we continue to expand our international footprint.

Why Choose YTOO?
We pride ourselves on uncompromising quality, cutting-edge innovation, and exceptional customer service—highlighted by our recent renewal of the Tobacco Monopoly Production License (valid until September 30, 2027). Contact us at info@ytoojuice.com or visit www.ytoojuice.com to explore our flavor catalog and collaboration opportunities.

Follow us for updates on our journey in e-liquid excellence!

Name: KOKEN INTERNATIONAL FZ LLC

Our Brands:

Global Presence:

Mission and Vision:
At KOKEN INTERNATIONAL FZ LLC, we're on a mission to offer smokers a safer and more enjoyable alternative to traditional cigarettes. Our commitment to innovation, coupled with a focus on customer satisfaction, drives us to redefine the smoking experience. We empower individuals to make informed choices about their tobacco habits while prioritizing their health and well-being.

Welcome to KOKEN INTERNATIONAL FZ LLC, where innovation meets satisfaction in the world of heat-not-burn technology.

Name: NTC Industries Limited
Description:
NTC Industries Ltd., originally known as National Tobacco Company, was founded in September 1931 in Kolkata, West Bengal. They are one of India's oldest cigarette manufacturers, with a reputation for expertise in Class 'A' packed cigarettes containing blends that adhere to the highest quality standards and technical specifications. To achieve this, they have established a dedicated state of the art production line and an equally sophisticated setup for processing the finest blends of tobacco. NTC is one of the few companies in India having a license to manufacture cigarettes and all tobacco products. 

Their long-standing traditional approach has left an indelible stamp on the tobacco industry's history. NTC was the first to manufacture and introduce Filter cigarettes; Mentholated cigarettes - 'Cool'; Hinge-Lid packs; and 100mm cigarettes in India. Our brands have won the highest international awards for excellence in quality in Brussels, Rotterdam, Amsterdam, Paris, London and Luxembourg.

Name: Joh. Wilh. von Eicken GmbH
Description:
Die Joh. Wilh. von Eicken GmbH gehört zu den führenden in Deutschland ansässigen Zigaretten- und Tabakwarenherstellern. An drei Produktionsstandorten in Deutschland - Lübeck, Dingelstädt und Rietz - werden Zigaretten, Zigarren, Feinschnitt und Pfeifentabak hergestellt. Damit ist die Joh. Wilh. von Eicken GmbH mit rund 950 Mitarbeiter*innen einer der letzten unabhängigen deutschen Familienbetriebe, der Zigaretten vom Rohtabak bis zum Endprodukt fertigt.

Das Unternehmen blickt auf über 250 Jahre Erfahrung in der Herstellung von Dreh- und Pfeifentabaken zurück und gehört zu den fünfzig ältesten, nach wie vor inhabergeführten Familienunternehmen Deutschlands, mittlerweile in der achten Generation. Mit Übernahme des Tabakhauses Dingelstädt erwarb die Joh. Wilh. von Eicken GmbH im Jahr 1992 erstmalig auch eine Manufaktur für Zigarren und Zigarillos. Seit 1998 werden zudem Zigaretten dank modernster Produktionsanlagen komplett in Eigenproduktion hergestellt. 

Auf den internationalen Märkten zählt von Eicken zur Spitzengruppe der konzernunabhängigen Zigaretten-Exporteure. Auch bei anderen Tabakspezialitäten wie Zigarren, Pfeifentabak und Feinschnitt gehört von Eicken als deutsches Traditionsunternehmen zu den führenden Herstellern. Die globale Ausrichtung des Unternehmens ermöglicht, dass die Marken in mehr als 100 Ländern vertrieben werden, sowohl über eigene Niederlassungen als auch über langjährige Vertriebspartner auf der ganzen Welt.

Im betriebseigenen nach DIN ISO 17025 akkreditierten Prüflabor werden täglich Rohtabake, Halbfertigwaren und fertig produzierte Zigaretten analysiert. Die Produktionsstandorte Lübeck und Dingelstädt sind zertifiziert nach IFS Food 7.0 und schon seit 2013 gehört von Eicken zu den ersten Tabakunternehmen, die in Deutschland den IFS Food Standard erreicht haben. Dieser Standard zählt zu den höchsten Qualitätssiegeln in der Nahrungs- und Genussmittelbranche in Deutschland. 

Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter: www.von-eicken.com

Name: Tutunski Kombinat AD Prilep (TKP)
Description:
For 150 years, since its establishment in 1873, TKP strive to create and bring to the market the best possible oriental tobacco and other tobacco products. Today it is producing oriental tobacco, cigarettes, and adhesives for various industrial usages.

Oriental tobacco is at the core of TKP operations since its establishment in 1873. Thanks to the unique soil characteristic and climate, combined with the dedication and production know-how of partner farmers and advanced agricultural practices, oriental tobacco from TKP is renowned for its high quality. After entering a strategic partnership in 2014, Philip Morris International became the most prominent buyer of TKP’s oriental tobacco.

Cigarettes production started in the 1950ties. In the 1960ties TKP build new cigarettes manufacturing facility on the outskirts of Prilep and over the years created a portfolio of iconic and award-winning brands. In 2014, TKP entered a strategic partnership with Philip Morris International, re-established itself as cigarettes manufacturing center and now manufactures iconic brands like Marlboro, Chesterfield, Filter Oriental, etc.

Adhesives production was the latest addition to TKP operations. Production started in the early 1990ties based on licensed technology. The current product portfolio includes adhesives for various usages in the paper industry and production of corrugated carton boxes, wood industry and labels adhesives for various materials like glass, PET, etc.

Name: U.S. Tobacco Cooperative Inc.
Description: U.S. Tobacco Cooperative (USTC) is a global supplier of premium U.S. flue cured tobacco.  Headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina, the Cooperative is owned by 500+ flue-cured tobacco farmers from Virginia, North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia and Florida.  With USTC, domestic and global customers can buy the finest, most compliant and sustainable flue-cured tobacco in the world.  As a full service leaf supplier, USTC owns its own processing plant in Timberlake, NC and leaf storage facility in Fuquay-Varina, NC.  In addition to its leaf business, USTC also owns ten consumer brands and operates 13 locations throughout the United States.

Name: Marie Group
Description:
Founded in 1955 by Mr. Talat Marie, Marie Group is a distinguished family-owned enterprise with a rich heritage and expertise in distribution, manufacturing, and commerce. Our group is composed of three subsidiaries, each thriving in its respective sector.

At the core of our operations is Talat Marie & Sons Co., a leading distribution company with exclusive rights to distribute international brands across Jordan. We’ve also broadened our scope to include manufacturing, reinforcing our commitment to quality and excellence.

Our subsidiary, Eastern Tombac and Tobacco Establishment, specializes in premium shisha tobacco and roll-your-own tobacco products, proudly producing iconic brands such as Al-Sultan, and Afandi. Another key entity, Eastern Tobacco and Tombac Co., focuses on cigarette manufacturing, with esteemed brands like Centro and Marseille.

Under the leadership of the Marie family, we blend tradition with innovation, upholding values of quality, integrity, and strategic growth. Marie Group remains a prominent force in the industry, committed to a legacy of excellence and continued success. Join us as we continue to build on our legacy and drive forward.

Name: Gesinta International Tobacco Company
Description:
Gesinta es un grupo empresarial consolidado líder en España que se dedica desde hace más de 25 años a la fabricación, importación, comercialización y distribución, formación y ventas de tabacos premium.

En 2015, la compañía crea La Casa del Tabaco (LCT) como distribuidora española para la importación de tabacos de diversas procedencias con el objetivo de ofrecer al consumidor un catálogo más amplio de marcas de reconocido prestigio que no estaban implantadas en el mercado español y necesitaban una fuerza comercial profesionalizada para su verdadera consolidación. 

En la sede central de La Casa del Tabaco, ubicada en la provincia de Valencia, contamos con unas instalaciones logísticas que incorporan la tecnología más avanzada para la preservación del tabaco, lo que garantiza óptimas condiciones y un excelente mantenimiento de todos los productos antes de ser distribuidos, además de tecnología de punta para Track & Trace para toda Europa.

Productos: Cigarros, cigarritos, picadura de pipa, tabaco de hookah, líquidos para vapeo y artículos para el fumador.

Marcas: En la actualidad, somos los distribuidores en exclusiva de las marcas Arturo Fuente, Oliva, EP Carrillo, My Father Cigars, Tatuaje, Perdomo, JC Newman, Quesada, Casa 1910, Condega, Umnum, Don José, Anonymous, Kraken, Raza, Karen Berger, Funari, Oveja Negra y Mala Vida. 

Dentro de los artículos para el fumador, La Casa del Tabaco distribuye marcas de referencia internacional como Boveda, S.T. Dupont y Zippo, entre otras.

Name: Hanchen Group
Viper Electronic Cigarettes
Description:
Viper Electronic Cigarettes is proud to represent an alternate means to enjoying a cigarette. The cigarettes we offer can be smoked virtually anywhere; in the office, the car, the restaurant or the bar. Viper Electronic Cigarettes provides you with that freedom. Our electronic cigarette is an extremely lightweight, 100% recyclable, liquid vaporizing inhaler. It comes in a range of flavors and varieties including, tobacco, menthol, and nicotine free. Each disposable e-cig from Viper is equivalent to 800 puffs or three packs of regular cigarettes.

We believe that electronic cigarettes are a safer medium and offer a more pleasurable smoking experience.Viper Electronic Cigarettes offers a large selection of disposable electronic cigarettes and ensures the quality of each of our products while offering a great value to the consumer by pre-pricing each electronic cigarette at only $6.99  Our goal is to give the consumer a great product that we believe is not only safer for the consumer, but also provides them with a greater savings on their tobacco purchases. This is why we have designed a soft-tip disposable electronic cigarette that offers a safer and realistic alternative to traditional tobacco products. We look forward to the future that electronic cigarettes have to offer in this ever changing world.

Name: LAGOM
Description:
The Essence of LAGOM
Lagom is the Swedish word meaning “just enough”.

In the Swedish-English dictionary defines Lagom as “adequate, enough, just enough”. Lagom is also commonly translated as “in moderation”, “in balance”, “perfect-simple” and “suitable.”

At Lagom, we are proud to offer a unique and innovative product that caters to the preferences of a diverse customer base. Whether you’re looking for white pouches with or without nicotine, our commitment to quality, choice and satisfaction ensures that Lagom is your brand.

Name: China National Tobacco Corporation
Description:
中国烟草行业实行统一领导、垂直管理、专卖专营的管理体制。国家烟草专卖局、中国烟草总公司对全国烟草行业“人、财、物、产、供、销、内、外、贸”进行集中统一管理。 

1981年5月，国务院决定对烟草实行国家专营；1982年成立中国烟草总公司；1983年国务院发布《烟草专卖条例》；1984年设立国家烟草专卖局，与中国烟草总公司一套机构、两块牌子。

1991年全国人大颁布《中华人民共和国烟草专卖法》，1997年国务院发布《烟草专卖法实施条例》，以法律形式确立和完善国家烟草专卖制度。2005年11月，经国务院同意，国务院办公厅下发《关于进一步理顺烟草行业资产管理体制深化烟草企业改革的意见》(国办发〔2005〕57号)，明确烟草行业继续实行“统一领导、垂直管理、专卖专营”的管理体制，中国烟草总公司依法对所属工商企业的国有资产行使出资人权利，经营和管理国有资产，承担保值增值责任。

2008年国务院下发的国家烟草专卖局“三定”方案，对国家烟草专卖局的工作职责作了进一步明确。通过上述几个阶段，我国逐步形成了以“统一领导、垂直管理、专卖专营”为核心的烟草专卖制度和管理体制。其中专卖专营又包括三大法定许可制度，即：烟草专卖品生产和进出口的法定许可证制度，烟草专卖品是指卷烟、雪茄烟、烟丝、复烤烟叶、烟叶、卷烟纸、滤嘴棒、烟用丝束、烟草专用机械；烟草专卖品销售和经营主体的法定许可证制度；烟草专卖品运输的法定准运证制度。

目前，全国烟草行业职工总数55万人；设有直属机构58个；地市级局（公司）446个，县级局（营销部）2283个；卷烟工业企业和烟机制造企业105个，烟叶复烤企业56个，其他单位和企业140个。

Our world famous tobacco business started with Robert Lewis, who began trading fine tobacco in St James's Street in 1787. The store's motto is Omnia Omnibus Ubique - All Things for All People, Everywhere – which includes the world's most famous cigar aficionados. James J Fox has partnered with Harrods and leading global cigar franchise, La Casa Del Habano, to create a state-of-the-art cigar department in the heart of London. This department is managed by Paul Bielby

Selfridges is a world famous chain of department stores in the UK. Its flagship store, which is a shrine for dedicated shoppers from all over the world in London's Oxford Street is the second largest shop in the UK, after Harrods, and was opened on 15 March 1909. Name: Nicotine Resource Consortium
Description:
TMA is a convener and source of information founded in 1915 by the cigar industry to reduce IP litigation through an open record of trademarks and increase information sharing with external stakeholders in the face of disruption by a new product: machine made cigarettes. TMA now serves the entire tobacco and nicotine industry and stakeholder community from seed to shelf along with labs, law firms, financial companies, consultants, government, and civil society. Our focus remains the same - provide unbiased information and convene open and welcoming forums for all stakeholders to increase understanding of tobacco and nicotine issues.

Our Mission:
-GROW understanding of tobacco and nicotine issues
-FOSTER an open and INCLUSIVE forums that bring people and ideas together
-BE A GOOD STEWARD of our member and stakeholder's trust
-Provide VALUABLE & BENEFICIAL services spanning the big picture to the most granular

Our Values
-The trust Members, subscribers and the wider stakeholder community place in TMA and the products and services we deliver is not given unconditionally; it is earned by our actions. 
-Though tobacco and nicotine issues are challenging and controversial, TMA is an open and respectful forum welcoming of all stakeholders. 
-Strive to bring together the people and ideas relevant to tobacco and nicotine.
Foster a greater understanding from the big picture to the most granular detail.
Be mindful of our institutional and industry history but evolve with the times
Remain impartial and dispassionate
Be a good employer by encouraging professional development, offering challenging and engaging work and striving to encourage curiosity, innovation and continuous improvement

Name: Vapper Cig
Description:
Vapper Cig for all the best UK E Liquid and electronic cigarette supplies, Vapouriser's and Cartomiszer's,

Electronic cigarettes come in a variety of appearances; some brands look like tobacco cigarettes, while others look like pens. E-cigs, as these are often called, are battery-operated. When activated, the cigarettes vaporize the liquid to release the nicotine and flavourings. The basis of the liquid which is also called E Liquid or E Juice is made of either propylene glycol or vegetable glycol and water depending on the flavour selected.

Another great feature of the electronic cigarette is the smokeless quality. The fog or mist created by the cigarette dissipates quickly. Because the e-cigs only release a light mist, those who use it do not end up smelling like smoke. This feature is also beneficial to non-smokers because they do not have to inhale harmful fumes from tobacco cigarettes.
 
Since the e-cigs do not produce a thick smoke and foul odor, it is safe to light them up wherever and whenever. The mist released by the cigarette does not pose any health hazard as reserch so far suggests, so there is no chance of contracting any respiratory disease that is common among smokers and passive smokers.

Name: VT Smokeless
Description:
What are the constituents of the solution-mixture in e-cigarette cartridges? Is the solution safe?
The E-cartridge is mainly composed of propylene glycol, and a very small amount of nicotine.
Propylene Glycol is a food additive found in many foods we eat today, such as food coloring, flavoring and also used to keep food, medicines and cosmetics moist. It is considered generally safe and it is the element that helps to create the vapor that simulates smoke.
Nicotine is an alkaloid that is naturally present in certain plants. A high presence is found in tobacco and a low presence is found in common vegetables such as potatoes, tomatoes and green peppers. Nicotine, when delivered in small dosages such can deliver a feeling of calmness or relaxation. Current available information states that nicotine in and of it self has not been shown to promote the development of cancer in healthy tissue. Additionally, it has not been shown to have any mutagenic properties. This being said, it should also be noted that the International Agency for Research on Cancer has not evaluated nicotine as of this time.
Could the e-cigarette really be substituted for an ordinary cigarette and does it really deliver the same flavor as ordinary cigarettes?
The e-cigarette simulates traditional smoking, by meeting smokers physiological, psychological and behavioral needs. It offers a variety of flavors to satisfy smokers unique taste requirements and cultural backgrounds.
What’s the main difference between the e-cigarette and ordinary cigarettes?
The e-cigarette does not use combustion and produces no smoke; It does not produce any new substances in the process of vaporization. Furthermore, the e-cigarette, does not produce any dangerous substances such as tar carbon monoxide that are produced during ordinary smoking. It does not produce second-hand smoke that would harm family members and pollute the environment.

Name: Hispaniola Cigars
Description:
History
For over four generations the Melo and Matos families have been one of the largest producers of the finest organic coffee and aged tobacco in the Dominican Republic, focusing in exportation of coffee as well as supplying some of the largest fine cigar distributors and importers in the Dominican Republic with aged cured tobacco.

In 2002 following the ambitious entrepreneurial drive and knowledge of both coffee and tobacco growing, H. F. Melo, a fourth generation tobacco and coffee master blender decided it was the right time to venture into the cigar export market, launching the Hispaniola Brand and Introducing it to a selective market segment.  

The launch served as a springboard for other cigars within the distinctive Hispaniola portfolio.

Mission
Our goal is to introduce the world to a piece of Hispaniola History through our exquisite and unique cigar portfolio.   Delivering consumers worldwide a taste of our land, culture and folklore has and always will be a priority for the Melo Matos family.
Manufacturing
After a number of complex trials, the Master Blender at the Hispaniola manufacturing estate Villa Nisao Del Paraiso creates a unique blend for each individual cigar format. However it must also be perfectly complimented by the almost magical and unique skill of the “torcedores” – the cigar rollers. 

An Essence of greatness 

All of our cigars are carefully selected to assure that the same amount of tobacco per unit are applied; in order to achieve a consistent blend of well balanced flavors. 

We take pride only utilizing the finest elements in our packaging process. The finished cigars are hand packed into fine Spanish cedar wood boxes to assure the aromas, humidity and shape remains consistent.

Name: Highclere Castle Cigar Co.
Description:
Highclere Castle Cigar Co. was founded in 2017 via a partnership with the 8th Earl of Carnarvon, world renowned cigar blender, Nicholas Melillo of Foundation Cigar Company, and CEO/entrepreneur Adam von Gootkin. Highclere Castle might be better known to millions of viewers as the fictional home “Downton Abbey,” but the magnificent estate in Hampshire, England has been the seat of the Carnarvon family for over 300 years.

The crafting of this cigar took hundreds of hours and trips throughout Central and South America. As a result of Nick’s relationships with small tobacco growers throughout the region, we have been able to select from very small lots of the finest tobaccos from family farms known for their excellent growths. 

The flavor profile has been modeled after cigars from the turn of the 19th century that were being imported to Highclere Castle, typically for the gentleman to enjoy after dinner. Specific records and receipts were located by the castle archivist and used as inspiration for the Highclere Cigar blend. The result is an exceptionally smooth, creamy cigar similar to what you would have smoked at Highclere Castle over 100 years ago. 

Visit www.HighclereCastleCigar.com
