Name: PUROS de Hostos
Description:
Producer of premium hand-crafted cigars.

Latest review by the Dominicana Gourmet: Comendador Lanceo 2010

Like most “Puros de Hostos selections, the Comendador Lancero, is a highly attractive cigar that has impeccable construction. The wrapper has a rich chocolate color with a slight oily sheen that is noticeable with the naked eye. Hardly any veins are present and the cigar feels well-packed and as smooth as can be. It also has a pigtail cap. There are two decorative bands, ( one is personalized with your name) that add a classy touch to the overall appearance of the Lancero. The top band is large and oval in shape. It displays the de Hostos name in gold lettering. The second, red band sits right beneath  Before lighting, the cigar has an earthy flavor and its scent is spicy.
Just like its appearance, the burn of the Comendador Lancero is flawless. The draw is just right, and solid white ash is produced. The burn stays even without the need for any touch-ups. The cigar also stays lit on its own until the very end. Not having to maintain the burn allows you to fully enjoy and savor this full flavoured cigar.
Speaking of savouring, this is one cigar where a lot of that goes on, as the flavours are very rewarding. Spicy notes blended with rich pure cacao chocolate kick things off. A very tasty nutty flavour eventually comes in, as does cedar. Earthy notes also become noticeable, and a extremely smooth, creamy flavour helps add to the overall experience.

As consumer’s interests for hookahs in the U.S. increased, old-fashioned middle-eastern style hookahs were no longer suitable to satisfy the personalities of the US audience. Nu Tobac International embarked on a journey to produce hookah brands that satisfies the new hookah smoker’s persona. Nu Hookahs for a Nu Generation.

With a product portfolio consisting of hookah, shisha, and tobacco-free shisha brands, Nu Tobac International’s journey is continually evolving with the market and the changes in consumer preferences. With a focus on hookahs, we strive to create brands that people can connect with. Their debut e-liquid flavor, "Blast Berry," quickly gained popularity and remains a market favorite to this day.

This strategic move solidified the company's position as a major player in the region, focusing on the production of high-quality disposable vapes and diverse vape juice mixes.

Commitment to In-House Production

A hallmark of Vape Factory's success is its commitment to in-house production. By controlling the entire manufacturing process, the company ensures meticulous quality control and the ability to customize products to meet evolving market trends and consumer preferences.

Global Reach and Expansion

Samsvape's influence extends far beyond Bahrain, reaching a global audience across the Middle East and other markets. The company's expansion to Dubai further demonstrates its commitment to growth and innovation in the vaping industry.

Continuous Innovation and Premium Products

Over the years, Samsvape has consistently met and overcome challenges, accumulating expertise and knowledge in the vaping sector. This dedication has resulted in the creation of a range of premium e-liquids and disposable devices, solidifying the company's reputation for quality and excellence.

A Legacy of Leadership

Samsvape's journey is a testament to its pioneering spirit and commitment to providing safer alternatives to traditional tobacco. Through continuous innovation and a customer-centric approach, the company has established itself as a leader in the Middle East vaping landscape.

Electronic cigarettes came onto the market a few years ago and Jason Cropper (MD) saw what a fantastic product concept they were and how they offered a real alternative to tobacco smoking. Totally Wicked has one main goal, which is to provide our customers with products and services that deliver the best possible vaping experience. We believe that we consistently achieve this with not only our nicotine fluids but also our full range of Electronic Cigarettes and their accompanying accessories.

TO STRIVE to provide our customer with only the best electronic cigarettes and E-Liquid products in pakistan. TO ENSURE that the customer is heard and respond to their needs as quickly and effectively as we can. TO BUILD an Electronic Cigarette and E-Liquid business that serves and adds value to all our stakeholders, this includes our clients, our staff, the companies we buy from and the community at large. Name: ROC Systems
Description:
ROC Systems (Pvt.) Ltd. commenced trading in June 2012 and the company is currently owned by Mr. Robert Stokes. The company is based in Chinhoyi, but services many customers across Zimbabwe.

Currently our main line of operation is the manufacture of Tobacco Curing Tunnels, called the Ecotunnel, which is available in 8 sizes capable of curing 10,20, 30, 35, 40, 50, 60 and 70Ha crops in a single planting. These units can also be used to cure up to 2 further crops in a season when the separate crops are planted at monthly intervals.

Other innovative product lines that we service include grading sheds, structures, Chongi conversion, Chromadek roofing, heat exchangers, grain dryers, augers, grain silos, modro conversion, seed Maize cob dryers, ethylene generators, misting systems,pulverised coal burners, wet-bulb controllers, tobacco trollies and trailers. We are also involved in many general engineering jobs of various description.

Currently ROC Systems employs a total of 42 staff comprising 2 directors, 2 managers, 38 workshop staff encompassing welders, painters, electricians, drivers and various others. All of our staff members are employed in developing, manufacturing and delivering the highest level of farming services and products to agricultural professionals nationwide.

In conclusion, the various products and services that ROC Systems offers is continually changing & expanding as we develop new technologies and strive to be the most innovative agricultural solution provider in Southern Africa.

Name: Las Antillas Tobacco Company
Description:
Rooted in the heart of the Caribbean and inspired by centuries of tobacco heritage, Las Antillas Tobacco Company is a vertically integrated enterprise dedicated to the cultivation, processing, and global distribution of premium tobacco.

We own and operate our own plantations in the Dominican Republic, Nicaragua and Ecuador, cultivating some of the region’s most prized leaves. From seed to shipment, our operations are anchored in Tamboril—the world’s cigar capital—where we manage a state-of-the-art processing and logistics facility. This strategic control of the entire supply chain allows us to guarantee consistency, quality, and traceability in every batch.

Las Antillas serves as a gateway between the Caribbean’s finest tobacco traditions and the world’s most discerning cigar makers, distributors, and connoisseurs. With deep regional roots and an international outlook, we’re not just supplying tobacco — we’re building a legacy.

Name: Tobacco Manufacturers Association
Description:
The Tobacco Manufacturers’ Association (TMA) is the trade association for tobacco companies that operate in the United Kingdom.

The TMA represents the views of our member companies when communicating with the UK Government, regional and local authorities and other stakeholders on issues of shared interest and concern, including taxation, smuggling and youth access prevention.

Our members are British American Tobacco UK Ltd, Gallaher Ltd (a member of the JTI Group of companies) and Imperial Tobacco Ltd.

The TMA defends the legitimate interests of its member companies and the freedom of adults to make an informed choice about whether to smoke or not.

Name: VdR - Der Tabakmittelstand
Description:

Einst in Bamberg gegründet stehen wir seit jeher für Wertschaffung und Wertschätzung des Genussmittels Tabak. Wir geben mittelständischen, vor allem familiengeführten Unternehmen, eine Stimme gegenüber Politik und Gesellschaft – in Berlin als auch in Brüssel.

Unsere Mitglieder sind Importeure und Hersteller aller klassischen Genusstabake. 
 
Tabak ist Tradition. Tabak ist Genussvielfalt. Tabak ist Verantwortung. Die persönliche Genussfreiheit ist ein Kulturgut, für dessen Erhalt wir uns langfristig einsetzen.

Name: MONTEPAZ
Description:
Somos una empresa cien por ciento uruguaya y de genuina tradición tabacalera. Cuidando la calidad de nuestros productos y profundizando cambios en los ya existentes, nuestras marcas locales lideran con más del 85% de las ventas y nuestras exportaciones llegan a los mercados más exigentes del mundo. Flexibles por convicción, diseñamos nuevas propuestas a la medida de cada mercado, produciendo productos únicos destinados a complacer sectores específicos.

Conocer nuestra Compañía es ingresar por una puerta abierta al mundo. Siempre dispuestos a oír y a responder, nuestra capacidad combina experiencia y tecnología, indispensables para elaborar productos de tabaco de calidad superior. Nos avalan los años, los resultados y la visión compartida, siempre de cara al futuro.

Con una importante inversión en capacitación, la imprescindible armonía para trabajar en paz y poder desarrollar el máximo esfuerzo, y oídos atentos para escuchar y aprender de los demás, es nuestra diaria jornada un ambiente laboral de tranquilidad y respeto. Y una de las claves de nuestra muy baja rotación. Varios de los primeros funcionarios de la Fábrica han extendido su presencia a través de sus descendientes más jóvenes, unificando a la familia fundadora con la familia productora en una suerte de gran colectividad en pos de los mismos objetivos.
La experiencia de siempre y los nuevos profesionales tienen así su lugar de fusión, desarrollando la imprescindible alquimia que toda empresa necesita para ser exitosa.

Estamos aquí para darte una visión de MONTEPAZ por dentro. No estamos aquí para promocionar nuestras marcas/productos. Al utilizar nuestra página de LinkedIn, aceptás cumplir con nuestras reglas de participación: https://bit.ly/3K3XnZK

Name: GN Tobacco Sweden AB
Description:
In 2007 a distribution agreement was signed with the US's third-largest cigarette company - Liggett Vector Group in which L&M famous cigarettes were originally produced, which has taken Swedish snus in its portfolio, Grand Prix and Tourney launched on the US market in 2008. 
GN Tobacco Sweden AB was founded in 2009, under the name SNUSAB AB then was renamed GN Tobacco AB. Our state-of-the-art factory in Enköping manufactures snus chewing tobacco in any format, Loose, and all possible portion chewing tobacco and snus formats as white, wet, dry long, slims, mini, maxi, and of course various nicotine levels. 
GN tobacco is also a producer of tobacco-free nicotine pouches, and “All White” products with just a minimum of tobacco. Production was established in August 2014. Our second factory in Bispgården was rebuilt in 2014 for tube production with a capacity of 150m filter tubes per month. 
Our brands Oden's, Siberia, White Fox, Bull Dog, Olde Ving, Lenny, WOW, and Islay Whiskey snus chewing tobacco, and nicotine pouches give the consumer a wide range of choices of both strength and flavor. GN Tobacco produces and distributes snus chewing tobacco, and nicotine pouches to more than 70 countries in the World.

Name: Imperial Brands Italia
Description:
Imperial Brands Italia è la filiale italiana di Imperial Brands PLC, azienda globale e innovativa di beni di largo consumo, che opera in 160 paesi con il supporto di 27.500 dipendenti.
Imperial Brands Italia, con sede a Roma, nasce nel 2008 come Imperial Tobacco Italia e conta attualmente 204 dipendenti. Imperial ha un portafoglio dinamico di prodotti del tabacco e accessori (con i brand John Player Special, WEST, Gauloises, Davidoff, Golden Virginia, RIZLA) e di prodotti di nuova generazione (NGP), con il marchio blu.
Mentre abbracciamo una nuova era di crescita, ci stiamo trasformando. I nostri clienti sono al centro di ciò che facciamo, la nostra evoluzione è basata sulle loro esigenze e aspettative e il nostro impegno è volto a dare un contributo sempre più significativo alla riduzione del danno, attraverso una valida proposta di Prodotti di Nuova Generazione (NGP) come la sigaretta elettronica myblu. Per ulteriori informazioni visita anche i siti web www.imperialbrandsplc.com e www.imperialbrandsscience.com/ 
Il nostro modo di lavorare e la nostra cultura sono guidati da una mentalità sfidante che mette costantemente in discussione lo status quo. Agilità, spirito imprenditoriale, programmi di sviluppo pluripremiati, strategie per la sostenibilità consentono innovazione e successo e fanno in modo che lavorare in Imperial significhi sentirsi parte di un ambiente unico che da oltre cento anni basa il suo successo su internazionalità, trasparenza degli obiettivi e responsabilità. 
Incoraggiando l'Inclusione a livello locale e sviluppando a livello globale una solida agenda volta a favorire la Diversità, siamo pienamente impegnati nel creare e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri e rispetti le differenze.

Name: Associated Tobacco Company (Brasil) Ltda.
Description:
A Associated Tobacco Company Limitada é uma empresa de tabaco independente com unidades no Brasil, China, Índia, Indonésia e Reino Unido. O Grupo investiu em mão de obra qualificada e experiente, incluíndo diretoria e funcionários em todas as suas áreas de operação e oferece um serviço de qualidade, flexibilidade, competitividade e confidencialidade para todos os seus clientes.

O objetivo dos sócios da ATC é continuar a investir, melhorar e aumentar a infra-estrutura do Grupo a fim de fornecer aos nossos clientes um serviço cada vez melhor.

Subsidiária da Associated Tobacco Company Ltd., a Associated Tobacco Company (Brasil) Ltda, opera em Santa Cruz do Sul.

Criada em 1997, a empresa, que iniciou suas operações no vizinho município de Venâncio Aires, se transferiu para a margem da BR 471, no Distrito Industrial, onde ergueu uma moderna fábrica de beneficiamento de fumo com 41 mil metros quadrados de área construída. A Empresa atualmente emprega 700 funcionários e trabalha em 3 turnos.

Name: New Kamath Tobacco Company Pvt Ltd
Description:
New Kamath Tobacco Company Pvt Ltd: Redefining Tobacco Craftsmanship and Enjoyment

Overview:
Welcome to New Kamath Tobacco Company Pvt Ltd, a distinguished tobacco manufacturing company that is setting new benchmarks in the world of tobacco craftsmanship and enjoyment. With a rich legacy steeped in tradition and a relentless pursuit of excellence, we take pride in producing exceptional tobacco products that cater to the discerning tastes of enthusiasts around the globe.

About Us:
At New Kamath Tobacco Company Pvt Ltd, we recognize that tobacco is more than just a substance; it is a cultural icon, a source of pleasure, and an art form. We are passionate about preserving the heritage of tobacco while pushing the boundaries of innovation to create unique and remarkable blends.

Our Commitment to Quality:
Quality is the cornerstone of our operations. We believe that only the finest ingredients and meticulous craftsmanship can produce truly exceptional tobacco. Our dedicated team of experts meticulously selects the best tobacco leaves and ingredients, ensuring that every blend is a testament to our commitment to excellence. We employ cutting-edge technologies and adhere to stringent quality control measures at every stage of production, guaranteeing that each product bearing our name meets the highest standards of quality and consistency.

Product Portfolio:
At New Kamath Tobacco Company Pvt Ltd, we offer an extensive range of premium tobacco products, including pandharpuri tobacco and hookah tobacco. Our pandharpuri tobacco is meticulously crafted using the finest tobacco leaves, resulting in rich and robust flavors that invigorate the senses. For hookah enthusiasts, we specialize in creating artisanal hookah tobacco blends that tantalize the taste buds and elevate the hookah experience to new heights.

Together, let us embark on a journey that celebrates the rich heritage and endless possibilities of tobacco enjoyment.

Name: Mazaya
Description:
After over a decade of leading the Middle East market in the manufacturing, distribution and sales of the finest types of cigarettes, we, at Alzawrae Company, have moved towards expanding our scope of work by investing our full resources and expertise in the manufacturing of tobacco-molasses, through our new distinctive brand ‘Mazaya’, which was launched in 2010. Through Mazaya, we aim at revolutionizing the production of tobacco-molasses meeting the latest international quality standards and leaving a unique imprint in this industry; therefore, presenting to our customers a diverse and innovative selection of high quality products that meet their diverse tastes and needs. Moreover, Mazaya is committed to the implementation of its strategic plans that move towards achieving its vision and mission in harmony with its set objectives, through embracing a uniquely innovative and fully integrated model.

Right from the start, “Mazaya” was able to lead the market setting new benchmarks, as it focused on the implementation of a series of key factors such as, relying on premium French tobacco resources for the manufacturing of tobacco-molasses; and using the highest safety standards through all its production, packaging and distribution phases. Furthermore, “Mazaya” focused on market needs and adjusted accordingly, in order to meet its continuous changes.

Today, “Mazaya” seeks to expand the base of its success globally, with its product innovations opening up new potentials and market opportunities for the tobacco-molasses industry. Moreover, the brand’s customer trust and full understanding of all it has to offer was the empowering platform for such expansion, for the “Mazaya” basket overflows with a huge selection of premium European flavors and diverse products that serves to all tastes.

Name: Global Tobacco & Nicotine Forum (GTNF)
Description:
The Global Tobacco and Nicotine Forum (GTNF) is the world’s leading annual conference discussing the future of the tobacco and nicotine industries. It was founded on the principle that, through dynamic dialogue and expanding perspectives, we can genuinely shape the future together.  

From its launch in Rio de Janeiro in 2008 to the present day, the GTNF has become the global exchange for views and ideas between public health experts, government representatives, the industry, and investors. 

InFocus - our virtual half-day conference series - will be taking place on May 22, ahead of the wider GTNF conference later in September, and will be taking a closer look at the nicotine value chain; from agriculture, to common misperceptions about nicotine, and the ever-changing demand from consumers. We look forward to you joining us.

Name: Good Times USA, LLC

Good Times Cigarillos is one of the fastest-growing cigar brands in the U.S., delivering bold, distinctive flavors and unmatched value to adult consumers and retail partners alike. Since the trademark's inception in 2005, we've experienced consecutive year-over-year growth, earning a spot among the top 5 cigar manufacturers in the U.S. market.

Our commitment to innovation and quality drives foot traffic, incremental sales, and higher margins for our retail partners—translating into more profit where it counts. Our unique flavor profiles and eye-catching packaging continue to attract loyal customers and new smokers across more than 23 countries worldwide.

From our humble beginnings in York County, Pennsylvania, to our state-of-the-art facility in Santiago, Dominican Republic, we remain rooted in craftsmanship. Under the guidance of our Master Tobacconist—who brings over 40 years of experience—we uphold the highest standards in every cigar we produce.

At Good Times, we don’t just make cigars. We deliver good times in every puff.

Name: IQOS Romania
Description:
While the idea of heating tobacco, instead of burning it, has been around for more than two decades, it’s only now that we have managed to find a way to heat tobacco that results in a product that is satisfying to adult smokers. Around three million consumers have already chosen to switch from cigarettes to our tobacco heating system - IQOS.

IQOS is a sophisticated electronic device specially designed to heat tobacco. IQOS heats the tobacco just enough to release a flavorful nicotine-containing vapor but without burning the tobacco.

Name: The Artisan Vapor Company
Description:
Purveyors of fine electronic cigarette and supplies. Order online or visit our locations. All flavors American made and unique.

The electronic cigarette was introduced to the U.S. market in 2007 and offers the nicotine-addicted an alternative to smoking tobacco. Most “e-cigs” are similar enough in appearance to be mistaken for regular cigarettes, but one look inside and you’ll see the main difference: E-cigarettes don’t contain tobacco. Instead, there’s a mechanism that heats up liquid nicotine, which turns into a vapor that smokers inhale and exhale. Manufacturers and satisfied customers say that this nicotine vapor offers many advantages over traditional cigarette smoke.

Name: Layalina Tobacco
Description:
A glance at Layalina Tobacco Manufacturing
Established in 2003, the Layalina Tobacco Manufacturing Company was created to provide an exceptional selection of high quality flavoured hookah tobacco. 

Layalina Tobacco’s main brand is the Layalina range of flavoured shisha molasses. Layalina is produced using our own unique blend of the finest Virginian tobacco from three of the leading tobacco producers in the world. 

Layalina’s unique flavour and blending process is a result of many years painstaking research and development.

Layalina is produced in 57 different flavors to cater to different customer’s tastes and packed in 50 grams, 250 grams & 1Kg.

In addition to producing a complete range of speciality tobaccos, Layalina Tobacco has developed Golden Layalina, a compelling mix of flavours produced by using only the finest French Virginia tobacco that is perfectly paired with tailor-made, exotic accents that result in a distinctive aroma and a pleasant after taste.
 
Golden Layalina provides a potent and long-lasting smoking session which can be thoroughly enjoyed due to the use of this specialised blending technology.

The distinguished Golden Layalina hookah tobacco is available in 50 different flavors and in packages of 50 grams, 250 grams and 1 kg to cater to the needs of the most refined hookah smokers.

Name: PT Mangli Djaya Raya
Description:
PT Mangli Djaya Raya is a tobacco company located in Jember, Indonesia. The company, with its 7569 workforces and 24 facilities spread throughout the country, buys, handles, processes, packs and exports tobacco for its customers.

Our customers portfolio ranges from large multinationals to small manufacturers. Besides manufacturers, we are also supplying leaves to many international dealers and brokers. Under the leadership of our President Director, Nyoto Permadi, MDRs customers are growing every year. Our vast networks of farmers have also ensured that we will not be short of tobacco when it comes to fulfilling our obligations to the customers.

Indonesia, as an agricultural country, is blessed with its strategic location and abundant natural resources. Being an Indonesian company, MDR has a vision statement that is right in line with its roots: Expose the world with quality agricultural products.

In order to achieve our vision, we have developed a set of mission statements:
1. Maintain and develop cultivation of tobacco plantation.
2. Improve quality and quantity that will fit in the market demands.
3. Improve Human resources quality through utilization innovative technology.
4. Improve welfare of all stakeholders in the industry including farmers, customers and laborers.

These statements have defined how the company has been operating for the past 48 years.

A fines del año 2016, JTI adquiere la empresa local BIS Overseas Bolivia SRL, la cual hasta ese momento era su distribuidor exclusivo en el mercado boliviano. Establecida en el 2003 y previa a la adquisición, BIS operó a nivel nacional desde las ciudades de Santa Cruz y La Paz.

Luego de la adquisición, JTI expandió su operación comercial y de marketing y ajustó su estructura basada en el modelo organizacional de la Corporación.   

Actualmente, la Compañía opera de manera directa desde su oficina central y centro de distribución en Santa Cruz; cuenta además con oficinas en la ciudad de La Paz, y una operación a través de un distribuidor exclusivo en la ciudad de Cochabamba; contando además, con distribuidores para otras ciudades.

Esta fue una inversión estratégica en territorio boliviano, que ha potenciado la presencia de la Compañía tanto en el mercado local como en la región.

Dr. Ray Chung, Dr. Tao Xie and William Xu, the three founders of Darlings Brands, achieved a breakthrough in non tobacco aerosol generating material when they combined years of experience on botanical extracts and tobacco heating and combustion. The team went through a prolonged study and strict filtering of food grade botanical essences with hundreds of tests done from all aspect of consumer experience and safety. With modern manufacturing and testing technologies brought from all over the world, Darlings Brands team successfully invented a new aerosol generating substrate derived from the organic ingredients from the certified farms in Taiwan. The team established the company in Hong Kong and started working with professionals from all over the world to engineer and certify the tea powder and botanical essence based heat sticks. In the mean time, a heating device was concurrently developed to provide safe, steady and outstanding experience of inhaling from the heated sticks. The team’s company in Hong Kong are manufacturing and marketing the products to smokers who would like to reduce risks to themselves and also to family exposed to smoke. Darlings Brands team focus on their only goal – to provide nicotine or non nicotine products that reduce harmful substances and unpleasant smell in the aerosol inhaled by smokers. Name: Cigar Factory Management System (CFM)
Description:
Cigar Factory Management (CFM) specializes in Manufacturing Execution System (MES) software and consulting for the cigar industry. Our mission is to help cigar manufacturers of all sizes improve efficiency, reduce waste, and optimize operations through tailored software solutions.

CFM provides real-time insights and full visibility into the cigar production process, from tobacco inventory to finished goods. We streamline workflows and enhance productivity, giving manufacturers the tools they need to stay competitive in a rapidly changing market.

Key Features:
Automation Payroll: Streamline payroll management for accuracy and efficiency.

Cigar Production Performance: Monitor and optimize production in real-time.
Cigar Work-in-Progress Inventory: Track production stages to ensure timely delivery.

Department Orders: Simplify and manage inter-departmental orders.
Expenses Control: Keep expenses in check for better financial management.
Finished Goods Inventory: Ensure accurate tracking of your cigar inventory.
Packing List Feature: Generate efficient packing lists for shipping.
Tobacco Realtime Inventory: Monitor tobacco inventory levels in real-time.
Tobacco Classification: Classify and manage tobacco types for consistent production quality.

Why Choose CFM?
Our solutions are designed specifically for the cigar industry, combining expert consulting with innovative MES software. We help manufacturers maximize efficiency, maintain product quality, and gain full control over their production processes.

Mission:
To revolutionize cigar manufacturing through innovative technology, helping manufacturers scale and succeed.

Name: German Hookah Association e. V.
Description:

As a professional association, we support a legally compliant and transparent production, marketing and distribution of hookah tobacco as well as a uniform regulation of hookah bars in the form of licensing.  

The aim of the association is to raise public and political awareness of shisha as a cultural asset and its contribution to social coexistence, and to establish binding standards for the legal and responsible sale of hookah tobacco in dialogue with political decision-makers.

We continually improve our products by listening to our customers and integrating their feedback. This commitment has earned us a loyal customer base and a reputation for excellence.

Innovation and Education

We are not just about products; we are about education. Vaporite has been at the forefront of educating people on the health benefits of vaporizing, striving to make a positive impact on our community. Our participation in major trade shows like ASD/AMD in Las Vegas, THC in Los Angeles, Spannabis in Spain, The Highlife show in Spain, and Canna Trade in Switzerland underscores our leadership in the industry.

Customer Satisfaction

Our goal is simple: to provide high-quality products that enhance our customers' vaping experience and to build lasting relationships based on trust and satisfaction. Happy customers are our greatest advocates, and their positive word-of-mouth is our best advertisement. We are dedicated to ensuring every Vaporite user is happy and satisfied with our products and services.

Join us on our journey as we continue to innovate and lead the vaping industry with integrity and a commitment to quality. Follow our page for updates, insights, and more from us.

Name: Air 2, LLC dba VaporEFX
Description:
ABOUT R2 INNOVATIONS

THE COMPANY

R2 Innovations, LLC was founded by Robert L. Senter and Robert E. Matuszewski in 1998 a privately owned, Colorado Limited Liability Company. R2 has arranged equity partnerships with industry leaders in the field of  drying and micronizing microparticles and nanoparticles into dry powder aerosols for the purpose of inhalation therapies, targeting the treatment of respiratory diseases, including asthma, emphysema and COPD. In addition to dry powder formulations targeting pulmonary and respiratory disorders; US patent pending processes, research and studies are underway to convert CBD, cannabidiol and other cannabis derived, extracted oils into pharmaceutical grade, fine powder formulations using R2’s pressurized, metered dose inhaler (pMDI) and R2's dry powder inhaler (DPI) technologies directed at treating stress, post traumatic stress disorders (PTSD), anti-inflammatory pain relief and insomnia.

R2 MISSION

R2’s Mission is to be recognized as a global leader in the development and manufacturing of natural medicines to treat specific, targeted ailments and diseases. At R2 we are devoted to delivering alternative medical treatments to solve ongoing medical problems and  support important advancements in medical science.

R2 OBJECTIVE

R2’s objective is to challenge the use of; fluticasone propionate/salmeterol xinafoate, budesonide/formoterol, albuterol/salbutamol, budesonide, fluticasone and formoterol fumarate as the preferred corticosteroid medical treatments in existing metered dose inhalers eliminating adverse side effects, and the threat of death with overdosing for asthmatic, COPD and Emphysema patients.

R2 VISION

R2's Vision is to lead the global marketplace in advanced alternative medicines with an emphasis on respiratory therapies, supported by clinical research, double blind studies and independent lab testing.

Name: Cigars Unlimited GmbH
Description:
cigars unlimited GmbH wurde 2001 von Andreas Biel und Patrick Wirth gegründet. Heute zählt "cu", wie cigars unlimited liebevoll von den Kunden genannt wird, deren vier Gesellschafter: Andreas Biel, Roger Kleiner, Tanja Biel, Alex Dysli. cigars unlimited beliefert nicht nur in der Schweiz Privat- und Gastrokunden inklusive Cateringfirmen, sowie andere Retailer. Wir bieten das gesamte Angebot der globalen Zigarrenproduktion und alle Formate an. Das gleiche gilt für das Zubehör, wobei wir dabei einen besonderen Fokus auf die hochwertigen Produkte von Lampe Berger legen. cigars unlimited kombiniert den Zigarrenverkauf mit themenbezogenen Anlässen, welche seit langem auch Gelegenheits- und/oder Nichtraucher begeistern. Diese Symbiose hebt uns deutlich von der Konkurrenz ab. Einige dieser Anlässe finden seit dem Gründungsjahr statt, so zum Beispiel der Cheese & Smoke Anlass jeweils im Februar / März jedes Jahr.

cigars unlimited wird sich auch in Zukunft auf die Zusammenarbeit mit Gastropartnern, Sponsoren und anderen interessierten Firmen konzentrieren. Den gesetzlichen Einschränkungen zum Trotz, versorgen wir eine zunehmende Zahl von Gästen mit Genuss, Lebensfreude und –stil. Auf dieser Basis baut cigars unlimited sein Angebot laufend aus und handelt nach folgendem Credo:
 
- Wir sind überzeugt, dass Zigarrenrauchen Symbol einer lebensbejahenden Einstellung und positivem Denken ist.
- Wir verkaufen feinste Zigarern, exkluxives Zubehör und Humidore und organisieren sichere und attraktive   Anlässe.
- Wir beraten unsere Kunden individuell und ohne Zeitdruck.
- Wir verkaufen nur erstklassige und kontrollierte Zigarren und Zubehör. Alle unsere Zigarren sind begast und gefroren gewesen, was sie vor Ungeziefer und anderen Krankheiten schützt.

Name: Nice Ash TX
Description:
It is with great pleasure and excitement that Jon, Brian, and Colin announce the opening of Nice Ash in Summer 2023!  
It started with a ritual on Sundays in late 2020.  We meet at Torchy’s for a couple tacos and then head somewhere for a cigar and to relax before the coming week’s trials.  Though Brian didn't join for tacos, he gladly met Jon & Colin after the Torchy’s outing.  While we’ve been doing this, we would constantly chat with new people over a cigar wherever we would end up. We may have started our conversations as strangers but were friends by the end of the afternoon.
There was always one constant that we would hear; A desire for a private escape to enjoy cigars and conversation at all hours.
Fast forward to February 2022.  During our normal Sunday ritual, in a rather passing manner, it was mentioned that there was a building for sale on White Oak just a few blocks from our houses.  As we sat there continuing to stare and think, a collective “Let’s put in an offer!” came out of us.  We closed on the building in April.
For the last 12 months Jon, Brian, and Colin have been working on the concept of what we wanted Nice Ash to be.  Using the information we’d gathered from our conversations; we decided a mixed concept of retail and private lounge would be greatly desired by the cigar aficionados in the Houston area. 
Nice Ash will offer a 600sqft walk-in humidor with retail and an outside patio accessible to all patrons to relax, converse, and enjoy a cigar.  Attached to Nice Ash will be the ‘Back Ash’.  A private area with 72 private lockers for the members along with a private patio.  Back Ash will offer members exclusive access 24/7.  The lounge will have seating for 40+, several TVs for your favorite sporting events, gaming tables, and honor system refreshments.
This is the first time any of us have ventured into anything like this and we’re very excited for the journey.  We look forward and hope that many of you will be a part of this journey with us!

Name: The National Association of Tobacco Outlets
Description:
NATO, the National Association of Tobacco Outlets, Inc., is the only non-profit, national retail tobacco trade association committed to enhancing the common business interests of all tobacco retailers and to assisting members in responding to tobacco-related legislation and regulations on the local, state and federal levels. 

To accomplish these objectives, NATO: 
--Focuses on protecting the right of retailers to sell and the right of adults to purchase and enjoy tobacco products.
--Informs NATO members about pending tobacco legislation and regulations and assists members in responding to local, state and federal legislation and regulations.
--Takes a pro-active approach that informs and educates elected officials on the local, state and national levels about the impact that proposed tobacco-related legislation would have on tobacco retailers and the individual rights and the freedom of choice of adult tobacco consumers. 
--Provides a forum through the NATO Show for manufacturers and distributors to exhibit their tobacco products and services and to conduct educational seminars for tobacco retailers and wholesalers. 

To learn more about NATO, visit the association’s website at www.natocentral.org.

Name: Supreme Tobacco Haiti
Description:
Founded in 2015, Supreme Tobacco began with a dream between four friends and a common passion: the cigar. They visualized themselves smoking their own Haitian cigar with leaves grown in the fertile land of Mirebalais, producing a unique and particular flavor. The product became their obsession, but their intention guided their vision – to place Haiti on the map as a leading producer of tobacco. 
 
Over five years, Supreme Tobacco has identified and nurtured the area’s most suitable soil for tobacco growing by irrigating the land and equipping farmers with adequate training and knowledge to produce the premium tobacco leaf that has retained the attention of the tobacco industry. With a strong belief in Haiti’s potential, Supreme’s craft morphed into an all-Haitian produced cigar, giving it its characteristic: “from seed to smoke”. Their goal is to develop a culture around tobacco in Haiti that will create sustainable jobs in the island’s most remote areas, increase the country’s agricultural production and shape a positive narrative of Haiti as a major tobacco producing nation. 
 
With its farms in the Plateau Central, Supreme Tobacco is today the only producer of quality (premium) tobacco and the only Haitian cigar manufacturer. Located between Cuba and the Dominican Republic, Haiti has a unique, rich, and suitable land for tobacco production. History confirms that the farming of this magical commodity dates to the time of the Tainos, the first inhabitants of the island.  
 
To commemorate our origins, we have chosen to name our first cigar in memory of the cacique of Xaragua, BOHEKIO. 

We welcome you to the world of Supreme and hope you enjoy the ride with us!

Name: House of Oliver Twist
Description:
House of Oliver Twist A/S is Denmark’s oldest tobacco manufactory and the world’s largest exporter of spun chewing tobacco bits. From the very beginning, our focus has been clear: to develop, produce and supply high-quality smokeless tobacco products – known to customers around the world as Oliver Twist.

House of Oliver Twist was family-owned from 1974 to 2018. In 2018, it was acquired by Swedish Match, which in turn became part of the global group Philip Morris International in 2022.

As of 1 January 2026, House of Oliver Twist A/S has returned to its roots as a locally owned company on the island of Funen in Denmark. The new owners are the Gundersen family from Assens, who bring more than 150 years of experience within the tobacco industry.

Built on proud Danish craftsmanship and supported by an international network, we work every day to create products that combine heritage, quality and continuous innovation.


Business concept: 
Oliver Twist tobacco bits are a stimulant for adult consumers to help them meet their need for nicotine without the harmful effects of smoking.

Mission statement:
To sell, develop and produce smokeless tobacco which can be enjoyed by all adult users of products containing nicotine. To sell our products with responsibility for our employees, owners, business partners and the international community.

Vision:
To ensure that all smokers know that OLIVER TWIST exists. Oliver Twist must be the strongest brand in its category on the markets in which House of Oliver Twist A/S actively participates.

The Dampfer does not contain any plant material (tobacco) that smoulders or burns, but uses a fluid, which evaporates and is inhaled as with a normal cigarette.

This technology means that Dampfer can be used in many places and public areas where the traditional cigarettes are banned.

At the same time, Dampfer does not provide benefits to smokers only!

It reconciles smokers with non-smokers, to come together in the same place again, since the exhaled “passive smoke” only consists of a harmless haze and is completely odourless!

Smoking without restrictions.
Regain your freedom!

Na początku działalności zajmowaliśmy się importem i sprzedażą bibuł papierosowych, gilz i akcesoriów tytoniowych. Dzięki doskonałym produktom, profesjonalnemu wprowadzaniu ich na rynek, poszczególne marki stały się liderami swoich kategorii. 

Kilka lat temu wprowadziliśmy do oferty popularne dziś e-papierosy wraz z e-akcesoriami i liquidami, których jesteśmy producentem. Nasze marki z e-kategorii podbijają również rynki zagraniczne, a niektóre z nich są liderami swoich kategorii.

Dzięki nowoczesnym rozwiązaniom technicznym oraz precyzyjnie zaplanowanej logistyce, zamówione towary najczęściej trafiają do punktów sprzedaż w czasie krótszym niż 24 godziny. 

Przejrzyste zasady współpracy, wzajemne zaufanie i partnerskie stosunki powodują, że rośniemy w siłę wraz z coraz większą liczbą zadowolonych klientów.

Od 2014 roku funkcjonuje nasz zakład produkcyjny w Warszawie. Nasze produkty są produkowane w oparciu o własne receptury. 

Wiemy, że coraz więcej konsumentów wybiera nasze produkty i chętnie po nie wraca. Kluczem jest zawsze zadowolenie klienta.

Name: Kurbits Snus AB
Description:
About us
Kurbits Snus is the result of a meeting between an avid snus fanatic and an innovative entrepreneur. In this meeting, the conditions were created for the products we now proudly present on the esteemed snus market. We are aware that there are already many products and many players in the market, but we also know that it is possible to create snus with a completely different feeling than what the market had to offer so far.

What we do
The starting point is that snus production is a genuine craft. There are many who try to create good snus, and those who are successful know about the importance of each individual component. From the choice of tobacco and raw materials to the question which optimal manufacturing process to choose for the specific tobacco mixture. Then the flavours need to be set - a demanding job where a small variation can cause an enormous difference.

Background
We refused to release products before they were finished - of course it would be nice to enter the market as soon as possible but not if we were not completely satisfied with the outcome. Since the products have been released now, we have actually come to that point, and we hope that you appreciate our snus as much as we appreciate making it for you.

New cigarettes,createdto significantly minimize the risk of diseases caused by smoking.

TOBACCO BLEND
For the production of its new range of cigarettes, «Cigaronne» exclusively selects freshly harvested, high quality tobacco imported from recognized African and Latin American plantations.
The tobacco is passed through a multi-phase purification process usingthe world’s most innovative conditioning technologies, due to which carcinogens and toxic substances like chlorine, nitrogen-containing pesticides and complex molecules of heteropolar bonds are removed from the tobacco,subsequently reducing the risk of cancer, cardiovascular diseases and bronchitis illnesses.
The purification process also helps to eliminate the bitter aftertaste and smell from smoking, as well as reduces the chances of developing a smoker’s cough.
Despite the innovative approach to cigarette production, the characterised taste and the aroma of the tobacco remain untouched, signifying an instance of supreme taste.

Name: Sosa Cigars
Description:
The Sosa cigar tradition began with Don Juan Sosa, a small tobacco grower in the fertile Taguasco region of Cuba at the turn of the century.  By the 1920’s, his farm had become one of the largest tobacco-producing haciendas in Cuba. Over the next 30 years, Don Juan’s son, Arturo Sosa, and grandson, Juan B. Sosa, manufactured cigars for sale in Cuba and abroad.  Juan B. Sosa moved the operation to the Dominican Republic in the 1960’s where the family re-established their factory along with operations in Miami, Florida. Today, the legacy of quality, handmade cigars made in the Cuban tradition continues with master blender, Juan B. Sosa, alongside his wife, sons and nephews.

The Sosa family operates a wholesale cigar business in Little Havana, FL at 628 SW 22 Ave, Miami, FL 33135. Retail locations owned and operated by the Sosa family where various Sosa brands as well as other top-rated cigars in the industry are sold are located in Little Havana, FL at 3475 SW 8th Street, Miami, FL 33135 and in Downtown Disney in Orlando, Florida at 1502 E Buena Vista Dr, Orlando, FL... 32830.

The Sosa family also owns and operates an upscale fire and ice-themed cigar bar and lounge in Pleasure Island called Fuego at Downtown Disney where guests can enjoy cocktails and cigars or other specialty tobacco products. Open 11 a.m. to 2 a.m. and located at 1590 E Buena Vista Dr, Orlando, FL 32830.

Name: PRISM E-Liquids

At PRISM, our assortment of carefully crafted e-liquids was designed with PMTA in mind. We have heavily focused on six key components that allow PRISM to not only live on your shelves beyond the 9/9 PMTA deadline but to also quickly become your next best sellers.

Pre-8/8: In compliance with FDA guidelines, all PRISM flavors were commercially marketed prior to the 8/8/16 deadline.

PMTA: We are putting our entire assortment through the PMTA process, and as of  9/10/2020, the first of our multiple submissions has already already been accepted by the FDA and are now moving to the filing stage of the PMTA process! This means our flavors will be able to stay on your shelves after September 9th, 2020.

Proven Success: Our top five most popular flavors sold over 400,000 bottles in 2019 alone. The numbers speak for themselves; your customers are going to love these flavors!

Quality: All PRISM e-liquids are manufactured in an ISO Class 6 clean room, and certified lab tested with published results for every batch produced. For extra peace of mind, customers can easily access these results by simply scanning the QR code located on every bottle.

Selection: With three lines and nineteen total flavors going through PMTA, PRISM will have one of the largest selections on the market after September, 2020. By providing a range of flavors (from menthols & tobaccos to fruits & bakeries), you’ll see that with PRISM, there is always something for everyone.

Age Appropriate Marketing: For PRISM, protecting our nation’s youth is top priority. This is why all of our labels and packaging (from the imagery we use, to the names of flavors) have been carefully designed to reduce possible youth appeal and interest.

Name: Eurasia Duty Free
Description:
About Us


We, Eurasia Duty Free, has been established in 2017 and is planning to operate at the territory of Port of Baku, which is in Alat region. We are planning to operate as a store and serve customers who are arriving and departuring from Sea Port. Azerbaijan government is launching a project called FTZ ( Free Trade Zone ) by supervision of Port of Baku. We are planning to be part of that tremendous project. 
Unlike Azerbaijan’s border and inland dry ports, the new Free Trade Zone will play a pivotal role in international multimodal transportation and the Eurasian supply chain via Azerbaijan. A strong domestic and regional logistics network and logistics market would provide a solid foundation for the Alat project. The port will act as a major logistics hub in the Caspian region, serving both European and Asian markets, as well as being part of an extensive international logistics network linking Europe and Asia. Free Trade Zone includes several components, such as Truck Parking, International Logistics Centre and Domestic Logistic Centre, as part of a special economic regime. FTZ will be located within the grounds of the new port, covering an area of 100 hectares.

Our company headquarters is located in the largest export center of tobacco in the world, Santa Cruz do Sul, Brazil, a region that is recognized internationally for the quality of our tobacco. We offer flue-cured Virginia and Burley tobacco laminas, stems, scraps, and Cut-rag such as American Blend, Virginia, or custom-developed blends. KOHLTRADE is not affiliated with multinational groups, allowing us to work with lower costs and more flexibility in finding solutions and developing products for our clients.  Our suppliers are mostly family-operated businesses, tobacco producers, cooperatives, or companies with an entrepreneurial spirit that built a pretty reputable history in the market. Adding to those, our team is also formed by professionals with extensive national and international experience in the areas of production, sales, and management of tobacco. We want to invite you to review the next pages and to access our website certain that there will be always someone willing to help you if you may need any tobacco products within our markets. Welcome to our LinkedIn website.

Name: Abul Khair Tobacco Co. Ltd
Description:
Abul Khair Tobacco is the most trusted name in the tobacco industry of Bangladesh. We have been in the industry since 1953 and have been exporting the best quality tobacco in many countries of the world. Tobacco was the mother business of Abul Khair Group. The tobacco division is divided into two parts. One is tobacco growing & processing for domestic use & export in various countries and the other is cigarette manufacturing & selling to the domestic market.

In 1998 Abul Khair Tobacco started its cigarette manufacturing and selling business. At domestic market Abul Khair tobacco is in a leading position in low segment cigarette brand.

Our History

60 Years of AKT
Abul Khair’s 1953 opening of a handmade tobacco product named 42-No Abul bidi.

1998
Abul Khair introduced their ready-made cigarettes and started selling tobacco.

2009
Abul Khair becomes nationally number one selling cigarette. Volume reaches 1.00 billion

2012
National cigarette sales reach 2.00 billion. Second largest company in Bangladesh in terms of volume.

History of Tobacco

In Bangladesh flue cured tobacco growing was started from 1968 on experimental basis in Kushtia district in North West part of Bangladesh. After 6 years of extensive field work & grower’s participation Bangladesh achieved self sufficiency of tobacco in terms of Volume. Subsequently tobacco growing extended to the other areas in Bangladesh. Now there are four major tobacco growing areas in Bangladesh, these are Kushtia, Chittagong, Rangpur and Manikgonj.

Leaf Operations
Abul Khair Leaf operations activities are spread in all the leaf growing areas of the Bangladesh. We have a contractual farmer base for tobacco cultivation of about 20,000 farmers, growing tobacco in about 45,000 acres & produce 25 million kg’s of tobacco. Our field force strength is about 250 people. We have a capacity of warehouse about 35 million kg’s of tobacco in the various locations.

Green Leaf Thrashing Facilities

Name: Société Marocaine des Tabacs
Description:
Véritable industrie de transformation, la Société Marocaine des Tabacs (SMT) est l’héritière d’une histoire vieille de 100 ans dans l’industrie du tabac au Maroc, elle-même datant de plusieurs siècles depuis la découverte de l’Amérique. Nous avons une belle histoire, et nous continuons de l’écrire avec l’encre de nos valeurs et de notre détermination. En rejoignant la SMT, chaque collaborateur et collaboratrice en devient partie prenante et le garant de sa pérennité. 

Acteur industriel parmi les plus grandes entreprises du Maroc et filiale de Imperial Brands (IB), la SMT est le seul opérateur national du secteur des tabacs à développer ses activités dans le cadre d’une chaîne de valeur intégrée incluant la fabrication et la commercialisation des produits de tabac à travers le Royaume. 

La SMT apporte une contribution importante et unique aux objectifs sociaux, environnementaux et économiques du pays. Avec la Fondation SMarT, qui porte et structure les actions de Responsabilité Sociale, Sociétale et Environnementale (RSE) de la SMT, nous renforçons notre implication sociétale avec le financement, l’accompagnement technique et le suivi de projets sociétaux structurants, notamment en faveur des populations vulnérables situées dans des communautés interagissant avec notre chaîne de valeur.

Rejoignez la SMT pour écrire ensemble une page de notre histoire future !
En quelques chiffres
	1ère entreprise FMCG (Fast Moving Consomation Goods) au Maroc
	6ème plus grande entreprise au Maroc
	Unique opérateur intégré du secteur
	Plus de 1400 emplois directs pourvus et 25000 emplois indirects générés

Name: ITC Leaf Tobacco Business
Description:
ITC is the largest buyer, processor, and exporter of leaf tobaccos in India - creating a global benchmark as the single largest integrated source of quality tobaccos. Ensuring high quality and clean tobacco is at the heart of how we produce and supply tobaccos to our customers. With over 100 years of experience working with Indian tobacco farmers we have built a Sustainable value chain capable to service all the major categories of conventional tobacco products, new generation products - vapour, heated tobacco, and oral nicotine. 

We work closely with over 150,000 Indian Farmers through our agri extension network and buy nearly 50% of all cigarette tobacco types grown in India. Serving customers in 38 countries across more than 70 destinations, ITC co-creates and delivers value at every stage of the leaf tobacco value chain.

Name: KT INTERNATIONAL SA
Description:
We are an independent company, established in 2008, to craft the highest quality tobacco products for our consumers. Emerging from the break-up of the Bulgarian State Tobacco Corporation, we combine 150 years of heritage with state-of-the-art production capabilities.

Today we are the fastest developing independent tobacco group with operations in over 70 countries and selling products across 4 continents.

Our international team and local experts ensure we achieve outstanding results through a portfolio of international brands and consumer led innovations. Incorporating the latest production technologies we have an enhanced manufacturing flexibility with rigorous quality standards. These are supplemented by an attention to every detail, from seed to smoke, to deliver the ultimate consumer satisfaction.

The quality of our employees, their diversity and team spirit is the key to our success.

We have a highly talented team from different cultures who create an environment that is both competitive and creatively inspiring. We reward entrepreneurialism, seeking individuals who think differently but also have a desire to share collectively, ensuring we work and learn from each other.

Our reputation is paramount. In our highly regulated industry we understand the importance of ensuring our personnel feel respected. Our internationally accredited processes and systems can be applied across industries to motivate career progression, and we commission customized training programs to harness personal growth.

Name: M Tobacco Group
Description:
The family-owned company M Tobacco was established in year 2006 with main activity manufacturing of Make Your Own and Roll Your Own accessories: cigarette filtered tubes, rolling papers and filter tips.
Well-experienced team, excellent technical knowledge, brand new production facilities with modern equipment became fundamental basis for the company’s success. International quality standards are met through the use of the finest European materials.
Nowadays the production process is organized into three manufacturing units in Bulgaria and Romania. M Tobacco has more than 200 employees, with 20 production lines.

The factory for filtered cigarette tubes is situated in Giurgiu, Romania. The factory annual capacity is 10 billion sticks. M Tobacco offers filtered cigarette tubes with different characteristics in terms of tube size, filter length and composition, flavour, colour, capsule, charcoal and package. 

The production of rolling papers is situated near Plovdiv, Bulgaria.  Customers can choose from a number of sizes and paper grades. The company is proud of its innovative size of booklets 130 mm long rolling papers.

Filter Tips are manufactured in Bulgaria also. M Tobacco is proud of the in-house production of filter rods, which is equipped with the most modern production line, supplied with the highest quality of acetate-tow from premium producer.

Company brands CARTEL, DESPERADO, MORENO, MAXI GOLD and IMPERATOR are exported to more than 66 countries. Its partners are some of the biggest international wholesalers, retailers and importers.

M Tobacco offers very flexible private label solutions. The company provides services such as own design and photo studio enabling the best support in implementing the customer’s vision into the product.
In the fast developing world of tobacco industry M Tobacco is focused in providing modern, high-quality and competitive products: always the right portfolio at the right place at the right price.

Be part of our success!

Name: Tobacco International Inc
Description:
Welcome to Tobacco International Inc. – a company built on legacy, innovation and vision.

Our heritage dates back to the 17th century, rooted in a long-standing tobacco family tradition and carried forward by our founder, Atef R. Hazime, a pioneering entrepreneur and global businessman. What began as a family vision has grown into a multinational powerhouse, manufacturing and distributing cigarettes, energy drinks, nicotine pouches, energy pouches and nootropics such as Alpha-GPC while shaping the future of reduced-risk alternatives.

Headquartered in USA, with offices in Miami, North Carolina, Romania and Portugal, we proudly operate across North & South America, Asia and Africa. Our portfolio is anchored by two powerhouse brands: REBEL, one of the earliest and fastest-rising pouch brands worldwide and KRATOS, a bold new challenger in nicotine, energy and performance products.

At Tobacco International Inc., our mission goes beyond selling products. We are committed to producing emotion through every detail of our brands, from the seed in the soil to the final touch of packaging. Every step reflects our dedication to excellence, authenticity and consumer satisfaction.

We also recognize the risks of smoking. That is why our vision is proactive: creating less harmful, high-quality alternatives that support consumers in cutting down, transitioning or finding innovative ways to enjoy responsibly.

By joining us, you become part of a global legacy, a company that honors tradition while driving a more ethical, sustainable and forward-thinking future.

Name: Premium Cigar Association (PCA)
Description:
Founded in 1933, the Premium Cigar Association (formerly the International Premium Cigar & Pipe Retailers Association) is the oldest, largest and most active trade association representing and assisting retailers of premium tobacco products and their suppliers. 

PCA is a not-for-profit trade association recognized as the "Voice of Authority and Reason" on premium tobacco related issues. The Association provides its members with assistance in fighting onerous tobacco legislation and regulation, brings retailers and manufacturers together in mutually advantageous business relationships and provides its members with market data, research, services and product information to assist them in profitable operation of their businesses.

Our Board of Directors, Members and Staff are fully committed to preserving the rights of adults to enjoy legal premium tobacco products! Join the Fight to Protect YOUR Rights.

Name: China Brasil Tabacos Exportadora S.A.
Description:
Somos a China Brasil Tabacos, uma empresa comprometida com a qualidade do produto, a sustentabilidade e as pessoas. 

Operamos nos três estados do Sul do Brasil com nossa matriz sediada em Venâncio Aires, Rio Grande do Sul e filiais nas cidades de Araranguá, Pouso Redondo e Canoinhas em Santa Catarina e também em Rio Azul, no Paraná. 
 
Somos a maior exportadora de tabaco brasileiro para a China. Esse resultado é porque na CBT, desde a sua origem, acreditamos que a qualidade do nosso produto é fundamental. Por isso, baseamos nossas operações em pilares sólidos: valorização do produto, rastreabilidade e sustentabilidade da cadeia produtiva. Focados em manter o crescimento, atualmente estamos empenhados em buscar novos mercados globais para o nosso produto de qualidade.

Além da nossa atuação no mercado, que impacta positivamente na economia do Sul do Brasil, também estamos comprometidos com a sustentabilidade social e ambiental. Trabalhamos com estratégias e ações baseadas em uma agenda ESG para gerar impacto positivo em nossos colaboradores e nas comunidades onde atuamos.

Para a CBT, a qualidade faz parte de tudo o que fazemos. Isso porque acreditamos que as pessoas fazem a diferença!

Isso é Estilo China! 
Isso é CBT!

Name: Mashonaland Tobacco Company (Pvt) Ltd.
Description:
Mashonaland Tobacco Company (Pvt.) Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Alliance One International, Inc. 

Alliance One International is a leading independent leaf tobacco merchant serving the world's cigarette manufacturers. The company was formed on May 13, 2005, as a result of the merger of DIMON Incorporated and Standard Commercial Corporation, both world leaders in tobacco processing. The creation of Alliance One brings together 200 years of combined experience and expertise, establishing a formidable competitor with a clear focus on its customers, as well as a vision for the future.

Alliance One selects, purchases, processes, packs, stores, and ships leaf tobacco. In certain developing markets, we also provide agronomy expertise and financing for the growing of leaf tobacco. Alliance One neither manufactures nor sells cigarettes or other consumer tobacco products. Our shares trade on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AOI.

Name: Kretek International
Description:
Founded in 1983, Kretek International, Inc. is a privately held distribution and marketing company with business concentrated in the specialty tobacco and OTP categories. Kretek’s mission is to continuously provide superior quality and value in a growing range of imported tobacco products and accessories, and personal products for its customers and consumers. 

Kretek International is the exclusive U. S. marketer and distributor of Djarum cigars, Dreams cigars, and DjEEP lighters. Kretek markets and distributes Voodoo Hookah tobaccos & accessories, Cuban Rounds Premium Cigars in Sealed Fresh 3-Packs, as well as Samuel Gawith and MacBaren pipe tobaccos, plus many other specialty tobacco products and accessories.

Name: JTI Srbija
Description:
JTI’s office in Serbia is located in Belgrade, whereas tobacco factory is placed in Senta. Until now, JTI has invested more than 2,4 billion american dollars in Serbia. JTI is the first and the largest direct Japanese investment in Serbia. We engages more than 1.000 agriculturists, their family members, as well as seasonal workers. 

JT International A.D. Senta was awarded the Top Employers Serbia and Top Employers Europe and Top Employers Global certification.  

We were formed in 1999 when our parent company JT Group acquired the non-US operations of R. J. Reynolds. Since then, our international workforce has driven two decades of growth.

Today, we have more than 44,000 employees driving our success all over the world. Our mission is to nurture our internationally recognized brand roster while leading the way in Reduced-Risk Products and new ways of doing business.

We are committed to making our business not only the fastest growing of its kind, but also the most innovative and sustainably run.

Countries where our products are distributed: 130
Employees around the world: 44,000
Nationalities represented across our workforce: 110+

A 'follow' confirms you are 18+.

Name: LEGACY TBI
Description:
LEGACY Tobacco Brand was founded in 2020 and specializes in the production of premium cigarettes as well as shisha molasses, shisha accessories, and e-cigarettes, tailored to satisfy all the tastes and preferences of our consumers.

With its head offices located in the UAE and Lebanon, LEGACY Tobacco delivers top quality products and tobacco solutions across the MENA region, Eastern Europe, and Africa ensuring best in class services underpinned by a strong adult customer and consumer focus.

LEGACY Tobacco’s manufacturing facilities are fully automated and equipped with the latest up-to-date technology for tobacco processing

Name: Tobacco Media Group (TMG)
Description:
Tobacco Media Group (TMG) is the publisher of Tobacco Business magazine (tobaccobusiness.com) and host of the Tobacco Plus Expo trade show (TPE). TMG is dedicated to providing businesses with the necessary tools, resources and information needed to be successful in today's competitive market. Tobacco Business magazine, the official publication of the TPE Show, is the only tobacco industry magazine that encompasses all categories of tobacco and smoking products, including premium tobacco, smokeless, cigarettes, vapor, pipe tobacco and new this year, the alternative market. 

Both TMG and the TPE Show are part of Kretek International, Inc.

Name: Tabacos Marasca
Description:
A Tabacos Marasca é uma empresa familiar, fundada em 1996 em Cerro Grande do Sul, região Sul do Estado do Rio Grande do Sul, pelo Diretor-Presidente Moacir Marasca.
Desde 2006 Venâncio Aires, região Central do Estado, um dos principais polos de processamento de tabaco do Mundo, tornou-se sede da empresa. Com uma infra-estrutura de 23,5 mil metros quadrados de construção própria, onde concentram-se as atividades de compra e estocagem de tabaco cru, além da capacidade de processar 15 tons/hora de tabaco.
Desde a data de constituição até os dias de hoje, a Tabacos Marasca sempre manteve uma postura de responsabilidade e comprometimento com a sustentabilidade do negócio, baseada bos principios de seu fundador. 
 A Tabacos Marasca atua na produção, beneficiamento e comercialização das variedades de Tabaco Flue-Cured Virgínia e Burley, baseando-se no cultivo integrado, ou seja, a empresa oferece sementes, agroquímicos, fertilizantes e assistência técnica especializada aos agricultores, para que em contrapartida os mesmos possam produzir o tabaco de acordo com os padrões de qualidade exigidos. 
A empresa vem aumento gradativamente sua participação no mercado, fornecendo tabaco para mais de 40 clientes nos cinco continentes, obedecendo rigorosamente os padrões de qualidade do produto e satisfação do cliente.
Nossos produtos:
* Laminas VA e BY
* Talos
* Scraps
* Fines
* Fibras
* Tabaco picado
Location: Venancio Aires, Rio Grande Do Sul

Name: Villiger Söhne AG
Description:
VILLIGER is one of the leading cigar and cigarillo manufacturers in Europe.


With a production capacity of more than 1.5 billion units per year and over 1,500 employees, Villiger Söhne is a leading player in the tobacco market.

Production is concentrated in four factories: in the company headquarters in Switzerland (Pfeffikon, Lucerne), in Germany (Waldshut-Tiengen and Bünde), and in Indonesia (Ngoro/Mojokerto).



Distribution takes place through our own distribution companies in the most important national markets (and in the US and France) and through qualified importers in the smaller markets. The two producing umbrella companies, Villiger Söhne AG in Switzerland and Villiger Söhne GmbH in Germany, export to around 80 countries worldwide. You can also find VILLIGER cigars in duty-free shops.



We would also like to invite you to our flagship store/the VILLIGER store in the Swiss capital, Bern, where every cigar lover is sure to find something that’s right for them.

Description:
Berca kawan sejati adalah perusahaan distributor rokok yang sedang berkembang di Malang, Indonesia. Berawal dari kesamaan misi lima sekawan, membentuk perusahaan ini untuk mendistribusikan produk rokok di beberapa titik di luar pulau Jawa, pada bulan April 2018. Lima sekawan dilambangkan dengan lima tangan yang memiliki warna berbeda-beda, artinya karakter yang berbeda dari lima sekawan. Lambang ini dijadikan sebagai logo perusahaan.
Kantor pusat kami berada di Jalan Retawu 30, Malang. Saat ini, kami memiliki dua kantor perwakilan distribusi yaitu berada di kabupaten Mojokerto, Jawa Timur dan Silangit, Sumatera Utara. Name: Skruf Snus AB
Description:
Skruf Snus AB startades för att röra om i grytan. Ända sedan starten år 2002 har vi visat att saker kan göras på ett annorlunda sätt. Allt med en strävan efter att bli det självklara valet för alla snusare. Vi kan nu stolt konstatera att vi lyckades med det, tack vare alla våra engagerade medarbetare. 
 
Idag är vi Nordens näst största snustillverkare med över 300 medarbetare och vi fortsätter att växa. Vi har inte endast en stark position på den svenska marknaden utan också på den europeiska. Skruf Snus AB ligger bakom varumärkena Skruf, Knox, Smålands Brukssnus och ZONE X. Skruf Snus ingår i den globala koncernen Imperial Brands.
 
Skruf har fått Soliditets kreditbetyg ”AAA” och UC:s ”Högsta kreditvärdighet”. 2014 blev vi Årets företag i Sävsjö kommun, där vi har vår fabrik.
 
För ytterligare information om vår historia och produkterna se www.skruf.se.

Name: Casa 1910 Cigars
Description:
We are a premium cigar and lifestyle brand that captures the national pride and spirit of the Mexican Revolution through exclusive high-end products. 

Our aim is to revolutionize the industry by creating a cigar that perfectly embodies the two faces of Mexico – its deep traditions and its unrivaled dynamism. 

We believe it is time that Mexico leaves its mark in the industry, by launching a fresh, innovative and new premium brand, where we do things in a captivating manner.

Please meet our Editions, and new family members:

Revolutionary Edition.

This edition commemorates the first battles of the Mexican Revolution, events that changed the course of history and defined the nation's character. This is why we decided to use 100% Mexican tobacco, showcasing our pride for this land, its customs and deep history. Each cigar is an expression of our artisans’ quest to capture and communicate the living spirit of revolutionary Mexico.

Cavalry Edition

The Cavalry edition pays tribute to the horses and their riders who fought in the Mexican Revolution.

Mexican horses are the result of a mixture of breeds, which is why in this new line we set out to blend tobacco of different origins - Mexican and Nicaraguan – creating a cigar as unique and vigorous as the horses that carried the revolutionaries to victory.
This edition commemorates and embodies these exemplary equines.

Soldadera Edition

The Mexican Revolution would have been impossible without the effort and dedication of the Soldaderas. These brave female warriors persevered and refused to be defeated despite their constant condemnation as a result of the ideologies of the time. Some of them would wear trousers and hats to go under the radar. These women were incredibly loyal and faithful to their Revolutionary principles, fighting for the cause of justice and freedom.

As the only licensed producer of AIR GLOBAL products in the country, Al Fakher Al Mithaliya is known for setting high standards in quality and authenticity.

In November 2021, we completed a modern manufacturing facility equipped with the latest technology, built to meet international standards. We are also proud to have received the ISO 9001:2015 certification, which shows our strong commitment to maintaining the highest quality management standards in all parts of our operations.

Name: Commonwealth - Altadis, Inc.
Description:
Commonwealth-Altadis, Inc. (CA) is the U.S. division of Imperial Tobacco Group (ITG), a leading international company with a broad market footprint and a unique portfolio of products across all tobacco categories. One of the world’s top producers of high-quality tobacco products, ITG reaches more than 160 countries, and the company currently employs more than 36,000 employees while operating 46 different manufacturing sites.

At Commonwealth-Altadis, we leverage the strength of our parent company and the value of our tobacco portfolio to deliver results – for our customers, our employees, and for the future of our business.  Known for our signature brands, including USA Gold, Montclair, Dutch Masters, Backwoods, Phillies and the award-winning Phillies Krome, we represent a powerful growth engine for ITG. CA was created in 2011 through the strategic partnership between two ITG-owned tobacco organizations – Commonwealth Brands, the fourth largest cigarette manufacturer in the U.S., and Altadis U.S.A, the U.S. division of the world’s fifth largest cigarette manufacturer – and today we pursue superior customer service and responsible marketing practices to achieve lasting success.  With more than 580 headquarters and sales employees working at the home office and in regions across the country, and another 475 employees in distribution and manufacturing, we are committed to empowering our people and advancing our portfolio of brands.

Based in Fort Lauderdale, Fla, Commonwealth-Altadis serves customers throughout the Americas. Today, we are working responsibly to expand our reach and maintain strong profit margins, offering the promise of a secure future for ITG’s U.S. division and for our employees.  As part of a global organization with a long and storied history, we have the dedication, energy and resources to grow and succeed in a changing marketplace.

Name: Cahan Tobacco International (CTI)
Description: Cahan Tobacco International (CTI) - part of Cahan Holding - is Azerbaijan-based tobacco company engaged with production and distribution of local cigarette brands. Currently, the product portfolio of CTI includes 8 brands and 80 SKUs in 3 formats.

Name: Hail & Cotton
Description:
Hail & Cotton remains a family-owned company with deep roots, in communities around the world. For 100 years now, we have produced the highest quality tobacco while cultivating personal relationships that pass down through generations. Our boardrooms are the tobacco fields in Wilson and Springfield, in Harare, Rio Grande do Sul, and Jember.

It all starts at the top.

Our three presidents understand the hard work and commitment necessary for success. It means that we treat people and the product with respect. That the value of a relationship means more than the price of a bale.

Change is a constant in this industry. Our culture is to hold firm in our business ethics, values and core principles or practices with what has always worked, whilst remaining innovative and being responsible stewards. Honoring our world. Protecting our environment. Nurturing our next generation. And standing by every employee, partner grower and customer of Hail & Cotton.

It’s what families do.

Description:

Dedicated uninterruptedly for more than 40 years to the art of handcrafting cigars, we have preserved a traditional style of cigar making and the use of robust Nicaraguan tobaccos in our blends have been the hallmark of our company.

Today, our cigars are exported to more than 45 different countries around the world.

We are specialized in both manufacturing and exporting of tobacco machines. With over 20 years experience within the Cigarette Manufacturing and Packaging Industry our team is able to offer a wealth of experience and a flexible solution to your individual requirements.

We have an ever ready fleet of expert technicians and innovative and creative engineers who pump in relentless effort all through the day and night to perfect its machinery and meet its deadline delivery.

We can supply both tobacco primary line and cigarette secondary line, which includes tobacco primary line, tobacco reconstituted line, and cigarette makers, cigarette packing lines, filter rods makers, as well as spare parts for machines. 

The equipment can be altered and modified accordingly to specific requirements and be capable of customizing any machinery for tobacco industry. It is able to encompass the customer’s specific request or modification specifications.

Our aim is to contribute to customers success by providing products and services to meet customers specific demands. We are successfully servicing companies of different size-from new companies to multinationals.

Name: PLASENCIA CIGARS
Description:
Since 1865, we’ve been mastering the art of tobacco growth and craftsmanship. From the rich fields of Cuba to the sun-kissed soils of Nicaragua and Honduras, we have tilled the land to create the finest handmade cigars – from the earth to the heavens.
For five generations, the finest tabaquero tradition has been rolled into every cigar that bears our name. Tobacco is in our blood and soul, and we have relentlessly determination to perfect every step of the cigar-making process, from seed to smoke.
It’s not just our passion. It’s our reason for existing.
