Name: Cia Sulamericana de Tabacos
Description:
Foi no ano de 1996 que começou a operar uma das principais empresas fabricantes de cigarros do Brasil – A Cia Sulamericana de Tabacos. Na época, a pequena linha de produção instalada no município de Duque de Caxias, colocava no mercado algo em torno de 20.000 caixas de cigarros por ano, número insignificante perto das 300.000 caixas vendidas atualmente.

  A Sulamericana já nasceu com uma ótima imagem junto a rede de distribuidores, que fazia seus produtos chegarem ao consumidor de forma rápida e com qualidade. Com o passar dos anos, essa rede foi aumentando e aprimorando seus serviços, alcançando assim, um altíssimo nível no fornecimento de cigarros até o consumidor. Atendendo com eficácia os mais de 22 estados onde a Cia está presente, e, seus respectivos 130.000 pontos de vendas.
Location: Duque de Caxias, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Philip Morris Bulgaria
Description:
Philip Morris Bulgaria is part of Philip Morris International (PMI) - world’s most successful cigarette company, which has most recently been transforming its business, building a vision of smoke-free future. We are happy that our company is becoming a leader in the transformation for the entire industry. 

We are a multinational company with 174 years long history and products sold in 180 countries around the globe. PMI represents a diverse workforce with more than 70,000 people who hail from every corner of the globe. Currently we have around 100 employees in Bulgaria, who work towards our common mission and share the same values. 

At PMI we strive to create a motivating work environment and we are proud that for the fifth consecutive year, Philip Morris International has been recognized as a ""Global Top Employer” for its offices around the world, as well as regional “Top Employer” in Europe, the Middle East and Southeast Asia. Philip Morris Bulgaria also received the ""Top Employer"" certificate for a leading employer in Bulgaria for the fifth consecutive year, ranking among the 7 companies with this award in the country.

Creating an inspiring work environment and opportunities for development of all employees is part of our strategy for diversity and inclusion, as PMI has become the first international company to receive the global certificate ""EQUAL-SALARY"" for equal pay for equal work in 2019 for all markets in which it operates. We are proud that earlier this year, Philip Morris International was included in the Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index (GEI).

Name: Real Tobacco S.A.
Description:
Real Tobacco S.A. is a cigarette manufacturing company established in 2017. The  30,000 sq.m. state-of-the art factory houses 6 high-speed production lines and manufactures high-end and innovative cigarette products with its trademarked "MULTILOCK" packaging technology for over 120 markets on five continents.

The team is lead by our COO Mr. Hristo Latchev who is an experienced FMCG and tobacco expert with over 25 years of industry experiencce. Mr. Hristo Latchev has an extensive background in the FMCG industry, including product development, manufacturing and production, multilevel distribution, marketing and market feedback.

Name: Juice Sauz Manufacturing & Distribution
Description:
Founded in 2015, Juice Sauz manufactures and distributes high quality e-liquids at an affordable price. Our passion for high quality products and outstanding customer service has led to us becoming one of the largest manufacturers and distributors in the UK, supplying countries all over the world.

Manufacturing is the cornerstone of our business. As well as producing our own brands, that include V4Pour, Over The Border, Jam Vape Co, Drifter, SALT, Duet and Vybes we also provide OEM and co-packing services to some of the most iconic vape brands. 

Our team are experts in flavour development, product design and marketing. We analyse the latest trends in a hugely competitive industry on your behalf, ensuring that your e-liquid launches into the UK market in the right way. 

As a distributor, we work closely with global brands and stores, stocking a wide range of third party e-liquids to the latest vaping hardware. We pride ourselves on offering a service that gives our customers access to the latest products at the best price to maximise sales and profitability.

Partnering with Juice Sauz, you get knowledge, expertise and passion in every product we make, so if you're looking to manufacture your own e-liquid brand or stock your vape shop with the best e-liquids and hardware, contact us today, Wholesale@Juicesauz.co.uk or call +44 (0) 1522 581554.

Name: AJF Cigar Co. Portfolio
Description: The AJ Fernandez Portfolio is a collection of premium cigars that are distinctly AJ Fernandez. Featuring masterfully selected tobacco hailing primarily from Nicaragua, Portfolio offers diverse and balanced blends for cigar lovers at every stage of their smoking journey.

Name: Mkwawa Leaf Tobacco Company Limited
Description: Mkwawa Leaf Tobacco  sells processed tobacco leaf.

Name: Star Agritech International
Description:
Star Agritech International is a privately owned corporation with its mission to exclusively service Small and Medium-sized companies. SAI offers Tobacco raw materials, sustainably sourced from various origins to its clients with the motto “Passion in Excellence”. Our top priority is to provide excellent service to our clients.
 
Our leaf operations are predicated on the new emerging reality in the Tobacco Industry that Tobacco will be in short supply in this decade caused by the decoupling of EU subsidies, the uncertainty surrounding emerging markets in Africa, and the impact of government regulations.
 
In addition, Multinational Cigarette manufacturers have declared their intent to control up to 80% of their requirements and are collaborating increasingly with the major leaf merchants at the expense of Medium-sized companies.
 
In recognition of this, SAI has diligently established itself directly with major indigenous Producers / Processors to remove traders and leaf merchants from the supply chain thereby allowing SAI to source at the best prices and to ensure that Independent Privately owned companies that choose to work with it would always have the security of tobacco supply for the long term.

Name: Haze Bars
Description:
Welcome to Haze Bars – Where Innovation Meets Sustainability in Vaping

At Haze Bars, we're pioneering a new era in the vaping industry with our groundbreaking technology. Our mission is to revolutionize the vaping experience by introducing a unique fan and motor system that significantly reduces battery size while enhancing efficiency and sustainability.

Our Innovation:
Our product is a testament to innovative engineering. The Haze Bars vape features a compact fan and motor system, a first in the industry. This system is designed to generate electricity when the user inhales, spinning the fan to create enough voltage to heat the e-liquid. This not only reduces the battery size by 25% compared to standard industry batteries but also offers a more sustainable vaping experience.

Sustainability at Our Core:
We believe in creating products that are not only innovative but also environmentally responsible. The reduced battery size in our vapes means less environmental impact, aligning with our commitment to sustainability.

Our Vision:
Haze Bars envisions a world where vaping is not just an experience but a statement of style and responsibility. We aim to lead the vaping industry towards a more sustainable future, with products that are as eco-friendly as they are efficient.

Join Our Journey:
We are more than just a vaping company; we are a movement towards a more responsible and innovative future. Follow our journey on LinkedIn as we share insights into our product development, celebrate milestones, and discuss the future of vaping technology.

For Partners and Collaborators:
We are always open to collaborations and partnerships that align with our vision. If you're interested in joining us on this exciting journey, please reach out to us.

Contact Us:
For inquiries, collaborations, or more information about Haze Bars, feel free to contact us through our socials @hazebars.

Name: Pipes & Cigars
Description:
In 1999, we had the idea that with brick and mortar pipe and cigar shops around the country closing their doors right and left, there was a need for a place that disenfranchised enthusiasts could go where they would receive the service and the feel of a hometown store. With that idea in mind, PipesandCigars.com was born.

Starting with three employees, we scoured the landscape to find the products that people wanted and worked feverishly to bring the industry’s best pricing to the table. In the ensuing years, we’ve been able to accomplish this and then some. Our site brings you many exclusive items, including our award-winning brand of pipe tobaccos, Hearth & Home. We’ve created a wide variety of innovative samplers and gift sets in both the cigar and pipe arenas, and we have a number of pages of informative and entertaining advice that goes beyond just selling products. In addition, our blog site TalkingTobacco.com brings you reviews, knowledge, and commentary from our staff.

Now housed in a huge, state-of-the-art facility in Bethlehem, PA, we have a massive volume of product on hand, and a gigantic climate controlled area that keeps our cigars and bulk tobaccos at the ideal temperature and humidity. Our large staff and cutting edge systems allow us to process and ship orders quickly and accurately, and our volume allows us to get the best pricing possible. The result is that we can deliver the consummate fusion of value, selection and service. Just as importantly, we will always listen to your thoughts and suggestions to make your experience with us even better.

Welcome aboard!

Name: 3H Tobacco
Description:
About us:
Headquartered in Morogoro, Tanzania, 3H Tobacco Limited (3HT) is responsible for the sourcing of tobacco leaf from contracting smallholder tobacco farmers through primary Societies (Agricultural Marketing
Cooperative Societies-Amcos) in various tobacco growing regions of mainland Tanzania. The company is engaged in purchasing, processing of a variety of flue-cured, burley and dark fire-cured tobaccos and providing supply chain services to manufacturers of consumer tobacco products in
Egypt, Indonesia, China, Dubai, Middle East and south Asian countries. We are the supplier of choice of leaf tobacco in Tanzania and we also have other agro-related businesses that we operate.
3H Tobacco Limited provides agronomy support and research in modern tobacco production systems including efficient and sustainable tobacco curing methods to contracted smallholder farmers.

Our Products and Services:
At 3H Tobacco Limited we are committed to procuring quality,
sustainably-grown Flue-cured Virginia, Burley and Dark Fire-cured tobacco from
our contracted small-holder farmers and other third party suppliers who share
our core values. We have decades of experience and expertise in agronomical
services, enabling us to support our contracted farmers in meeting Good
Agricultural Practices (GAP) and Agricultural Labor Practices (ALP) programs.

Our extensive experience in dealing with large numbers of farmers,
combined with our reliable supply of competitively-priced, compliant
tobacco leaf makes us an industry leader. Furthermore, our longstanding
relationships with farmers, industry stakeholders, and customers ensure we
are well-placed to full-fill any specific customer requirements.

Name: ELFBARDE
Description: Einweg E-Zigaretten, wie die Elf Bar 600, sind eine beliebte Wahl für viele Raucher, die auf der Suche nach einer gesünderen Alternative oder einer Möglichkeit, ihre Nikotinsucht zu reduzieren sind. Diese tragbaren Geräte, die in verschiedenen Geschmacksrichtungen erhältlich sind, basieren auf dem Prinzip der Verdampfung von Liquids und werden auch als "Vapes" bezeichnet. Wie bereits beschrieben ist die Elf Bar 600 mit Nikotin (20mg) und auch ohne erhältlich. Außer dem produziert sie im Gegensatz zu herkömmlichen Zigaretten keinen Rauch, sondern verdampft ein Liquid, das in der Regel aus Propylenglykol, Glycerin und Aromen besteht. Die Elfbar ist besonders praktisch für unterwegs, da sie kompakt und leicht ist. Sie ist auch einweg, was bedeutet, dass sie nach dem Gebrauch entsorgt werden muss und nicht wiederverwendet werden kann. Insgesamt bietet die Elfbar eine gute Alternative zu herkömmlichen Zigaretten, die individuelle Geschmackspräferenzen der Nutzer berücksichtigt und gleichzeitig eine gesündere Wahl darstellt.

Name: Cloud 9 Distributors LLC
Description:
What is Zumerret?
An ancient custom re imagined for modern enjoyment.

In many ancient languages, Zumerret means “precious stone”, and Zumerret Hookah is as admired and luxurious as its namesake. We source the finest tobacco from the US, France and Poland . We rely on sought after farmers because we believe that only premium products can deliver the exquisite flavors we seek.

Once cultivated, the tobacco is meticulously mixed with rich flavors by our masterful tobacco chefs. Then we ask tasters from around the globe to test each flavor. The results are sure to thrill the palate.

Exclusive Flavors
We want all to Taste the Luxury.

Offering our customers, the highest quality hookah experience is paramount to our success. Our products and processes are designed with this goal in mind, and they are why we’ve become the fastest growing hookah tobacco brand in the US.

We invite you to ask for Zumerret Hookah at your local lounges and smoke shops, and Taste the Luxury we offer in each and every puff. 

Zumerret Gold Edition features a blend of exotic fruits and high quality, premium tobacco. Enjoy zesty splashes of creamy, fruity and minty prime mixes. All flavors in this edition are exclusive to the Zumerret brand, and are handcrafted to evoke the ultimate in shisha joy.

The Zumerret Blue Edition features popular Hookah flavors that have been expertly crafted for a higher quality smoke. Blueberries, apples and cherries add a delicious tartness to our premium tobacco. You’ll find that while these flavor names are habitual in the market, our products last longer and offer a superior taste.

Dark tobacco leaves and exotic fruits make The Zumerret Black Edition a favorite among hookah connoisseurs. These flavors are the ultimate expressions of the Zumerret brand. They are also the perfect choice for regular smokers seeking a sublime buzz from the higher nicotine levels. Not recommended for beginners.

Name: La Casa Del Habano Nyon
Description:
Casa del Habano est un prestigieux réseau international de boutiques franchisées par Habanos S.A. 

Ce label de qualité offre des espaces entièrement dédiés aux cigares cubains haut de gamme pour le plus grand bonheur des amateurs de puros. Il existe actuellement plus de 140 casas établies sur cinq continents de par le monde. Ainsi, notre boutique située au bord du lac Léman dans la charmante ville de Nyon est la première du genre en Suisse-Romande. Ce qui distingue une Casa del Habano d’autres boutiques spécialisées, c’est l’exclusivité de l’offre des produits cubains qui y sont précieusement conservés. Nous recevons l’ensemble des gammes de produits Habanos en priorité mondiale et sommes pour cela, directement approvisionnés par l’importateur officiel ; Intertabak A.G. 

Outre les séries exclusives griffées « Casa Del Habano », les séries limitées, les éditions régionales et les cigares vintages, notre boutique offre désormais une gamme unique en suisse de pièces spécialement dédiées aux collectionneurs avides de perles rares.  

C’est pour nous un honneur de vouer chaque jour notre savoir-faire et notre passion à une clientèle hédoniste, par la valorisation du patrimoine cubain et de ses légendaires cigares. Offrant une prestation unique, nous mêlons enthousiasme et soif de partage dans une vocation à laquelle nous sommes entièrement dévoués. 

Notre philosophie s’allie à l’essence des valeurs transmises par la marque Habanos, pour créer une atmosphère exceptionnelle régnant dans un lieu raffiné entièrement consacré aux havanes. Au-delà de notre sélection de cigares premium, nous proposons une vaste collection de spiritueux, sélectionnée minutieusement par notre spécialiste. Jouissant de son expérience de plus de 25 ans au plus haut niveau, ce conseiller saura réjouir tous les érudits, mais aussi les simples curieux, friands de raretés. 

Laissez-vous envouter par cet espace hors du commun, chez nous, cuba se révèlera à vous sans concession…

Name: Mighty Corporation (Tobacco Company)
Description:
Among the Philippines' top 1,000 corporations, Mighty Corporation (MC) is a fully integrated 71-year old tobacco company located in the City of Malolos, Bulacan, Philippines. The factory lies in a 9-hectare property 50 kilometers north of Manila. 

Mighty traces its roots to La Campana Fabrica de Tobaccos, Inc. This company was founded in 1945 by a highly entrepreneurial immigrant named Wong Chu King and several partners. The company celebrates its 70th anniversary in 2015, basking in the success of its strategy to win market share.

From its first factory located along Tayabas St. in Manila, La Campana produced native cigarettes as well as locally popular cortos and regaliz cigars. A second factory was built in 1948 along Pasong Tamo, Makati. In 1951, the company acquired the land in Barangay Olympia Makati that now serves as the headquarters of Mighty Corporation.

In 1963, Wong Chu King founded Tobacco Industries of the Philippines (TIP) with a modern cigarette factory located in Malolos, Bulacan. From that sprawling nine-hectare factory, the company produced American-blended cigarettes using the brand names Duke, Windsor and Tricycle.

The company went through a difficult period from 1965 to 1982. The unsinkable Wong Chu King persevered, however. By 1985, the company reestablished itself as Mighty Corporation, acquiring the trademarks of its rival Alhambra Industries in 1993. This enabled the company to corner the native cigarette market.

Between 2001 and 2007, Mighty invested in modern plants and state-of-the-art packaging facilities. This enabled Mighty to achieve a fully integrated production and packing line. This acquisition of modern manufacturing technologies prepared the company to compete head-to-head with the once dominant player in the Philippine cigarette market.

In addition the Multinational Cigarette manufacturers have declared their intent to control up to 80% of their own requirements and are partnering increasingly with the major leaf merchants at the expense of Medium sized companies.

Name: Bundesverband der Zigarrenindustrie e.V  /  German Cigar Manufacturers Association
Description:
Der BdZ ist das Sprachrohr der meist mittelständischen, familiengeführten Zigarrenhersteller und Importeure und vertritt deren Interessen in Politik, Ministerien und Verwaltung. 
Mittelstand ist charakteristisch in der Zigarrenindustrie, deswegen ist der BdZ der Interessenvertreter für Mittelstandspolitik in der Tabakindustrie.
Hauptziel ist Zigarren und Zigarillos als das legitime Genussmittel zu etablieren, denn Zigarren und Zigarillos werden anerkanntermaßen nur von Erwachsenen gehobenen Alters und auch nur gelegentlich konsumiert - eine Jugendschutzproblematik liegt nicht vor. Zigarren und Zigarillos werden in aufwendigen und lohnintensiven Prozessen hergestellt. 
Um diese Vielfalt für den Verbraucher und die Arbeitsplätze in Deutschland, der EU aber vor allem in mittelamerikanischen Drittländern zu erhalten, setzt sich der BdZ für eine gesonderte Regulierung des Genuss- und Kulturgutes ein. Die Gesetzgebung muss bei Tabakregulierung die einzelnen Produkte unterschiedlich behandeln und die bestehenden Ausnahmen für Zigarren / Zigarillos beibehalten.

Name: E-Cigarette Answers
Description:
Be forewarned and please forgive us if we are rough around the edges at times, we are not internet marketers with a massive overseas writing team at their disposal, we are vapers who were sick and tired of bogus vaping review sites.  Who better to create the best e-cig review website than actual members of the vaping community?

Look, we know you're tired of bs, we are too. It was about time that a group of actual vapers created an ecig / vaporizer review site instead of being stuck with the agendas of professional internet marketers. E-Cigarette Answers is a group of electronic cigarette experts from across the country and all walks of life.
 
Looking at an ecig website that is run by internet marketers is like being forced to watch Justin Bieber butcher a Led Zeppelin song!
 
At E-Cigarette Answers our thing is that we are not a company, we are a community. With all of the ecigs and e-juices out there it can be tough to know what’s decent and what’s junk. Somebody had to step up and give you the truth so you could find the best e-cig.
 
To be the best e-cig review site we knew that what was out there wasn’t cutting it. Way too many agendas. To do a real ecig / vaporizer review, the reviewer needs total independence. We decided on a “blind” ecig review process and a blind e-liquid review process.
 
That means that our reviewer did not know what he or she would be reviewing, they would not talk to anyone about the review, they would use the ecigarette for two weeks and send the results to George. Nothing would be censored.
 
The ecig review also has to be done by someone who's Knowledgable. Every one of our electronic cigarette review specialists, and there are a lot of them, HAD to have 4 years experience vaping with at least 5 different e-cig, mod, vaporizer products. Trust me, most of us have probably used at least 10 different products and we know cheap e-cigs and we know quality e-cigs. 

That’s us. E-Cigarette Answers, we’re the real deal.

Name: Ashton Distributors
Description:
Ashton is one of the world's premier luxury cigar brands.  Handcrafted in the Dominican Republic, Ashton cigars are made to the highest quality standards using only the finest aged tobaccos.  With an infinite commitment to quality, consistency and excellence, Ashton is celebrated worldwide for the very finest in premium cigars.

Founded in 1985 by Robert Levin, Ashton Distributors, Inc. is family-owned and operated with headquarters in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.  The Ashton tradition is rooted in the company's unparalleled commitment to quality and consumer satisfaction.  Handmade in the Dominican Republic in the legendary Tabacalera A. Fuente factory, Ashton cigars utilize only the finest, most exceptional, aged tobaccos. Every detail, from meticulous wrapper selection to the complex processes of aging and blending, receives the utmost accommodation in the manufacture of each cigar. Ashton has received numerous awards and accolades through the years and is a perennial "Top 5" brand in the U.S. market, as well as an international favorite with distribution in over 60 countries around the world.

Following decades of success with the Fuente family, Ashton expanded its portfolio in the early 2000s by partnering with rising cigar-maker, Jose “Pepin” Garcia, to develop two new brands in Nicaragua.  Renowned today as two of the fastest-growing cigar brands in the world, La Aroma de Cuba and San Cristobal continue to garner unrivaled critical acclaim and commendation.  Partnership with the Garcia family exemplifies Ashton's immense devotion to quality by collaborating with only the world's most prolific cigar manufacturers.

In addition to Ashton, La Aroma de Cuba and San Cristobal cigars, Ashton Distributors, Inc. is the proprietor of Savoy Humidors & Accessories, as well as the official U.S. distributor of Peterson Pipes & Pipe Tobacco.

Name: Premium Tobacco International DMCC
Description:
Founded in 2002, Premium Tobacco Group (“the Group”) was established by a team of industry veterans who previously held senior executive roles at major multinationals or led successful independent firms. In its early years, these founding shareholders were deeply involved in the Group’s daily operations, sales, and financial controls to ensure a strong foundation. In 2022, the Group underwent a strategic leadership transition, appointing a new generation of executives—led by CEO Philip Mainetti and CFO Andre Konzen—while the founders moved into advisory roles on the Board of Directors.

The Group was built on a strategic vision to fill a critical gap in the global market. Recognizing the high concentration of market share among the industry's two largest processors, Premium was positioned as the essential "third global player" that manufacturers desired to foster competition and reduce risk. Today, we manage the entire leaf cycle—from grower support and purchasing to processing and logistics—with a specialized focus on the high-volume Virginia and Burley tobacco sectors.

Name: Media Rueda bv
Description:
From hobby to passion
Smoking a cigar is a great way to relax, meet friends and generally have a good time. This is exactly how we started and how we all met each other. While sharing our experiences and having fun, it became clear that we all were very passionate about the product. And thus we met more on a regular basis, rather than occasionally. And from there on, it is history as they say…

Let’s get serious!
Based in Europe, it’s easy to have access to Cuban cigars, and it’s usually the way we all get started. First the more classic brands and modules, then some more exclusive ones and eventually we’re hunting the elusive and rare cigars that we don’t get to smoke every day. 

But what about those other countries in Latin America which are a lot less known here?  Social media and some of the better local shops, made us aware of this whole other market out there, to which we didn’t have ready access. And thus the hunt was on (again)! We searched the forums, social media pictures, bought online (some with success, others less so) and tried to get our hands on as many brands as we could, just to expand our horizons.

The realisation soon hit that if we started our own project, we could make these cigars also available to people here. And so that is where we started some months ago.

We could be described as a bunch of like minded friends with a passion for excellent cigars. The potential for more cigars in the European market is evident, and we’re committed to help make that happen!

Name: Falto Cigars
Description:
The Concept Behind Falto Cigars
Since 1995, the year when La Garita Cigar Company, Inc. (today legally known as Tabacalera Falto, Inc.) was founded, for Luis J. Falto, President, CEO and Master Blender of the company, the creation of unique cigar blends has been a labor of love - it is the concept of Falto Cigars. 
The blends are unique because he creates them with a specific size or cigar vitola in mind.  This has been Falto’s concept, because he believes that a certain vitola best complements and develop the different tobacco flavors that make up the blend of the cigar.  Contrary to the big, mass-market cigar companies, who manufacture their blends in various sizes, Tabacalera Falto, Inc. presents its blends in only one size. 
This method and perspective has taken Falto to create a collection of twenty wo (22) cigars, all different, repeating vitolas in only three (3) occasions.  It is important to point out that the latter, still have their own distinctive blends.  Of all the cigar collection, only one hundred (100) boxes are manufactured annually, whether they include twenty six (26), twenty five (25), twenty (20), ten (10) 
and/or five (5) cigars per box. 
Tabacalera Falto, Inc. also manufactures a number of cigar “mazos” or “bundles” (twenty five (25) per bundle), with blends that did not made the final blend, but remain premium cigars and part of the Falto Cigars portfolio.  These cigars, three (3) at the moment, are offered to clients in Puerto Rico and to selected clients in the United States. 
Moreover, with the desire to continue creating unique and different cigars, is the search for that tobacco, that may not be widely used in the industry, but are noble leaves with special flavors and textures. That they are not used should not disqualify them as bad tobacco, to the contrary, they are exquisite.  When combined in a blend a spectacular cigar can be achieved. 
This has been proven by the ratings and reviews published in cigar trade magazines.

Name: United Cigar Stores
Description:
Today, reflective of the brands storied history, United Cigar Stores is the e-commerce subsidiary of IMASCO Ltd. which services over 1,500 tobacconists both wholesale and retail and direct to American clients. The company also operates social clubs, most notably The Beverly Hills Cigar Club, rated Top 5 Private Memberships by Playboy Magazine and home to LOUIXS, the Bugatti Veyron of the cigar industry.

United Cigar Stores was the largest chain of cigar stores in the United States. Though initially specializing in cigars, it eventually sold many other items, such as Mickey Mouse watches and shoe trees. Founded in 1901, the chain represented the interests of the Consolidated Tobacco Company, the tobacco trust that controlled the American Tobacco Company and others. In September 1903 a settlement was reached with the chain’s competitors and all competition ended. By 1926 the chain had close to 3000 retail stores.

In early 2006, Grand Metropolitan added iHumidor, part of a $30 million portfolio, to its operations. Assets also include Cigar Club News, Cigar Registry, and Cigar Finder as consumers are relying more on technology to improve their experience. Portfolio brands in both retail and social clubs participate in most of the top 100 markets in the world including New York, Chicago, Los Angeles, Paris, London, and Dubai.

Description:
Welkom bij Vinche & Koopmans 1864 – waar geur en traditie samenkomen.

Doorheen de jaren zijn we steeds met onze tijd meegegaan, zonder onze roots te verliezen. Vandaag koppelen we onze rijke geschiedenis en opgebouwde vakkennis aan een hedendaags en inspirerend productgamma dat inspeelt op lifestyle, geur en welzijn. Naast ons vertrouwde assortiment in rookwaren, verdelen we sinds enkele jaren ook een zorgvuldig samengesteld aanbod aan huisparfums, geurkaarsen, diffusers, geurlampen en verzorgingsproducten.

Als exclusieve verdeler van sterke internationale merken zoals WoodWick, Yankee Candle, Millefiori Milano, Ashleigh & Burwood en Max Benjamin, brengen we sfeer en zintuiglijke luxe tot bij onze verkooppartners in België, Nederland en Luxemburg. Elk product in ons portfolio vertelt een verhaal – over vakmanschap, esthetiek en geurbeleving.

We werken nauw samen met gespecialiseerde retailzaken, concept stores en geselecteerde boetieks die dezelfde liefde voor kwaliteit en klantgerichtheid delen. Dankzij ons familiaal karakter en onze jarenlange ervaring zijn we meer dan een leverancier: we zijn een partner die meedenkt, ondersteunt en inspireert.

Onze klanten kunnen rekenen op een professionele service, correcte leveringen en een persoonlijke aanpak. Achter de schermen staat een klein maar toegewijd team klaar dat inzet op duurzame relaties, flexibiliteit en vertrouwen.

Wat ons al meer dan 160 jaar drijft, is nog steeds dezelfde overtuiging: alleen door kwaliteit, passie en service te combineren, maak je écht het verschil.

Welkom bij Vinche & Koopmans 1864 – een distributeur met een neus voor kwaliteit, verfijning en beleving.

Name: Raices Cubanas Cigars
Description:
Raices Cubanas, as the name suggests, was born from true Cuban roots. The Fábrica de Tabacos Raíces Cubanas factory was established on May 5th, 2003, in Danlí, Honduras by Romay Endemaño, his wife Maria (Lipa), and their son Hugo Endemaño. With a deep-seated heritage in Cuba’s tobacco industry, the Endemaño family continued their legacy in Miami before setting out to create something of their own in Honduras.

Ralph Montero, also a native Cuban, came to the US in 1970 and began working in his uncle’s cigar distribution business shortly after high school. With family ties to Cuba’s thriving pre-revolution tobacco trade, Ralph’s passion for cigars has spanned decades, contributing to the creation of several distinguished brands.

The paths of the Endemaños and Montero crossed in 1998, forming a bond that has only grown stronger over the years. From that first meeting to countless collaborations, they’ve shared a dedication to producing exceptional cigars. Today, we’re excited to announce the official partnership between the Endemaño family and Ralph Montero, bringing together their experience, craftsmanship, and heritage.

We proudly invite you to savor every rich flavor and unforgettable moment within our premium lineup of cigars — crafted from roots that run deep.

Smoke With Us!

Name: Tabaccheria Raffaello
Description:
La tabaccheria, ubicata in Corso Raffaello a Torino da più di 50 anni, è il fulcro per i servizi di ricevitoria e vendita di tabacco nella zona residenziale adiacente al noto Parco del Valentino, fantastica cornice di eventi di varia natura.

Nell'estate del 2015, grazie al contributo della proprietà precedente, il negozio ha subito una totale e completa ristrutturazione che ha avuto come  scopo l'ampliamento e l'ottimizzazione degli spazi operativi.

Il continuo passaggio automobilistico, alternativo alla viabilità generalmente trafficata tra la zona Crocetta con zona Nizza, e un sostenuto transito pedonale di studenti tra le varie facoltà universitarie e la fermata della metro, rendono la Tabaccheria Raffaello un punto strategico.

Queste condizioni, consolidate nel tempo, hanno permesso di affermarsi come negozio leader in Torino per la quantità di tabacco venduto e per l'ampia gamma di servizi telematici offerti al cittadino.

Il connubio tra la disponibilità economica e il legame di persone speciali, unite dal desiderio di cambiare ognuno il proprio futuro in termini economici e lavorativi, hanno permesso a fine 2017 l'acquisizione dell'azienda da una nuova proprietà.

Attualmente la gestione è composta da uno staff giovane, intraprendente e motivato.

Dopo un primo periodo di rodaggio è emerso che, nonostante la professione del tabaccaio esista da almeno 100 anni, il processo lavorativo presentava ampi margini di miglioramento nella gestione del cassetto contanti a fine turno, dell' approvvigionamento merci di generi del monopolio e del flusso contanti tra cassetto, distributore automatico, banca e cassaforte.

Avvalendosi di un comune registratore di cassa di ultima generazione e affidandosi alla pluriennale esperienza in ambito ICT di alcuni membri dello staff, è stato possibile aumentare il livello di informatizzazione potendo pertanto migliorare tutto il processo lavorativo verso un più alto livello di controllo, qualità ed economia.

Name: Laura Chavin Cigars
Description:

business, which dealt in raw tobacco.
After completing his studies, Bührle worked for Hermès, Enrico Coveri, Christian Dior and
Zino Davidoff, among others. In 1992, he began developing and founding his own premium cigar brand
and named it after his daughter - Laura Chavin. The first cigars bearing the Laura Chavin name were
produced in the Dominican Republic and presented to the tobacco world for the first time at Intertabac
in Dortmund in 1998. The Laura Chavin brand quickly became a symbol of exclusivity and top quality.In 2017, Willi Knopf, a successful entrepreneur from the creative and marketing business, took over the
Laura Chavin Cigar Company. This was followed by the establishment of the company's own tobacco
and cigar production facility near Santiago de los Caballeros in the Dominican Republic.

Name: Safesmoking
Description:
Στόχος μας είναι να σας προσφέρουμε την καλύτερη δυνατή εμπειρία στην αγορά του ηλεκτρονικού τσιγάρου, παρέχοντάς σας μόνο εμπορικά και ποιοτικά προϊόντα, προσπαθώντας παράλληλα να διατηρήσουμε χαμηλές τιμές.

Στα καταστήματά μας θα βρείτε προϊόντα μεγάλων εταιριών, όπως: Natura-Hexocell, Eliquid France, Pharmacig, Aspire, Eleaf, Joytech, Vision, Kanger, Vapros, Ovale και πολλές πολλές άλλες.

Για την καλύτερη εξυπηρέτησή σας διαθέτουμε φυσικά καταστήματα εντός Αττικής όπου μπορείτε να ρωτήσετε, να δοκιμάσετε και καταλήξετε στην σωστή για εσάς επιλογή που θα σας ικανοποιήσει. Για όσους δεν υπάρχει η δυνατότητα επίσκεψης στα καταστήματά μας, θα σας εξυπηρετήσουμε τηλεφωνικά και θα σας αποστείλουμε άμεσα τις παραγγελίες σας όπου και να βρίσκεστε.

Η ομάδα της Safesmoking θα εξυπηρετήσει με το ίδιο πάθος τους πελάτες της λιανικής και της χονδρικής. Θα σας βοηθήσει να επιλέξετε τα κατάλληλα για εσάς προϊόντα.

Γνωρίζουμε όλες τις ανησυχίες των καπνιστών και των ατμιστών. Ως παλαιοί «φανατικοί» χρήστες του τσιγάρου προσπαθήσαμε να δώσουμε οριστικό τέλος στην βλαβερή αυτή συνήθεια με αρκετές αποτυχημένες προσπάθειες, που μας οδήγησαν όμως στο ηλεκτρονικό τσιγάρο! Ο ενθουσιασμός μας, για την συσκευή που παράγει ατμό αντί για καπνό δίνοντας έτσι την ευχαρίστηση του καπνίσματος χωρίς τις αρνητικές παρενέργειες που σχετίζονται με τα παραδοσιακά προϊόντα καπνού, ήταν τόσο μεγάλος. Έτσι ο ζήλος μας για το προϊόν του αιώνα το οποίο θα άλλαζε την βλαβερή καθημερινότητα, όπως άλλαξε και την δική μας, εξελίχθηκε σε επάγγελμα με σκοπό να δώσουμε σε όλους εσάς την δυνατότητα να γνωρίσετε την ποιοτική και απολαυστική εμπειρία του εναλλακτικού τρόπου καπνίσματος ή πιο σωστά…«Ατμίσματος».

Περιμένουμε να σας γνωρίσουμε από κοντά, να απαντήσουμε στις ερωτήσεις σας και να δοκιμάσετε εφόσον επιθυμείτε την εναλλακτική μορφή καπνίσματος, καθώς επίσης να ενημερωθείτε και τις εξελίξεις στην πορεία του ηλεκτρονικού τσιγάρου

Name: Robusto by Havana Mix Cigar Emporium and Cocktail Lounge
Description:
Robusto by Havana Mix Cigar Emporium and Cocktail Lounge, sometimes known as Havana Mix or Robustos, is a casually elegant cigar and cocktail lounge located across from the world famous Beale Street in Downtown Memphis. Founded in 2009 by Robb Hunter Sr. and managed by his son, Rhobb Jr., Havana Mix welcomes tourists from all over the globe while focusing on being a community staple. Combining both comfort and luxury, Havana Mix boasts the most diverse cigar smoking population in the Mid South, featuring many different socioeconomic and racial groups.

Robusto by Havana Mix takes pride in having the first Certified Tobacconists in Memphis. Each of the qualified staff is trained to provide assistance for an optimal customer service. This gem offers over 1,000 cigar options. Furthermore, loyalty programs including locker memberships and points driven programs to receive discounts and promotions are available to everyone. 

Robusto by Havana Mix Cigar Emporium and Cocktail Lounge displays a relaxed atmosphere with comfortable armchairs, flat screen televisions, and a wonderful ventilation system. The lounge also has spaces for private events, live music, WiFi and beginner to master classes in tobacco. Check our events page to see about  alcohol pairing and tasting events.

After being featured on Jon Taffer's Bar Rescue television show, Havana Mix has focused on expanding and perfecting it's bar offerings and cocktail. Rest easy with a perfectly crafted Manhattan or Old Fashioned with a well paired cigar.

Name: King Vape CR
Description:
Esta compañía ha pasado y está pasando por varias etapas de crecimiento y desarrollo. Inició en Diciembre del 2018, cuando yo estaba buscando la manera de dejar los cigarrillos convencionales por el gran daño que estaban causando a mi salud, allí fue donde me regalaron un vaporizador. Cuando comencé no tenía confianza suficiente en que lograría dejar tan gran vicio como lo es el fumado. Al pasar de el tiempo y empezar a utilizar el vaporizador, empecé a notar grandes cambios en mi. Mi olfato volvía a funcionar como lo hacía anteriormente, mi salud cambiaba para bien. Cuando todo comenzó a mejorar los repuestos y sabores que estaba utilizando se me empezaron a agotar, desde ese momento comencé una búsqueda por ellos por muchos días y no dí con lugares que me pudieran ayudar. Fue entonces donde descubrí que a muchas personas le sucedía lo mismo, en ese momento es donde decidí empezar a importarlos. Hasta el día de hoy yo junto con mi empresa nos esforzamos cada día por cumplir las expectativas y necesidades de cada uno de nuestros clientes. Nuestros valores y principios, son el ayudar a mejorar la salud de los demás con cada uno de nuestros productos.

Actualmente contamos con un personal altamente calificado para revisar la calidad de todos nuestros productos, con el fin que lleguen en excelente condiciones a sus manos. Cada unos de nuestros productos cuenta con su registro y declaración jurada, emitida por el Ministerio de Salud de Costa Rica, comprobando así la calidad de nuestros productos importados. Agradecemos a cada uno de ustedes por el apoyo incondicional. Gracias a ustedes crecemos cada día más y nos esforzamos en mejorar cada detalle que pueda satisfacer sus necesidades.

Name: MPS KUD Tani Mulyo Lamongan
Description:
Mitra Produksi Sigaret (MPS) KUD Tani Mulyo Lamongan adalah sebuah unit usaha yang tergabung di bawah naungan PT HM Sampoerna, produsen rokok ternama di Indonesia. Sebagai bagian dari jaringan produksi PT HM Sampoerna, MPS KUD Tani Mulyo Lamongan berperan penting dalam memastikan kelancaran produksi dan distribusi produk rokok berkualitas.

MPS KUD Tani Mulyo Lamongan didirikan dengan tujuan utama untuk mendukung pertumbuhan industri rokok di Indonesia, khususnya di wilayah Lamongan. Sebagai mitra produksi, mereka berkomitmen untuk menjaga kualitas produk rokok sesuai dengan standar yang telah ditetapkan oleh PT HM Sampoerna.

Dengan berbagai fasilitas produksi yang baik, MPS KUD Tani Mulyo Lamongan mampu menjaga efisiensi dan konsistensi dalam proses produksi rokok. Mereka juga berperan dalam memberdayakan petani tembakau lokal dengan memberikan pelatihan dan bimbingan agar dapat menghasilkan tembakau berkualitas tinggi sesuai dengan standar yang dibutuhkan.

Secara keseluruhan, MPS KUD Tani Mulyo Lamongan merupakan bagian integral dari rantai produksi PT HM Sampoerno yang berperan dalam menjaga kualitas, efisiensi, dan keberlanjutan industri rokok di Indonesia, sambil memberikan manfaat ekonomi bagi masyarakat lokal.

Name: MIXTO | Ruden Tobacco UG
Description:
After more than 7 years of development work, we can proudly offer the innovative Mixto product. The clever and so far unique mixing system enables us to enjoy the highest quality at the best possible price.
After only 1.5 years on the market, customers in various European countries benefit from our product. These include: Germany, Lithuania, Estonia, Belgium, Slovenia, Kosovo, Cyprus, Greece, Bulgaria, Malta and soon also Denmark and Romania.
Mixto is already in the starting blocks in other countries.

We are particularly proud of that: to fascinate people in many different countries with our products and to offer them the opportunity to enjoy cheap, high-quality shisha.

Mixto is a 2-component hookah tobacco. One component is the molasses (mix), the second component is the pre-flavored raw tobacco (to). The fact that the molasses is sold as a separate product from the tobacco results in great savings.
Mixing our tobacco only takes a few moments and it is ready to smoke immediately after mixing.

Name: Take A Smoke
Description:
Sneak A Toke smokeless pipes are superior to all the copies. We were the first, made exclusively in the USA since 1976. Over the years we have paid
attention to where improvements needed to be made. 
 The very first Sneak A Tokes had the screw threads on the inside of the bowl. It didn’t take long for those threads to become caked with gunky resin making it impossible to screw the cap on. We re-engineered it so that the threads are now on the outside. 
 Our original FDA Food Grade silicone rubber mouthpieces were round causing them to roll off of a non-level surface so we improved to a hexagon shape. Replacement mouthpieces are available.
 Our screens are heavy-duty solid brass wire and are custom sized to fit each
Sneak A Toke perfectly. They are designed with larger holes to last much longer before clogging. Replacement screens are also available. 


Best And Most Compact Stealth Smoking System
We are the manufacturer of the Original smell-proof Sneak A Toke.
Always about unmatched quality at a very affordable price.
We go to great lengths to assure that you are completely satisfied.

Name: Casa Lotar
Description:
Fundamos esta casa en el año 1977 como una empresa familiar y desde entonces nos dedicamos a satisfacer las necesidades de los fumadores de puros y pipa.

Siempre nos esforzamos por marcar un estilo propio, priorizando el servicio y el asesoramiento al fumador, mas allá de la mera transacción comercial. Así comenzamos a establecer una comunicación personal
con el cliente y fuimos formando una comunidad de 5000 fumadores.

En estos años de labor hemos podido cumplir varios de los objetivos que nos propusimos. Pero el reconocimiento de nuestros clientes nos compromete a seguir trabajando aun más, adaptándonos a los tiempos que hoy vivimos.

¿PORQUÉ TABAQUEROS DE OFICIO?

. Porque nos ocupamos del tabaco y de todo lo que esta planta genera en la conducta social del fumador.

. Porque  cultivamos con nuestros clientes un trato realmente personal, dentro y fuera de nuestros locales.

. Porque con el tabaco apuramos los límites de la excelencia, garantizando un producto de calidad y exigiendo el mismo criterio desde su origen.

. Porque como fumadores somos leales al cliente y al producto, brindando una opinión objetiva al degustar  todos y cada uno de los tabacos  que ingresan al mercado, estimulando el conocimiento de la relación
  precio y calidad.

. Porque llevamos el tabaco a todo el que lo necesite, sin limites de distancia, por simple vocación de servicio. 

. Porque difundimos a través de nuestros Breviarios, los placeres y secretos de estos nobles hábitos.

. Porque estimulamos la conducta social del fumador, organizando encuentros gourmets, degustación de productos, charlas informativas y  presentación de nuevas vitolas o marcas.

. Porque como amantes del tabaco cuidamos su legitimidad, luchando a la par del distribuidor contra el contrabando y la falsificación de productos, defendiendo no solo la estabilidad del mercado local sino los intereses mismos de los fumadores.

Old Towne Havana moved into the space between Starbucks and Felix Continental Cafe in 2010. Situated directly in the Orange Plaza (which some people refer to as 'The Cirlce'), Old Towne Havana replaced a cigar shop formerly at this location, and with that change came new ownership & staff, a much larger selection of cigars priced for every budget, private humidors & lockers, as well as some of the best prices on cigars in Orange County and have gained a steady stream of return clients who have become like family to us at Old Towne Havana.

Name: Cremo Cigars
Description:
Crémo Premium Cigars are made in El Titan de Bronze Cigar Factory. Established in 1995 by Don Carlos Cobas, it is a family owned and operated “fabriquita” located in Miami's famed Calle 8, or Little Havana.

All cigars are handcrafted in the USA by “Level 9” rollers, all of whom have worked for world-renowned Cuban factories such as Cohiba, Romeo y Julieta, Corona, and Partagas, among others. Each cigar is crafted in the traditional Cuban style of tubing the filler and then finished off with a beautiful triple cap. This process is done using only the most premium tobacco from Nicaragua and Dominican Republic.

Cigars are made in small quantities to ensure perfection and consistency that only an ultra-boutique manufacturer can produce. Each roller is limited to 100-125 cigars per day to maintain quality, and each day’s work is then inspected by another Master Roller/Blender to guarantee that each cigar is of the highest standard for the aficionado.

El Titan de Bronze delivers a taste and quality rarely found outside of Cuba.

Name: Pipsan Pipes and Accessories
Description:
Pipsan Pipes and Accessories

PİPSAN Pipoları 1950'li yıllardan beri hizmet vermektedir. Sattığı ürünlerin imalatını gerçekleştiren köklü bir kuruluştur. Ağırlıklı üretimi pipo olmakla birlikte, piponun yanında sigara ağızlıkları, nargile ve tespih de üretmektedir. İstanbul, Mercan'daki satış yerinden, toptan ağırlıklı olmak üzere, toptan ve perakende satışlarıyla yıllardır müşterilerine hitap etmektedir.

PİPSAN Pipoları yurt genelinde olduğu gibi yurtdışında da satılmakta olan bir markadır. Yurtdışı ihracatları ağırlıklı olarak Rusya, Ukrayna, Almanya, Yunanistan, İran gibi ülkelere gerçekleşmektedir. Pipsan ürünlerine ayrıca Türkiye'de ve Yurtdışında en tanınmış, güvenilir ve en çok ziyaret edilen elektronik ticaret sitelerinden de ulaşılabilmektedir.

Pipsan 2005 yılından beri de üst gelir seviyesindeki müşterilerinin taleplerini karşılamak üzere Pipsan'ın tescilli yeni Dapper Pipes markası ile çok yüksek kalitede Gül Kökünden özel olarak ürettiği pipoları da piyasaya sürmektedir. Dapper Pipes pipoları yüksek kalitede ve özel modelleri ile sınırlı sayıda özel olarak üretilmektedir. 

Türkiye'de pipo üretiminde ilklerden biri olan PİPSAN Pipoları'nın,

MİSYONU;
1- Dürüstlük,
2- Kalite,
3- Koşulsuz Müşteri Memnuniyeti,
4- Gelişmek ve yeniliklere açık olmak,
5- Kazanma ve bunun beraberinde kazandırma'dır.

Name: Tobacco Unmasked
Description:
TobaccoUnmasked is the information portal of the [CCTColombo.lk Centre for Combating Tobacco (CCT)]. CCT is the Sri Lankan tobacco observatory established under the Article 5.3 of the Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (FCTC). The aim of the CCT is to monitor the tobacco industry activities related to implementation of Article 5.3 in Sri Lanka and the region.

TobaccoUnmasked contains evidence based information on tobacco industry, with detailed profiles of tobacco companies and their employees. It also contains profiles of tobacco industry allies, institutions and individuals linked with the industry in different ways. TobaccoUnmasked also describes tobacco industry strategies in the themes of influencing policy, tobacco tax & price related issues, corporate social investments, tobacco cultivation and marketing and promotion. Tobacco industry arguments and their responses against different policy processes are reported as a learning exercise for future reference.

Name: Rambi Agung
Description:
Rambi Agung adalah perusahaan kretek asli Indonesia yang berakar di Jember, Jawa Timur—salah satu pusat penghasil tembakau dan cengkeh terbaik di Nusantara. Dengan menggabungkan tradisi, keahlian tangan, dan bahan baku pilihan, kami menghadirkan kretek berkualitas tinggi yang memberikan pengalaman khas bagi para penikmat sejati.

Sebagai bagian dari budaya Indonesia yang kaya, kami menjaga keaslian cita rasa kretek dengan tembakau murni dan cengkeh aromatik pilihan, diracik secara teliti untuk menghasilkan aroma yang khas dan rasa yang kuat. Setiap batang kretek Rambi Agung diciptakan untuk memberikan kesenangan otentik dalam setiap tarikan.

Kenapa Kretek Rambi Agung?
 Rasa Otentik & Aroma Khas – Diracik dengan keseimbangan sempurna antara tembakau dan cengkeh.
 Menghormati Tradisi Kretek Nusantara – Diproduksi dengan metode yang diwariskan dari generasi ke generasi.
 Dibuat dengan Keahlian & Dedikasi – Kretek berkualitas tinggi untuk kenikmatan yang tahan lama.
 Dari Jember, untuk Para Penikmat Kretek Sejati – Dihasilkan dari salah satu daerah penghasil kretek terbaik di Indonesia.

Kami di Rambi Agung percaya bahwa kretek bukan sekadar rokok—ia adalah bagian dari budaya, tradisi, dan warisan Nusantara yang harus dijaga dan dilestarikan.

Rambi Agung – Kretek Asli, Cita Rasa Melekat.

 Untuk informasi lebih lanjut atau kerja sama bisnis, silakan hubungi kami.

Name: Single Barrel Cigar Co
Description:
Single Barrel Cigar Co was founded in 2021 with the idea to bring premium tobacco to market with a concept of zero consistency. While this may sound crazy, this concept was brought to fruition by founders Matt Schnell and Nick Battaglia’s love for single barrel bourbons. Matt and Nick set out to come up with a proprietary blend of Nicaraguan and Honduran tobacco for an exceptional level of quality you only get from high end cigar manufactures.
What helps make Single Barrel Cigars different is our aging and packaging process. We start out by ageing our cigars in freshly dumped premium bourbon barrels for 8 to 10 weeks. This creates an all-natural infusion process into the tobacco that gives our cigars a subtle but smooth finish with notes of sweet bourbon. No batch is quite alike as we use many different bourbon barrels and due to climate and humidity no two batches come out the same just as you find your single barrel bourbons. We then package each cigar in glass tubos with just a pinch of bourbon barrel char for continued ageing.
After experimenting with many different blends from around several different private family farms. Matt and Nick settled on the blend you can now find at many cigar and liquor store retailers. We believe this is one of the finest and most unique smoking experiences you will find in the market today. Our Single Barrel Cigars all use 100% long leaf filler, finest Nicaraguan binder to help hold in and protect our premium blend, we currently offer a Connecticut wrapper for a softer more subtle experience and for the bolder cigar smoking experience we offer Habano wrapper. Current offering is a Robusto 5 x 50 with more sizes coming soon…

Name: Dollar
Description:
Abul Khair Tobacco is the most trusted name in the tobacco industry of Bangladesh. We have been in the industry since 1953 and have been exporting the best quality tobacco in many countries of the world. Tobacco was the mother business of Abul Khair Group. The tobacco division is divided into two parts. One is tobacco growing & processing for domestic use & export in various countries and the other is cigarette manufacturing & selling to the domestic market.

In 1998 Abul Khair Tobacco started its cigarette manufacturing and selling business. At domestic market Abul Khair tobacco is in a leading position in low segment cigarette brand.

Our History

60 Years of AKT
Abul Khair’s 1953 opening of a handmade tobacco product named 42-No Abul bidi.

1998
Abul Khair introduced their ready-made cigarettes and started selling tobacco.

2009
Abul Khair becomes nationally number one selling cigarette. Volume reaches 1.00 billion

2012
National cigarette sales reach 2.00 billion. Second largest company in Bangladesh in terms of volume.

History of Tobacco

In Bangladesh flue cured tobacco growing was started from 1968 on experimental basis in Kushtia district in North West part of Bangladesh. After 6 years of extensive field work & grower’s participation Bangladesh achieved self sufficiency of tobacco in terms of Volume. Subsequently tobacco growing extended to the other areas in Bangladesh. Now there are four major tobacco growing areas in Bangladesh, these are Kushtia, Chittagong, Rangpur and Manikgonj.

Leaf Operations

UAB SANAS was registered on 09.01.2012 with the Lithuanian Register centre with the code 302708887; SHAHRUKH SHIRAZ DHANJI is listed as a sole director, the company is perported licensed for business in tobacco products. For more information review information at: http://www.registrucentras.lt/en/

The Register of Legal Entities registers businesses, institutions and NGOs and collects detailed data about Lithuanian legal entities as well as branches and representative offices of foreign companies and organizations. The Register contains complete information (and historical data) about legal form and status of legal entities, fields of its activity, size and structure of the authorized capital, members of sole and collective management bodies, licenses acquired, etc. It is obligatory for the most of business companies to submit annual financial statements to the Register of Legal Entities since 2004. Starting from March 2010 private limited liability companies are obliged to declare current list of shareholders to the Register. 

The Register of Legal Entities virtually implements the policy of transparency of Lithuanian businesses, institutions and NGOs since all the data and information mentioned above is public. Excerpt from registry of any legal entity as well as annual financial statements, list of shareholders or copy of any other document (such as memorandum of foundation or board minutes) stored in the archive of the Register are accessible for anybody for the fee set by the Government. 

In 2010 Centre of Registers introduced first service of virtual foundation and registration of legal entity via Internet. The service which requires no paper documents rely heavily on electronic signature based on Public Key Infrastructure (PKI). So far, virtual foundation and registration of legal entities via Internet is available for citizens of Lithuania but Centre of Registers strives hard to implement equal possibilities for foreign investors.

Name: CV Pusaka Hidup
Description:
CV. Pusaka Hidup didirikan pada tahun 1947 oleh Bapak Liam Gwat Tien dan Ibu tan Bing Nio dengan nama Persuahaan Rokok "Poo Hien" yang berlokasi di Jalan Gambiran Nomor 54 Semarang.
Usaha ini berkembang dengan sangat baik, sehingga pada tahun 1949, Perusahan Rokok "Poo Hien" dipindahkan ke Jalan Karangwulan Selatan No 1 Semarang.
Atas keputusan Direktur, maka pada tanggal 1 Januari 1969 Perusahaan Rokok "Poo Hien" diganti nama menjadi perusahaan rokok "Pusaka Hidup".

Pada tahun 1980, berdasarkan dengan Akta Notaris J. Moelijani, Nomor 72, Tanggal 17 Oktober 1980, bentuk Perusahaan Rokok Pusaka Hidup berubah menjadi Persekutuan Komanditer / CV. Pusaka Hidup.
CV. Pusaka Hidup sendiri memiliki visi yaitu menjadi salah satu Perusahaan yang Berkembang, Maju dan Besar di dalam bidangnya (pabrik Rokok) dengan menghasilkan favorit produk yang dapat diterima oleh para konsumen dengan mutu dan kualitasnya yang terbaik.

Dikarenakan permintaan produk semakin meningkat, maka sejak tahun 2008 CV. Pusaka Hidup memindahkan unit produksinya ke lokasi Jalan Raya Semarang Demak Km.7 No. 443 Semarang, dengan jumlah karyawan sebanyak 665 orang.
Sejak diluncurkannya produk dengan merek Tuton SPR pada tahun 2013, yang diproduksi menggunakan mesin-mesin modern, perusahaan ini terus mengalami kemajuan.

Sampai saat ini CV. Pusaka Hidup masih aktif dengan memproduksi rokok jenis Sigaret Kretek Tangan (SKT) dan Sigaret Kretek Mesin (SKM) dengan merek sebagai berikut:
- Sigaret Kretek Tangan  (SKT)
   - Beras Tuton 10
   - Beras Tuton 12
- Sigaret Kretek Mesin (SKM)
   - Tuton SPR
   - Tuton 12 F

Produk rokok ini tidak hanya hadir di pasar-pasar tradisional, tetapi juga berhasil menembus pasar modern di wilayah Jawa Tengah dan sekitarnya. Dengan kualitas yang terpercaya dan cita rasa yang khas, permintaannya pun terus meningkat dari waktu ke waktu.

Name: Don Stefano Zigarrenmanufaktur GmbH (Rinn & Cloos Nachf.)
Description:
Don Stefano Zigarren Manufaktur
Inspired by our guiding principle, “100% Tobacco in Perfection,” Don Stefano builds on a rich family heritage rooted in the “Rinn & Cloos” tradition, where founder Steffen Rinn honed his expertise as a raw tobacco specialist and cigar manufacturer. This combination of tradition and dedicated craftsmanship quickly established Don Stefano as a leading name for premium cigars and cigarillos in the German market.

At our facility in Heuchelheim, we select only the finest tobaccos: high-quality sand leaves from Sumatra, distinctive leaves from the Bezuki and Vorstenlanden regions of Java, exquisite Mata Fina tobacco from Brazil, and the aromatic varieties from Cuba’s Pinar del Rio province. Our carefully balanced blends create the smooth, harmonious flavor that sets Don Stefano cigars apart. While most of our shortfillers are meticulously machine-made, a select range—including our Torpedo-format specialties and pipe cigars—are entirely hand-rolled.

Steffen’s son, Matthias Rinn, joined the company as an innovative sales director and passionate cigar connoisseur, sharing his deep knowledge through engaging cigar evenings and seminars. Alongside our own line of handcrafted products, Don Stefano is proud to import internationally acclaimed cigar brands, including the legendary Perdomo range and distinguished labels from the Dominican Republic—ensuring a diverse portfolio for every palate.

2025 marks an exciting new chapter for Don Stefano, with a strategic investment by Robusto Ventures and the active support of Thomas Sonnenberg and Walter Linz, leading us to new heights. Experience the art of tobacco at Don Stefano, where traditional craftsmanship meets modern perfection.

Mi smo uvijek spremni za vas izraditi virtualni uzorak nekoliko proizvoda po vašem izboru s vašim logom na njima, a prije potvrde narudžbe. Mi vam također možemo dati izraditi pravi uzorak proizvoda prije početka proizvodnje cijele narudžbe.

Mi stalno dopunjujemo naš portal s novim promotivnim proizvodima i proizvodima na akciji, kako bi program naših proizvoda bio svjež, a vaš bankovni račun pun. Name: Maraú Paiol
Description:
História da Maraú

Amizade, sentimento de grande afeição, simpatia, apreço entre pessoas, é a partir daí que nasce o Maraú Paiol, e da imensa vontade de empreender. Assim, começa a história da Maraú, quando um grupo de amigas, apreciadoras de palheiros, decidem produzir seus próprios cigarros de palha.

O nome surge dos gostos e experiências compartilhadas por elas, que amam viajar ao litoral, mas que por vezes sentem falta de pontos para adquirir paiol. Levando nas malas seus pequenos estoques sempre recebem diversas propostas para venda. Antenadas nas oportunidades viram aí o surgimento da ideia, consolidada hoje na marca MARAÚ PAIOL, que chegou para inovar o mercado de palheiros.

Missão e Visão

Nossa missão é atender cada vez melhor o público consumidor de cigarros de palha, produzindo palheiros de alta qualidade, para compartilharmos nossa paixão e saborosa experiência com amigos, parceiros, clientes e consumidores. Afinal, SOCIALIZAR É PRAZEROSO!

Nossa visão é levar o MARAÚ PAIOL aos quatros cantos do Brasil, realizando o trabalho de forma responsável e comprometida com a excelência.

Para isso proporcionamos aos nossos parceiros alta lucratividade, e aos nossos consumidores muita qualidade e excelente sabor e aroma ao paladar.

Produto

Fabricados em Sete Lagoas/MG o Maraú Paiol tem como principal compromisso a qualidade. O cigarro é produzido com produtos naturais, com palhas selecionadas e farelo de fumo especialmente escolhido para alcançar a intensidade, sabor e aroma. O paiol é enrolado artesanalmente e em fina espessura.

A qualidade dos palheiros é atestada diretamente pelas sócias da Maraú Paiol que, acompanham e supervisionam todas as etapas da produção garantindo assim um cigarro de alta qualidade.

A embalagem traz uma ideia jovem e despojada, fazendo menção à história da marca. Sua caixinha traz uma cor marcante, que a diferencia e destaca das outras marcas no mercado. Combinando leveza e beleza, ao inigualável sabor e aroma do MARAÚ PAIOL.

Valores e Responsabilidade Social

Prezamos pela transparência e clareza nas atividades. Temos responsabilidade social, e por isso, reconhecemos que o consumo de produtos derivados do fumo podem envolver riscos à saúde.

Acreditamos, no entanto, que a decisão de fumar, ou de não fumar, é pessoal e livre, e que só deve ser tomada por adultos, que são conscientes dos riscos à saúde associados.

Sabemos ainda, que parar de fumar pode ser realmente uma tarefa difícil, por isso incentivamos àqueles que queiram a procurarem pelo serviço de ajuda disponibilizado no Ministério da Saúde que pode ser consultado pelo telefone 0800 611997.

Name: G-Spot Flavour
Description:
The Story

G-spot is born from a friendship and a passion for electronic cigarettes.

The intent is, with the help of Master Essenze, to offer aromatic ideas and unique flavors that carry each Vaper in a moment of pure relaxation.

The first project focused on a classic for the vape world: vanilla. Obviously we have researched the perfect flavor in depth by blending the taste of 5 vanillas with a butter cream that also acts as a carrier.

Thus was born the Vanilla Gangbang, which launched our brand and gave us the first satisfactions.

The work of searching for flavor then turned towards a taste that was little explored by the world, but much loved in real life: the cherry.

Being able to enhance this taste was not at all easy. The goal was achieved through many trials and tastings of the product.

We have combined the milk cream with a fabulous taste of the red fruit and a grain of hazelnut that slowly rises during the vape. The taste is very reminiscent of the famous "croccante" an italian icecream.

Black cherry boobs was born!

At this point we headed towards another difficult challenge. We started exploring the combinations of a "dangerous" taste: the lemon. The perfect combination was born when we were able to enhance the flavour of the fruit with the sweetness of a biscuit.

We had created our third product: Sweet lemon job.

At this point, after being able to reach so many customers and have had welcome appreciation, we could have gone in a simple direction. We could have launched a flavour that was easy to combine with other flavors. We could have, indeed, but we did not.

We headed in a direction that only a few dared try to take because of those few ,many have failed: the coconut! Our latest creation is a perfect combination of the unmistakable flavor of the exotic fruit and white chocolate.

We have succeeded in creating a balanced and absolutely unique combination that has launched us to another level.

Cocko Play was born!

Name: Harrisburg Cigar Club, Inc.
Description:
The Harrisburg Cigar Club was started to fill a much-needed void, as a social organization that promotes the enjoyment of premium hand made cigars. Our goal is to enrich our members’ smoking experience by providing an environment that fosters friendship, camaraderie, networking, and knowledge in a relaxing atmosphere. Also, given the recent tobacco legislation, never has it been more important for us to come together to protect our liberties as cigar smokers. As any cigar lover can tell you, there’s a certain bond that forms instantly between two people who enjoy cigars, a sense of camaraderie that just can’t be found anywhere else. Whether it’s through a cigar tasting session or a visit from our local cigar representatives, we want to share our passion for this wonderful hobby with all who are interested. Additionally, by working closely with the local retailers of these fine products, we hope to help you take your appreciation for cigars to a higher level. At the same time, we want to provide ongoing support to these local tobacconists ensuring the long-term viability of their businesses as well.

The Harrisburg Cigar Club events provide you the perfect arena for networking, making friends and exploring the Greater Harrisburg Area cigar-friendly venues. The goal of the HCC is to promote cigar etiquette and educate professional enthusiasts within the community who enjoy smoking cigars. The HCC actively seeks places and plans outings to give its members a comfortable environment to relax and smoke cigars. We encourage local businesses and larger corporations to support the club at organized events to help create new business opportunities and provide our members with sample products or services. Additionally, we also endeavor to make our database of professionals the go-to source for many of our members’ professional needs.

No work, no hassles, no risk, no contracts, no minimum commitments, just added revenue and profits for your wineries retail outlet.

Au travers de ses gammes de produits Cicrazy jetable avec et sans nicotine, la jeune entreprise a été une des toutes premières à marketer de manière jeune et dynamique un produit qui jusque là se caractérisait par une monotonie et une absence de différence entre quasi toutes les marques du marché.

Installé dans le haut de gamme, l'ensemble des produits bénéficient des agrégations et autorisations de mise en vente y compris en réseau de pharmacies (en Belgique).

La statégie de l'enseigne consiste en un partenariat solide entre des sociètés de distribution à fort potentiels permettant une couverture de marché dabs les différents réseaux : DIY, Petrol, Market, Night shops, Pharma, ect...

Notre philosophie commerciale est simple : obtenir une satisfaction mutuelle, pour nos Partenaires comme pour ses distributeurs et pour le client final. C'est dans l'atteinte de ces objectifs respectifs qu'une relation de confiance peut se créer ainsi qu'une dynamique de fidélisation solide, éléments et facteurs de succés clefs qui sont les fondements même de l'enseigne Cicrazy

Name: Ceron Premium Cigar Co.
Description:
Ceron Premium Cigars is a timeless tale born of passion with a commitment to use only the finest tobaccos on the planet.
 

Javier Ceron, founder and president of Ceron Premium Cigars, vows to deliver a product that is sure to deliver an exceptional experience for today’s most discerning cigar smokers. At Ceron Premium Cigars craftsmanship stretches well beyond the rolling process. It begins with the planting of the seedlings and extends through the entire development from curing, fermenting, aging and packaging.
 
At Ceron Premium Cigars there are no short cuts. We take our time and aim for perfection in every one of our cigars regardless of what stage in the production we are in. All of our tobaccos are carefully selected and only the highest graded will make it to our cigars. Our main focus and efforts are in the quality of our cigars.
 
To ensure such precision and craftsmanship, Ceron Premium Cigars has partnered with Francisco Almonte, owner of Tabacalera DBL on the Dominican Republic, to produce our cigars. Each cigar is handcrafted by blenders and rollers who are among the most experienced and talented in the industry. The process can be painstaking but the end result is exceptional.
 
All of our Dominican tobacco is grown exclusively on Almonte’s farms while our Mexican, Ecuadorian and Nicaraguan tobaccos are carefully selected from the respective nations’ top growers.
 
Our cigars offer a smooth draw with rich and creamy flavors. The aromas are stimulating; the complexity is extraordinary and the finish will have you yearning for more.
 
It only takes a few puffs to understand why today’s cigar smokers should choose Ceron Premium Cigars. I assure you that every person who picks up one of our cigars will not be disappointed, or I would not have put my name on it.
 
We deliver Passion, Quality, Experience and Love with each cigar handcrafted for your ideal satisfaction

Name: Bullion Essence Pvt Ltd
Description:
Redefining Tobacco. Powering Industrial Zimbabwe.

About Us
Bullion Essence Pvt Ltd is a Zimbabwean tobacco processing company spearheading a new era of industrial transformation in Africa’s tobacco sector. Our focus is on creating a fully integrated, next-generation processing facility in Harare that sets new standards in efficiency, innovation, and sustainability.

We are driven by a vision to transform Zimbabwe from a raw tobacco exporter into a global centre for high-value processed tobacco products, empowering local producers and elevating the nation’s footprint in international markets.

The Next-Generation Tobacco Processing Plant
Our upcoming state-of-the-art plant will introduce advanced processing technologies designed to:
	•	Enhance value addition and product quality
	•	Increase export competitiveness
	•	Create employment and industrial linkages across the tobacco value chain
	•	Strengthen Zimbabwe’s position as a leading player in global tobacco processing

This landmark project represents more than a facility — it is a bold step toward an industrialized and self-sustaining Zimbabwean economy.

Our Mission
To build a world-class tobacco processing brand that transforms value locally, exports excellence globally, and leaves a lasting industrial legacy.

Our Values
 Excellence — Precision and quality in every process.
 Innovation — Driving the future of tobacco manufacturing.
 Sustainability — Growth that empowers communities and protects the environment.
 Integrity — Building trust through transparency and performance.

We are building not just a factory — we are building the future of tobacco processing in Africa.

Who we are
FLOS VAPE targets both consumers (B2C) and professional clients (B2B). All target groups benefit from our strong customer service which is tailored to local needs. What drives us
We want to empower people to enhance their living experience and their well-being through the various possibilities and the virtues of vaping. From the very beginning, our motivation was to disrupt the vaping market with FLOS VAPE: We make products and services more accessible to all our customers – and thus empower them to make life style more attractive.


Responsibility
We not only want to enhance the well-being of our individual customers through vape product, but we also want to create a positive environment for our employees and business partners.

We are aware of our responsibility towards the environment and society, and always strive for the most sustainable solutions. We aim to identify sustainable alternatives in our products and shipping processes. Name: Brownleaf Ltd
Description:
A Tobacco Leaf Company Founded to bridge the gap between farmers and international buyers, Brownleaf Ltd is registered as a private company under Ugandan law. The company’s primary operations include:
- Leaf purchasing and aggregation from smallholder and commercial farmers
- Primary processing at its Jinja plant
- Exporting processed tobacco to clients across Europe, Asia, and the Americas

By combining local agricultural knowledge with international best practices, Brownleaf creates opportunities for East African farmers while delivering value to global clients.

Brownleaf Ltd is a leading player in the East African tobacco sector, strategically headquartered in Jinja, Uganda. The company specializes in sourcing high-quality green tobacco leaf from a network of trusted farmers across Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Rwanda, and other East African regions.

At its state-of-the-art primary processing facility in Jinja, Brownleaf ensures each leaf meets strict quality and regulatory standards before being prepared for export to international markets. With a focus on farmer partnerships, sustainability, and value addition, Brownleaf Ltd has positioned itself as a trusted supplier to global tobacco manufacturers.

Our products include Dark fired, Flue Cured and Burley. 

Brownleaf is committed to responsible business practices, focusing on:
- Training farmers on sustainable farming methods and soil conservation
- Supporting rural communities through employment and capacity building
- Adhering to environmental standards in waste and energy management

Acacia Quiroga, his mother’s maternal grandmother, was the heiress to the Quiroga family business, Ron Quiroga. Name: Stig International Limited
Description:
We are STIG!
We at STIG believe that people are inherently good, want to live a life filled with happiness, joy and comfort. Unfortunately, our biological brains are wired with some deficiencies, which make us do those things that might not be that healthy for us.
We believe that people should have a choice, an alternative to enjoy what they are doing, with minimal consequences. We understand that a world without tobacco and nicotine would be a better world.
But we also understand that reality is different.
At STIG, all we offer is choice! 
Why STIG?
STIG is the ultimate solution to a carefree vaping experience for those who are transitioning from smoking cigarettes. The STIG can be held like a cigarette and the on-draw mouth feel when using the STIG replicates the action of smoking. In keeping with the regular routine of what feels like smoking, the STIG is of tremendous assistance to anyone making a transition. And, the STIG initiates a satisfying nicotine transfer with 6% nicotine per volume. It is equivalent to an entire pack of cigarettes in a simplistic mini pod that comes in a pack of three. Therefore, when purchasing a pack of STIG’s, you receive what is comparable to three packs of cigarettes. Altogether, the STIG is an advantageous device at an incredible value.
Partners
We are looking to partner up with distributors who want a product that flies off the shelves, with AMAZING margins! A product that keeps people coming back for more!
We work exclusively with only a few distributors per country to control price and the overall flow of goods. Providing a pricing structure which protects all parties.
Let’s work together to take this industry to the next level!

Description: V roce 2013 jsme otevřeli první specializovanou prodejnu na Mělníku, poté další v Kralupech nad Vltavou a v Litoměřicích. Vapingu rozumíme a rozhodně neprodáme zakazníkovi za každou cenu cokoliv. Proto, aby vaše cigareta fungovala co nejlépe je potřeba dosáhnout souladu několika parametrů. Co systém, co odpor - to jiná náplň a jiná watáž, vždy děláme maximum, aby jste byli s výběrem vaporizéru spokojeni. Rádi vám poradíme s výměnou atomizéru, zkompletováním elektronické cigarety. Také provádíme zdarma aktualizace modu/gripu a technickou kontrolu vašeho vaporizéru. Zákazníci jsou pro nás vaperská rodina, jsme trpěliví a raději vše 100x zopakujeme a ukážeme, aby zákazník odešel s co nejvíce informacemi. V případě reklamace zapůjčíme grip, protože nechceme dopustit, aby vaper nemohl vapovat. Pokud ještě váháte s koupí vaporizéru, přijďte se za námi podívat do jedné z našich prodejen, poradíme nebo si s námi můžete jen nezávazně popovídat o vapingu.

Leveraging the expertise of over 200 skilled professionals, we are committed to excellence in every stage of production, from sourcing premium raw materials to delivering finished goods that meet the highest standards of quality and safety.

UTAB Saman Navid focuses on fostering innovation and sustainability in all aspects of its operations. Our commitment to research and development allows us to introduce new products that align with market trends and customer preferences.

L’association à but non lucratif Les "Epicuriens du Chablais" a été fondée en 2012. L’objectif est de partager nos connaissances dans l’univers du cigare à travers une collaboration étroite avec Intertabak AG, le fournisseur officiel de cigares cubains pour la Suisse.

Evénements
Nous organisons divers événements destinés à diffuser notre passion pour les Havanes. Ces soirées sont consacrées à des cours d’initiation, des dégustations, et peuvent être privées sur demande. À ces occasions, nous allions cigares, vins, alcools et parfois mets.

Authenticité
Afin de conseiller les amateurs de vitoles, nous vendons exclusivement des cigares fournis par Intertabak AG. Le cigare est un produit noble et il est essentiel de garantir son authenticité afin de le déguster dans de bonnes conditions.

Conseils
Si vous souhaitez vendre des cigares de qualité dans votre établissement, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter; nous vous conseillerons gratuitement. Nous sommes plusieurs à avoir obtenu notre diplôme "Habanos Curso Junior" ou "Habanos Curso Senior"; le monde du cigare cubain n'a "presque" plus aucun secret pour nous.

Name: Los Amigos Cigars
