A premium cigar brand born from friendship, shaped by tradition, and driven by an unrelenting pursuit of the extraordinary. Founded by three lifelong friends from three continents, Los Amigos is redefining what it means to craft cigars in a world that values authenticity, education, and connection.

Los Amigos Cigars is more than a new name in the premium cigar space — it is a celebration of friendship, craftsmanship, and discovery. 

With each release, the brand invites aficionados to ignite their own odyssey and join a global community united by the pursuit of the holy grail of cigars. 

Education is central to the brand’s philosophy. Every Los Amigos cigar includes a full blend description, detailing the origins of its tobaccos and explaining how soil, climate, and altitude influence aroma and character. 
By sharing this knowledge, Los Amigos transforms cigar enjoyment into a deeper, more informed experience.

Name: Svea Tobacco
Description:
Fredrik and Jonathan are the entrepreneurs behind Svea Tobacco, a snus company located in a small industrial town near the city of Gothenburg. The company was started in 2019, as both Fredrik and Jonathan realized that snus was their passion, and that led to the founding of Svea Tobacco.

Fredrik prefers portion, where Jonathan prefers loose. While both enjoy different snus brands, they definitely agree the favorite is Gothenburg Rapé, since it feels closest to home.

The name Svea has a simple explanation for its origin – Svea is a mythical figure from the Viking era and is usually portrayed as a maiden with a shield. Sweden is often called Svea and that also functions as its national symbol.

Snus is a quintessential Swedish tobacco product, and Svea Tobacco’s supply chain is all Swedish. So what better way to represent something that is so intrinsically Swedish than with someone as epic as Svea?

Name: LS Jordan Smoke Wares
Description:
Art Deco era watches, pens, and accessories shared the same attention to design as the skyscrapers that still stand today.

In a world of pixels, LS Jordan Smoke Wares puts some substance behind the smoke with elegant, substantial accessories.

We make smoking… timeless.

The idea behind our line of luxurious smoking accessories came from handling a Dunhill lighter co-founders Laura and Scott Jordan had for over 20 years. Its Art Deco lines are still as timeless today, nearly a century after it was first designed… but isn’t it time for an update?

Smoking aficionados may spend years seeking the perfect product for their enjoyment, and then use a smoking accessory that looks like a high school throwback.  It is time to embrace the elegant coolness of the Golden Age for a new generation of upscale smokers.

The idea evolved over the past two decades (we might have gotten… distracted… along the way).

Join us as we prepare for the public launch of LS Jordan Smoke Wares and take your smoking to new heights.

Name: EsmokerCanada Inc.
Description: EsmokerCanada.com is the original electronic cigarette and vape shop in Toronto and is located at 676 Yonge Street near Wellesley and Isabella. Founded in 2011 by two savvy business entrepreneurs in Toronto who wanted to raise awareness of a new and exciting alternative to smoking tobacco after they had personal success quitting a pack a day habit using electronic cigarettes. Over the last 5 years, EsmokerCanada’s management has gained extensive knowledge about the industry and their products. Their involvement in the vaping community, combined with extensive research, experience and intimate understanding of personally battling a nicotine addiction has provided them with a unique understanding of what tobacco smokers need to successfully quit smoking tobacco using electronic cigarettes. EsmokerCanada is committed to excellent customer service and offers a 30 day money back guarantee, a minimum 6-month warranty on devices, and FREE shipping anywhere in Canada on all purchases. Our wide selection of over 100 premium brand flavours of e-liquids consists of Mother Earth Organics, Dvine, Vintage, Premium Labs, Twelve Monkeys, Cosmic Fog, Vape Snax, Illusions, I Can't Believe It's Not Donuts, Drinx, Yogen Fog, PurEliquid, EjMIX and many more. We order brands and flavours that our customers request and would love to stock your favourites. We also carry a wide selection of authentic name brand devices, including Aspire, Titan, Pax, Kangertech, Innokin, Sigelei, Joyetech, Eleaf, Smoktech, Cloupour, EgoEVOD and much more. Our selection of products and e-liquids is unparalleled in Toronto. With a complete array of high quality devices and complimentary products, EsmokerCanada has everything you need to make the switch to the vaping community. Start VAPING and stop smoking with the help of an EsmokerCanada Vaper Geek! Come in and visit our FREE no obligation tasting station to sample the 100 different flavours and discover you’re favourite. Be sure to try the devices too! At EsmokerCanada we feel it is important that our staff is considered Vaper Geeks because of their knowledge and experience, but we also require that they have an intimate understanding of tobacco cigarette addiction and how hard it is to quit using traditional methods. Consequently, our sales staff are all ex-smokers who used electronic cigarettes to quit. Many of the staff had previously used the patch, the gum, and the pills and even tried cold turkey, but failed again and again. They have felt hopelessly trapped and a slave of the tobacco cigarette addiction. We have all seen friends and family die from the diseases that traditional cigarettes have caused. Many studies are starting to be published informing the public that electronic cigarettes are safer than traditional cigarettes. Most recently Public Health England published a report that clearly stated their findings that electronic cigarettes were considered 95% safer than traditional cigarettes (https://www.gov.uk/government/news/e-cigarettes-around-95-less-harmful-than-tobacco-estimates-landmark-review). Your Vaper Geek staff member will work directly with you in order to find the right device and e-liquid combination to ensure your greatest chance of success of quitting traditional cigarettes. It is critical to the current tobacco smoker to get the right nicotine level, vapour, flavour, battery life and to produce the right “throat hit” in order to ensure their success is long-lasting. Your Vaper Geek will ask you questions about your current habits and make a professional recommendation that EsmokerCanada will stand behind. Our Vaper Geeks love interacting with our more experienced customers looking for new e-liquid flavours and device upgrades, as well as our hobbyist who are looking for the newest and hottest devices. We offer a wide selection of authentic brand name electronic cigarettes, mods, vaporizers and premium brand name e-liquids with over 100 delicious flavours to choose.

Name: EHUGGA
Description:
EHUGGA е онлайн магазин за вейп течности, течности за електронни цигари, концентрирани аромати, nic шотове и vg/pg бази. Нашата философия се гради върху три основни елемента: културата „вейпинг“, философията за щастлив живот „Hygge” и отсъствието на тютюнев дим. Вдъхновени сме от смисловото съдържание на датската дума „Hygge” (Хюга).

Тя олицетворява чувството за спокойствие, уют и хармония. Хюга е цялостна философия за живота, свързана с ежедневното търсене и откриване на удоволствие в малките неща от живота – горящи свещи, запалена камина, мек пуловер, топли чорапи, чаша ароматно кафе, прясно изпечен сладкиш.

Чрез EHUGGA пресъздаваме всички тези удоволствия посредством съчетаването им с вейп течности и аромати, създадени от партньорите ни ELDA и Big Mouth.

За първи път в България можете да се насладите на уникалните и първокласни вкусови характеристики на ELDA. Отличаващи се като най-висококачествените и със запомняща се стилна визия вейп продукти на европейския пазар. Big Mouth е производител, доказал се както в България, така и в Европа.

При нас ще откриете голямо изобилие от концентрирани аромати  в широка гама от различни вкусови оттенъци, D.I.Y вейп течности,VG/PG бази, както и nic шотове, които нямат аналог.

Name: MTS Cigar Co.
Description:
Founded on passion, craftsmanship, and camaraderie, MTS Cigar Co. is more than a premium cigar brand—it’s a lifestyle rooted in tradition, loyalty, and brotherhood. Based in Florida, MTS represents the modern cigar enthusiast: bold in spirit, refined in taste, and united by the ritual of the smoke.

Every MTS cigar is handcrafted using select, aged tobaccos from the finest growing regions, wrapped in artistry and heritage. From the first light to the final draw, each blend tells a story—of balance, character, and purpose. Our exclusive lines, including the Masterminds Series and Elite Series, offer a range of distinctive profiles to satisfy both seasoned aficionados and newcomers exploring the culture.

Our Philosophy:
At MTS, cigars are more than luxury—they’re conversation starters, moment markers, and connections between people. We celebrate the craftsmanship that goes into every leaf and honor the community that gathers around the smoke. Whether it’s on a fishing boat, at a charity ride, or by the fire after a long day, an MTS cigar is always a symbol of quality and unity.

Community and Purpose:
MTS Cigar Co. proudly supports events and causes that bring people together—from the Big Catch Cigar Classic fishing tournament to the Riding for Change charity rides benefiting veterans and first responders. We believe in giving back as much as we enjoy giving smoke.

Our Promise:
Luxury, loyalty, and legacy—rolled into every cigar. MTS Cigar Co. is where passion meets precision, and every puff reminds you: You’re part of the pack.

Name: Eastobac Kenya Limited
Description:
At Eastobac, we are dedicated to transforming the agricultural landscape of East Africa. Since our establishment in 2008, we have been at the forefront of sourcing and marketing high-quality African tobaccos, committed to promoting sustainable farming practices and uplifting local communities.
Our Mission:
To advance sustainable agriculture and improve the livelihoods of farmers in Kenya and Uganda through innovative practices, community development, and quality assurance.

What We Do:
-Sourcing and Export: We specialize in sourcing the finest African tobaccos through our robust network and maintain high standards of quality and reliability for our global markets.
-Sustainable Farming: We work closely with local farmers, providing them with the education and resources needed to implement sustainable farming techniques. This not only enhances crop quality but also ensures environmental stewardship.
-Community Development: At Eastobac, we believe in giving back. Our initiatives include educational programs,  and infrastructure development, all aimed at improving the quality of life for the communities we serve.
-Quality Assurance: Our rigorous quality control processes ensure that only the best products leave our facilities. We are committed to maintaining excellence at every stage, from farm to export.

Why Choose Us:
-Commitment to Quality: From farm to export, we ensure that every step of our process meets rigorous quality standards.
-Sustainability: We prioritize sustainable practices that benefit the environment and local communities.
-Partnership: We build strong, mutually beneficial relationships with farmers, ensuring that they have the support and resources they need to thrive.

Join Us in Making a Difference:
At Eastobac Kenya, we are more than just an agricultural company; we are a catalyst for positive change. We invite you to connect with us, explore opportunities for collaboration, and join us in our mission to create a sustainable and prosperous future.

Name: Tabakspeciaalzaak De Lesseps
Description:
Tabakspeciaalzaak de Lesseps is beter bekent als de meest gezellige tabakswinkel in de wijk Zuilen, te Utrecht. Tabakspeciaalzaak de Lesseps is begonnen in maart 1985 als een bloemenwinkel maar sinds 10 jaar hebben wij naast bloemen ook sigaretten, sigaren, tabak, tabaksproducten en kansspelen in ons assortiment. Voor uw dagelijkse krant, een (wens)kaart, uw beltegoed of tegoedkaart bent u bij de Lesseps te Utrecht aan het juiste adres. Ook bied de Lesseps diensten aan zoals Western Union en Mr Pay, hierover staat meer informatie bij diensten.

De Lesseps doet er alles aan om het de klant zo comfortabel mogelijk te maken tijdens hun bezoek. Zo ontvangt u gratis koffie als u TOTO speelt bij ons in de winkel en zijn wij 7 dagen per week geopend om aan uw wens te kunnen voldoen. Ook kunt u gratis parkeren voor de deur en is al ons personeel gediplomeerd. Verder krijgt u natuurlijk de ouderwetse gezelligheid, want wat wil je met 25 jaar ervaring?

Name: Eleven 02 Cigars
Description:
Eleven 02 Cigars is a premium cigar wholesaling company that supplies brick and mortar cigar lounges with brands such as The Besa Cigar.

The Besa is a medium bodied cigar, blended with an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper, Ecuadorian Sumatra binder, and a Nicaraguan-Dominican filler. Cigar enthusiasts will experience notes of hazelnut, cocoa, and cedar, with a peppery finish. Two sizes are now available: The 6×50 Toro and the 4.5×50 Short Robusto. 

Brothers Mark, Zach and friend Alex have long been interested in cigar smoking. Having been involved in the cigar culture for over four years, the three decided to create a cigar brand of their own. Mark and Zach come from Albania and wanted their first cigar to be related to their family’s heritage. With the help of their friends and partners, the group came together to create their first private-label cigar. Thus came the birth of Eleven 02 Cigars!

Description:
Welcome to Don Francisco Cigars

At Don Francisco Cigars, we take pride in offering a legacy of premium handcrafted cigars rooted in our family’s history. Based in Santiago, Dominican Republic, our brand was founded by my father, Francisco, and me to celebrate the art of cigar-making and the bond that connects generations.

	•	Churchill: $18 per cigar or $360 for a case of 20.

2. Our Story:

	•	Don Francisco Cigars is more than a business—it’s our family’s passion. On our website, we share the story behind our brand and our dedication to preserving the craftsmanship and heritage of fine cigars.

3. Shop with Us:

4. Reach Out:

Why Choose Us?

At Don Francisco Cigars, we’re committed to quality, tradition, and creating memorable experiences for cigar lovers everywhere. Our website is your gateway to exploring our premium products and connecting with the legacy of our brand.

Name: Bello
Description:
Bello was developed in 2019 with the intention of providing an ultimate solution to the problem of wrinkles created during smoking in the upper lips, which are not aesthetic and cause an unpleasant sensation.
Bello is an original and simple product created to allow smokers to avoid lip flexing during smoking, thereby avoiding the appearance of wrinkles around the mouth area. Bello is made of soft, safe to use silicone. The lips rest on Bello in a way that prevents them from flexing. Bello is a product of many years of knowledge, experience and research. It is ergonomically designed, comfortable and complies with strict standards. With Bello, you can preserve your facial features while enjoying a relaxing cigarette, comfort, and unprecedented style.
After consulting with our product engineers' team and reviewing our product by a control group of over 250 men and women, we carefully assembled a collection of stylish colors that match the tastes of most men and women in our target audience. Our collection includes transparent and opaque designs, various pastel shades, and beautiful dark colors.
To reduce smoking wrinkles, we recommend that you start using this product with your first cigarette or as soon as possible. It is recommended to replace the product on a weekly basis.
Bello was exhibited at the TPE2020 World Smoking Show in Las Vegas, USA and has gained interest from major tobacco companies around the world.

About Us
Vigor Cigars is a premium brand dedicated to crafting handmade, high-quality cigars in the oldest single-origin factory in Estelí, Nicaragua—a region celebrated worldwide for its rich heritage and unparalleled expertise in cigar making.

Exclusively available to members and sold online, we provide a unique experience that goes beyond just cigars. Our community is a collective of discerning individuals who value tradition, craftsmanship, and the art of savoring life’s finer moments.

Our Philosophy
Guided by our tagline, "Physical Strength & Good Health," Vigor Cigars embodies the timeless ritual of relaxation and connection. A cigar is more than a product; it’s an experience. It invites you to pause, reflect, and enjoy the moment, offering a perfect escape from the demands of daily life.

Why Choose Vigor Cigars?

Unmatched Craftsmanship: Every cigar is handcrafted by expert artisans, ensuring a premium smoking experience.
Exclusivity: Our members-only model guarantees access to exceptional cigars unavailable anywhere else.
Rich Heritage: Proudly made in Nicaragua, honoring generations of cigar-making tradition.
At Vigor Cigars, we don’t just sell cigars; we cultivate a lifestyle. Join us to experience the perfect blend of tradition, quality, and community.

Name: Florida eCigs and Vapes
Description: What Is An Electric Cigarette A precision device that provides an exact nicotine dose just like a regular smoke without tar and toxins. The only thing released by the smoke free cigarette is nicotine and a small amount of water vapor. It looks, feels and tastes like the real thing providing the tactile, hands on feel smokers most often miss. Smoking without smoke is just one of the benefits of e cigarettes. They are less expensive than tobacco, with no tax, making them a real money saver for smokers. So how does it work... Electric Cigarettes Look, Taste And Feel Like The Real Thing They consist of 3 components. The battery that powers the unit, the cartridge containing the nicotine e-liquid and the atomizer that heats and vaporizes the e liquid. It is automatically activated when the user takes a puff. The micro-electronics sense the air drawn through it and produce a refreshingly clean smoking experience. When the user inhales, the electronic sensor built into the atomizer "senses" the airflow and heats the nicotine/glycol solution in the cartridge releasing an ultra-clean vapor for the smoker. The mist tastes and feels like taking a hit off a regular smoke. Electronic Cigarettes Duplicate Tactile Feel In your hand, they feel exactly like a real cig and to save money, the cartridge is refillable. That's right, when the cartridge is empty you don't buy another e-cig, you simply refill the cartridge saving HUGE amounts of $$$$$$. We all agree that the price of a pack of cigs is not likely to start going down. With inflation and taxes, prices will keep rising making this habit increasingly expensive. This makes the smoke free alternative healthy and cost effective. Cost To Use Electric Cigarette If a pack of smokes costs $6 and you smoke 1 pack a day, you will spend $2100 a year. With the electric cig, one nicotine cartridge costs $1.5 and is equal to about 10 cigarettes reducing your smoking cost to per $3 per day. This saves you over $90 a month or $1000 per year. Now if you want to save even more you can refill your cartridges (a very easy task I may add), bringing the cost down to less than $1 per cartridge! This increases your savings to over $1300 a year. For a 2 pack a day smoker the savings will be $2600 a year and a 3 pack a day smoker would save $3900. With smoke free cigarettes, there is no burning or combustion. You inhale no smoke or tar and improve your health immediately with easier breathing, cleaner, clearer lungs and less colds and flues. No smoke also means no more smoke odor. You breath, clothes, car and home will no longer smell like an ash tray. And don't forget, your teeth will no longer look dingy and yellow. This is a beautiful thing! With No Smoke Use Them Almost Anywhere At work, restaurants, nightclubs, on airplanes are just a few of the places e-cigs are allowed. You will no longer be banished to the smoking dungeon or outside to the wet and cold to get your nicotine fix. Domenico Cigars / Richner Cigars ist eine kleine Manufaktur in Punta Cana, Dominikanische Republik, welche Premium Zigarren in erstklassiger Qualität und ausschliesslich in Kleinserien unter Schweizer Leitung herstellt. Domenico Cigars beschäftigt nur Meister-Tabaqueros mit einer Ausbildung von mindestens drei Jahren. Eine Domenico Premium Zigarre wird in über 40 Arbeitsschritten von Hand hergestellt. Domenico Cigars wurde im Jahr 2001 in Punta Cana ins Leben gerufen. Im Schatten der Karibischen Sonne mischen unsere professionellen Dominikanischen Handdreher eine Varietät aus Dominikanischen und Kubanischen (auf Dominikanischem Grund gewachsenen) Tabaken – diese spezielle Kombination, im Verbund mit einer Variation von verschiedenen Deckblättern, ist das Geheimnis der Domenico Premium Zigarren. Die Zigarren Manufaktur bietet in Punta Cana Besichtigungstouren an – der Name «Domenico» wird von begeisterten Touristen in die ganze Welt getragen.

Die äusserst feine Balance von Geschmack, Stärke und die Sinfonie der Aromen prägen das Domenico Label – Qualität geht vor Quantität – being special in a positive way!

Name: SnusBlast
Description:
SnusBlast was established in 2023, we are based in the heart of London. We decided to start SnusBlast as we saw that the snus industry lacked great service, fast delivery and fresh products. Even though SnusBlast was established in 2023, we have been in the industry and trading snus since 2020.



At SnusBlast, customer satisfaction is our top priority. We strive to provide excellent snus products and services that meet and exceed your expectations. Our team works hard to ensure that every customer has a positive experience with us. We value feedback and work to promptly resolve any issues or concerns that may arise. It is our goal to build long-lasting relationships, in this light we created a loyalty points system to greatly benefit our customers.



Join us on this journey! We invite you to experience the SnusBlast difference. Whether you’re new to snus or a seasoned connoisseur, we’re here to provide you with an unmatched shopping experience. Let’s redefine the snus industry together, one satisfied customer at a time.



For inquiries, feedback, or more information, don’t hesitate to reach out to us at info@snusblast.co.uk or fill our contact us form. Thank you for choosing SnusBlast as your trusted partner for premium snus.
